Regardless of whether you celebrate Christmas or not, the holiday gives us all an opportunity to hit pause, spend time with family and friends, and reflect on the things that matter most in life. It's a joyous time of year and one which I cherish. I hope you, too, were able to enjoy the holiday!
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d496b255-02d6-4c2a-b173-77b4f6867463?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I'm going to be using this week and next to finalize my annual set of predictions which I plan to publish on or around January 5th. If by chance you missed last week's Navigating Uncertainty, I'd encourage you to review it as it has several polls seeking your input on developments you think are important to watch over the next five years.
## [Prediction Time! Care To Join Me?](https://substack.com/redirect/c2b93c0b-4ee8-4476-80ce-140b7834e925?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Dec 19
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c2b93c0b-4ee8-4476-80ce-140b7834e925?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[For those that have followed my work for some time, you're likely aware that I publish an annual set of predictions. While most people who produce such lists do so for the year ahead, I find it easier to identify developments when looking out five years. Shorter time frames, in my analysis, make it difficult to distinguish noise from signal As such,](https://substack.com/redirect/c2b93c0b-4ee8-4476-80ce-140b7834e925?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/c2b93c0b-4ee8-4476-80ce-140b7834e925?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It's important to note that my annual set of developments to watch are really intended to be catalysts to encourage all of us to think differently about what the future may hold. Because, if we're honest with ourselves, most predictions miss the mark! As I noted in _[Think For Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/761f555e-b9fa-4977-afd1-d1c7f1c4d78b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ :
> _[Despite the mixed (at best) track record of those in the prediction business, we humans seem to have an insatiable appetite to consume their prognostications about the future. Nobel Laureate Ken Arrow captured the desire for predictions quite eloquently in recalling his work for the US Army Air Force. Despite concluding that the weather predictions upon which the superiors relied were entirely useless (i.e. statistically random, no better than a guess), he was rebuffed, told that"The Commanding General is well aware that the forecasts are no good; however, he needs them for planning purposes." ](https://substack.com/redirect/761f555e-b9fa-4977-afd1-d1c7f1c4d78b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
> _[As comical as that statement sounds, I find it quite useful--and helpful. ](https://substack.com/redirect/761f555e-b9fa-4977-afd1-d1c7f1c4d78b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[The blunt reality is that accuracy cannot and should not be the criteria upon which to evaluate thinking about the future.](https://substack.com/redirect/761f555e-b9fa-4977-afd1-d1c7f1c4d78b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ Usefulness, I propose, is a far better standard. Just as it's impossible to evaluate the quality of a decision process by its outcome, so too is it unproductive to evaluate the quality of a prediction by its accuracy. Good processes sometimes result in bad outcomes, something known colloquially as a bad break. Likewise, bad processes sometimes result in good outcomes, also known as dumb luck. But over time, good processes should result in a higher probability of good outcomes and bad processes should result in a higher probability of bad outcomes. ](https://substack.com/redirect/761f555e-b9fa-4977-afd1-d1c7f1c4d78b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
> _[If we apply this logic to predictions about the future, we quickly learn to appreciate the value they may provide in helping us think differently. They can help nudge us away from our default positions and widen our view of the possibilities ahead.](https://substack.com/redirect/761f555e-b9fa-4977-afd1-d1c7f1c4d78b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_

It's in that spirit that I've published my annual predictions on the future five years. For those with time on their hands over the holiday week, here are links to the last five years of predictions.

## An Update and Preview
I'm tentatively targeting the publication of **24 Global Developments To Watch Over The Next Five Years** on or around January 5th. And, as I have previously discussed, that will likely be the last free post before I convert _Navigating Uncertainty_ into a twice-a-month paid newsletter. More information will come next week.
Further, as I promised last week, I wanted to share a glimpse of my forthcoming book, _**The Making of a Generalist**_. I'm literally finalizing the text this week and the book will immediately be made available for pre-order once I've completed the layout and final proofing. Stay tuned for more details but in the interim, here's the book's cover:

### About Vikram Mansharamani
Vikram Mansharamani is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth _profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of two books,_[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/dca0d6ef-8f2a-4a94-a69f-7ce2475f084b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _and _[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/56196fc9-efca-41f3-a3b9-9c19127b9a26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). _Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

It's a joyous time of year and one which I cherish. I hope you, too, were able to enjoy the holiday! I'm going to be using this week and next to finalize my annual set of predictions which I plan to publish on or around January 5th. If by chance you missed last week's Navigating Uncertainty, I'd encourage you to review it as it has several polls seeking your input on developments you think are important to watch over the next five years. | | | | ---|---|--- | Dec 19 | It's important to note that my annual set of developments to watch are really intended to be catalysts to encourage all of us to think differently about what the future may hold. Because, if we're honest with ourselves, most predictions miss the mark! As I noted in : It's in that spirit that I've published my annual predictions on the future five years. For those with time on their hands over the holiday week, here are links to the last five years of predictions. | | | | ---|---|--- | January 2, 2019 | | | | | ---|---|--- | January 8, 2020 | | | | | ---|---|--- | January 6, 2021 | | | | | ---|---|--- | January 5, 2022 | | | | | ---|---|--- | Jan 4 | An Update and Preview I'm tentatively targeting the publication of 24 Global Developments To Watch Over The Next Five Years on or around January 5th. And, as I have previously discussed, that will likely be the last free post before I convert Navigating Uncertainty into a twice-a-month paid newsletter. More information will come next week. Further, as I promised last week, I wanted to share a glimpse of my forthcoming book, The Making of a Generalist. I'm literally finalizing the text this week and the book will immediately be made available for pre-order once I've completed the layout and final proofing. Stay tuned for more details but in the interim, here's the book's cover: | | ---|---|--- About Vikram Mansharamani Vikram Mansharamani is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. LinkedIn has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and Worth profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of two books, and . Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing. | | ---|---|--- You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2023 Vikram Mansharamani PO BOX 932, Lincoln, NH 03251 ? ?

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20Helgelien=20Family?=
subject: Not afraid to say what today is
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elizabeth for Nevada]( "Paid for by Elizabeth for Nevada")
body:
Merry Christmas | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5a01a063a0ef/not-afraid-to-say-what-today-is?e=54a81bd33c)
---
| | Peter,
---
| | In a world increasingly swayed by a woke agenda that seeks to dilute our cherished traditions, we stand unapologetically in proclaiming the true meaning of this season:
**Merry Christmas: A celebration of the birth of Jesus Christ!**
We refuse to succumb to the pressure of political correctness that insists on a generic "Happy Holidays." Instead, we embrace and boldly declare the reason for the season: **the birth of our Savior, Jesus Christ**. It's His message of love, hope, and salvation that illuminates our lives and guides our path.

The woke agenda aims to erase the significance of Christ's birth from the public sphere, promoting a secularized version of Christmas that neglects its profound spiritual roots. But we know that Christmas is not just a festive holiday; it's a holy day that commemorates the most miraculous event in history - God becoming man to walk among us and ultimately provide salvation through His sacrifice.

This Christmas, let's stand together against the tide of cultural conformity. Let's joyfully share the story of Jesus' birth, engage in traditions that honor Him, and speak His name with reverence and adoration. Our commitment to celebrating Christmas is a testament to our faith and a beacon of hope in a world that needs the message of Christ now more than ever.

We are incredibly grateful for your support and fellowship. Your courage in standing for truth and tradition is a source of strength for our campaign and our community. As we look forward to the new year, let's continue to be bold in our faith, unwavering in our convictions, and joyful in our celebration of Christ's birth.

>From our family to yours, we wish you a Merry Christmas filled with the peace and joy of Jesus. May His love surround you, and may His peace fill your hearts this season and always.
---
|
---
| Sincerely,
---
| **Elizabeth, Tiger, and the Elizabeth for Nevada Campaign Team**
[**ElizabethForNV.com**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=3fc85fecdd&e=54a81bd33c)

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Thank you!
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37222%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5DlfLDvC7mZB%2bOih8kuapw&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support.

Traveling the country, hearing your stories, and feeling the momentum swell up on the ground is incredible. We have a country to save and it’s clear people like you are ready to help me win this race and right this ship.

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37222%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5DlfLDvC7mZB%2bOih8kuapw&sysid=1)
---

_Together, we've achieved incredible things:_
* Hosted more than 180 town halls across the country, bringing our message directly to the people.
* Soared to second place in New Hampshire, Iowa, and South Carolina!
* Soared to second place in national polls, showing our momentum is undeniable.
* Launched our initial ad buy across Iowa and New Hampshire.
* Earned the endorsement of New Hampshire Governor Chris Sununu, adding to our growing list of supporters.

Our grassroots movement is surging, and with your continued support, our momentum will be unstoppable as we head into **the crucial Iowa caucuses in just three weeks, and the New Hampshire primary just 8 days after that.**

_But there is still much to do._ We need to keep hunkering down, outworking our opponents, and building the unstoppable momentum to get us one step closer to victory.

**[Would you consider joining our team with a ONE-TIME donation of $10 or more? Your support will help us reach more voters, spread our message, and build the momentum we need to win.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37223%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XSWM1CSOj8fU%2b4ie8wXE%2fQ&sysid=1 "Would you consider
joining our team with a ONE-TIME donation of $10 or more? Your support will help
us reach more voters, spread our message, and build the momentum we need to win.")**

---
My very best,
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37222%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5DlfLDvC7mZB%2bOih8kuapw&sysid=1)
---
Nikki Haley

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37224%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qoCVExV3haqlSbTy5JZ0Bw&sysid=1)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37235%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YrZNXGi0b2WG8sB%2flKKzEQ&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37236%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IRUxIESO5Ej%2fJ4M6bwnaOg&sysid=1 "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37237%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CXAVQrxRsGky4aomG%2fdTmw&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37238%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cCJXflrrQ85NpKYBG01Qaw&sysid=1 "Will you join me today
and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37239%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=v6mCVGl8mAtcm9tvsAkQBQ&sysid=1 "DONATE")
---

name: The Exodus Effect
subject: Breaking News: Tucker's Revelation Shakes the Foundations of History!
body:
We live in a time when the truth is often obfuscated by those with a hidden agenda.

We live in a time when the truth is often obfuscated by those with a hidden agenda. .
Tucker Carlson, a brave voice in media, was recently dismissed by Fox News under the guise of "remarks" he had supposedly made.
However, we've discovered a more profound reason behind his firing.
Tucker was on the brink of exposing a 1,700-year-old Biblical scandal - a shocking lie that has caused immeasurable pain and suffering throughout the ages.

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Join Me in Standing Up for Women’s Sports and American Values
body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688064%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yYEKaYLJxBNoNnTd71TuqQ&sysid=1)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you’d like to give online, here’s a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688075%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M%2b8TBWGUPDhVCiRP%2fkNfdA&sysid=1)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity’s show that I’ve partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I’m the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left’s cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America’s freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that’s when you know you’re saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America’s founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688076%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fimuaPgleuIQB3DIOhlhSg&sysid=1)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women’s identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688077%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9Rj%2bw7g0VXCP0I%2fOSz9oFw&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c2029%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Yl12oWKT0MrUwaxtm9gr1Q&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688078%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fAXY6fv%2fMzGTO2gg5mMwXw&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688079%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CQe2ebbbH6KSdqgonlaJfg&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c2029%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Yl12oWKT0MrUwaxtm9gr1Q&sysid=1)

name: ICYMI News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z24pkp56lha2dt4m36pi5qbb61n7m227plo8cji8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clge1ob1c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo7lt96sdrhd6al17mcaj553g11tns5lvs0arb30_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clge1ob1c9h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zonejm5ojb7qbvdj62m26247gjgck5e81to5kalg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clge1ob1c9h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: American Briefing
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zr5v12de46thejld0afuefvvrq8tkplekame3kg0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clge1ob6c5h2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf7gkdb76fl37o684ak98ne5dqto25eg8rsjnqto_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clge1ob6c5h2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs0ubij46d7fnrp0aggm5ns30ifqovsuuq1t1400_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clge1ob6c5h2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z683lm63ghtd3dj5hu47on59eeq0c6frs5r6ljo8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clge1ob6c5h2bs)

Our Government is Woefully Unprepared They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on Fox & Friends... And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now. Demand is surging... "It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE." American Briefing 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Join Me in Standing Up for Women’s Sports and American Values
body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeiggihhu131bob4gfk4q6pus4d7bnaiml06t7ug_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clge1ob6cth2bs)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8hsqj87hvacmeorpsc16u2ekhsbupn8v7jmb480_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clge1ob6cth2bs)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z433oekcikmp1evja7njngckbohkt72bc54j1pio_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clge1ob6cth2bs)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9qce3h5kqt3pie38svjrtnvmv7f768ditpe0738_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clge1ob6cth2bs)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

GOP Presidential
---

name: Kash Patel
subject: Subpoena list for Congress to expose the Deep State
body:
If Congress is serious about tackling the weaponization of government, then here is the subpoena list I recommend.

_Friend, Congress must subpoena these people and documents if they are to expose the weaponization of government. It 's the only way to save our Republic and defend the rule of law in our country. Please read carefully._

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgvn39uhrkgb87ajkls9jv1g1ghfcnnda21tm2ug_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clge1ob1c9h2bs)

Hello Friend,

The deep state has entrenched itself in every major federal institution. I call them government gangsters because they use their power as leverage against Americans to unlawfully influence elections.

If Congress is serious about tackling the weaponization of government, then here is the subpoena list I recommend.

_You may ask yourself, "What credibility does this guy have?!"_

Good question.

I led the Russia Gate investigation for the House Intelligence Committee in Congress. When Devin Nunes asked me to run the investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, good or bad, had to be published- he said yes, and we did just that.

My investigation discovered it was a fraud, and the DOJ/FBI investigation was unlawful. They did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump and thought they would never get caught.

And only after leaving government service 2 years ago did I discover the FBI was spying on me while I served as Senior Counsel on the committee exposing DOJ/FBI illegal acts before the FISA Court to unlawfully surveil President Trump and his campaign. Yes, they subpoenaed my records to get dirt on Devin Nunes because our investigation was exposing FBI/DOJ corruption.

**After my service with President Trump, I founded the Kash Foundation.** The Kash Foundation's goal is to provide financial assistance to veterans, America-first patriots, and whistle-blowers and fund education programs. As you may know, the Russiagate tactic of the radical left is to baselessly prosecute patriots.

**I am urgently asking for your help. I am looking to raise $100,000 online this month to secure critical funding for Kash Foundation.**
[Can you please donate $250, $50, $35, or even $10 today? Click here to donate >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaam7frii2r7au5v5qg3602q1m10i290lt871ov8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clge1ob1c9h2bs)

[Donate >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo1ocqvvbo2voe8c3k4m1pluvsg03vjb43nbkqpg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clge1ob1c9h2bs)

Congressional Subpoena List
1. **Twitter:** Every contract with FBI/DOJ on election projects (the FBI established an 80-agent task force that met with Twitter weekly before the 2022 election).

2. **FBI and Chris Wray:** He has willingly violated a congressional subpoena and must be brought up on contempt of Congress charges.

3. **James Baker:** Former FBI number 1 lawyer who signed off on the unlawful Trump FISA, caught and fired. Later, the Number 2 lawyer at Twitter was also fired.

4. **ALL 51 Intel officials who signed bogus Hunter Biden** laptop letter

5. **Blinken:** He has now lied about his involvement in said letter and must be held to account. Lying to Congress is a federal crime.

6. **Garland:** The IRS whistleblower has submitted a valid claim that the Hunter Biden investigation is being politically obstructed. Garland testified under oath that it had not happened. Someone's lying.

This is exactly who Congress needs to go after. And guess what? This is only a start!

If you are as concerned about deep state interference, if it is a top priority for you, then please I urge you to support the Kash Foundation.

[I'm counting on you to sustain the Kash Foundation's fight against the deep state. Please consider donating $250, $50, or even just $10 to help defeat the deep state and expose the government gangsters running the show. Click here >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z17t2t5niuia2n3rnicnp1d3atbigda6jmci8npo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clge1ob1c9h2bs)

body:
We live in a time when the truth is often obfuscated by those with a hidden agenda.

We live in a time when the truth is often obfuscated by those with a hidden agenda. .
Tucker Carlson, a brave voice in media, was recently dismissed by Fox News under the guise of "remarks" he had supposedly made.
However, we've discovered a more profound reason behind his firing.
Tucker was on the brink of exposing a 1,700-year-old Biblical scandal - a shocking lie that has caused immeasurable pain and suffering throughout the ages.
This deception, carefully guarded by the Democrats, has shaped the course of history, often leading to wars and conflicts.
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688074%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ag8OXyQPJknYWE3sKEJVbA&sysid=1)

subject: Thank you!
body:
I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support.

| |

---

Friend,

I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support.

Traveling the country, hearing your stories, and feeling the momentum swell up on the ground is incredible. We have a country to save and it's clear people like you are ready to help me win this race and right this ship.
**
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z28mc9ulsocntrmh9bg86eptbv233dstrm0h84l8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clie4o34cdh2bs)

_Together, we've achieved incredible things:_
* Hosted more than 180 town halls across the country, bringing our message directly to the people.
* Soared to second place in New Hampshire, Iowa, and South Carolina!
* Soared to second place in national polls, showing our momentum is undeniable.
* Launched our initial ad buy across Iowa and New Hampshire.
* Earned the endorsement of New Hampshire Governor Chris Sununu, adding to our growing list of supporters.

Our grassroots movement is surging, and with your continued support, our momentum will be unstoppable as we head into **the crucial Iowa caucuses in just three weeks, and the New Hampshire primary just 8 days after that.**

_But there is still much to do._ We need to keep hunkering down, outworking our opponents, and building the unstoppable momentum to get us one step closer to victory.

My very best,

---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztfoo0b5dgckj21dh2otnnh5lv4quiddemv3n5ho_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clie4o34cdh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The truth is, no one knows for certain
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z51nftn8lb77qp1aa4pgqp8est8fb4p66rct80r0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clie4o34cdh2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1a4ghud0656ib32rqa6gfpg4999j4nk9g85j0ro_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clie4o34cdh2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs9gsnk8c9a42jsrc5vqhviu6vj2spvqdc46447o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clie4o34cdh2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeebbuiki6in31jgn825df19fadqla11ahps2hg8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj2chhmepj246h22sh2s8i6eo36clie4o34cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znms5ahivrtl2hic84p9fb35h7n453uh3sv35j5o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clie4o34cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zutafbjcl1gl6rkmh7rds0j4an3recsmdmqq8tc8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clie4o34cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: The Exodus Effect
subject: Breaking News: Tucker's Revelation Shakes the Foundations of History!
body:
We live in a time when the truth is often obfuscated by those with a hidden agenda.

We live in a time when the truth is often obfuscated by those with a hidden agenda. .
Tucker Carlson, a brave voice in media, was recently dismissed by Fox News under the guise of "remarks" he had supposedly made.
However, we've discovered a more profound reason behind his firing.
Tucker was on the brink of exposing a 1,700-year-old Biblical scandal - a shocking lie that has caused immeasurable pain and suffering throughout the ages.
This deception, carefully guarded by the Democrats, has shaped the course of history, often leading to wars and conflicts.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2lq4kgggkgsptlpmm6oqshq3kst5tf1lqfgo5mo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clie4o32c9h2bs)

subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:

| **The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis****This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way.Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent...And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn:**_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months.The loss will be beyond what you can imagine.**As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis.It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food.Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies.That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._-Z12t4uXgZCGntdw).When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits...You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat.[**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-LpicWg) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out.It quickly becomes every man for himself.Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late.[**Stock up now**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: The Exodus Effect
subject: Breaking News: Tucker's Revelation Shakes the Foundations of History!
body:
We live in a time when the truth is often obfuscated by those with a hidden agenda.

We live in a time when the truth is often obfuscated by those with a hidden agenda. .
Tucker Carlson, a brave voice in media, was recently dismissed by Fox News under the guise of "remarks" he had supposedly made.
However, we've discovered a more profound reason behind his firing.
Tucker was on the brink of exposing a 1,700-year-old Biblical scandal - a shocking lie that has caused immeasurable pain and suffering throughout the ages.
This deception, carefully guarded by the Democrats, has shaped the course of history, often leading to wars and conflicts.
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37355%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gqYUzHpqJ4ziARC1%2fmjByQ&sysid=1)
Fortunately, we have a [newly surfaced video ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37356%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jRsce%2fe79MTe9tMzvJYDAg&sysid=1)video that lays bare the truth.
This video carries an [urgent message](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37357%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pNa30ole0LcdXie%2f3n5WUA&sysid=1)for all those born before May 16th, 1986.
It's a message that the Democrats don't want you to see, which is why they might try to remove it from the internet soon.
To ensure you get access to this eye-opening revelation, we urge you to watch the video while it's still available.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrro7i3rdmn2ovpcdmcc1a4se8of9lbccvac3ru8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clieaor1c9h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs5r6i76ep56m6dt9q9t3avko8mshgha3jbjkk88_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clieaor1c9h2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z48nvrcoscf54oqh5j5kri67ks562flkm7b0m8a0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clieaor1c9h2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: An opportunity to save our nation
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW9z2IliNl)
| | | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62608859:W9z2IliNl:m:1:2532013465:C3988B95A4FA34B1B5159B44A17F80ED:r)
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,

Insane leftist policies threaten to destroy our country. Leftist policies cause open borders, rampant corruption, rising crime, and the erasing of American freedom. And the corporate media refuses to cover these failures and instead push their own leftist narratives. Americans are fed up with the lack of action to fix these problems and save our crumbling republic.

But the fight isn't lost.

The Heritage Foundation has developed four key initiatives to defeat the leftist agenda and tackle these critical issues head on.

**Through Project 2025 we've devised a plan to dismantle the deep state** by training thousands of patriotic Americans to staff the next presidential administration, enact conservative policy solutions, and replace the deep state's leftist bureaucrats.

**We're taking on government corruption through the Heritage Oversight Project**. Our expert team of lawyers and investigators are in the trenches, filing lawsuits and Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the D.C. swamp's wrongdoings and hold perpetrators accountable.

**We're working to end Biden's open borders** by developing key public policy solutions that will secure America's borders. Just this year, The Heritage Foundation's research was pivotal to the House-passed Secure the Border Act.

And through our **Election Integrity Scorecard** , we're holding state policymakers accountable by ranking the security and integrity of each state's election laws and procedures. Governors and state policymakers contact our team frequently looking for ways to improve their score.

All of these projects will defeat leftist policies and bring about success for our country next year. But I need your support to get them over the finish line.

**Please give a tax-deductible gift today to help support this comprehensive plan to save America using the secure link below:

[https://secured.heritage.org/eoy-campaign/](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62608859:W9z2IliNl:m:1:2532013465:C3988B95A4FA34B1B5159B44A17F80ED:r)**

Your generous support will ensure these initiatives achieve great wins for our country as we enter 2024.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

clean_body: Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan? | | | Hello Friend, Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator. Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan? I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return. That's the heart of Revelation. Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness. Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead. It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near. This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey. Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ. When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence. As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King. In my brand-new book, Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into: 1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist? 2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event? 3\. subject: Breaking News: Tucker's Revelation Shakes the Foundations of History!
body:
We live in a time when the truth is often obfuscated by those with a hidden agenda.

We live in a time when the truth is often obfuscated by those with a hidden agenda. .
Tucker Carlson, a brave voice in media, was recently dismissed by Fox News under the guise of "remarks" he had supposedly made.
However, we've discovered a more profound reason behind his firing.
Tucker was on the brink of exposing a 1,700-year-old Biblical scandal - a shocking lie that has caused immeasurable pain and suffering throughout the ages.
This deception, carefully guarded by the Democrats, has shaped the course of history, often leading to wars and conflicts.

It's a message that the Democrats don't want you to see, which is why they might try to remove it from the internet soon.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Thank you!
body:
I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5lvvttjp7nm0rmvriansgkdnmlkmeso8u52umc0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clie9oj4cjh2bs)
---

Friend,

I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support.

Traveling the country, hearing your stories, and feeling the momentum swell up on the ground is incredible. We have a country to save and it's clear people like you are ready to help me win this race and right this ship.
**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztv4amlbo01hkf0sg28r263p8hkuhn50a7pb40u0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clie9oj4cjh2bs)
---

_Together, we've achieved incredible things:_
* Hosted more than 180 town halls across the country, bringing our message directly to the people.
* Soared to second place in New Hampshire, Iowa, and South Carolina!
* Soared to second place in national polls, showing our momentum is undeniable.
* Launched our initial ad buy across Iowa and New Hampshire.
* Earned the endorsement of New Hampshire Governor Chris Sununu, adding to our growing list of supporters.

Our grassroots movement is surging, and with your continued support, our momentum will be unstoppable as we head into **the crucial Iowa caucuses in just three weeks, and the New Hampshire primary just 8 days after that.**

_But there is still much to do._ We need to keep hunkering down, outworking our opponents, and building the unstoppable momentum to get us one step closer to victory.

**[Would you consider joining our team with a ONE-TIME donation of $10 or more? Your support will help us reach more voters, spread our message, and build the momentum we need to win.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zom9o2lf0oeg5rlmv7d0vrr1bf85heohj4atqndg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clie9oj4cjh2bs "Would you consider joining our team with a ONE-TIME donation of $10 or more? Your support will help us reach more voters, spread our message, and build the momentum we need to win.")**

---
My very best,
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvn3ksrivhdjofil3bshq7ie50ovldeh9sfun470_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clie9oj4cjh2bs)

---

| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt9octtvq2l5el7f4bvuq3qgpbg5munjlbivqsdo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clie9oj4cjh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6fhp9nqra3dji6e578lcb2hcq0qum1vimr0uoco_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clie9oj4cjh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

subject: A critical moment in our campaign:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:

| | |

| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6ae658e6-7149-4f50-93b2-1c8295497072/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T850a6e5d-a253-4905-a43d-ce124706b4ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, it’s Tom Suozzi. I’m the Democrat running in the toss-up special election to fill the seat that used to be held by George Santos. Election Day is on February 13–just a few weeks from now–and Blue Amp Action wanted me to reach out to you with this important message. I’ll get right to it– the only end-of-quarter deadline of our campaign is on December 31. Here’s why every day is so important and why I need your help.
* We only have one quarterly deadline to prove the strength of this campaign. While most campaigns have time to rebound after a bad month, we don’t. We’re building a massive voter contact operation at unprecedented speed, so we need your help.
* National Republicans are spending millions of dollars to make me look bad. I need grassroots supporters like you to help me respond and set the record straight.
* All of America will be watching Nassau and Queens on February 13. With George Santos gone, the country will be looking to us to see which direction we will go. Will we choose more gridlock and senseless fighting, or choose unity and common sense?

[Peter, we’re at an important crossroads in a high stakes race, and I’m counting on this grassroots movement to make sure we have the resources to win. Can you rush a split contribution right away? ****](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8ce40130-da1b-43ad-87d4-b4167dd61b27/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC** PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._CGjwZ2sTdhnGec8Dbw)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, The anti-critical race theory movement is gaining traction both ideologically and politically. And that has progressives both outraged and panicked. They’ll do anything they can to stop this movement. Their latest strategy is to distort the truth and mislead the American people so that they can continue to push their Marxist agenda. And they are using their friends in the establishment media and Big Tech to do so. But these lies are being unmasked and exposed by The Heritage Foundation. That’s why I’m sending you this email today.
---
| | I'm told that you are an American who is concerned about the levels of indoctrination we’ve seen from Critical Race Theory—and what that could mean for the future of our country. **So, today,[ I want to send you a FREE copy of The Heritage Foundation’s latest eBook, ](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**[**_The 5 Lies of CRT_****.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | Inside this important resource, you’ll not only learn the 5 lies Progressives have employed in their campaign to push Critical Race Theory, but you’ll also discover that:
* None of CRT’s policy approaches would help people of any race or national origin.
* All of the biggest names pushing CRT have affirmed that they are promoting Marxism.
* The Left is using CRT to wage a battle royal for the soul of America—and even the West itself.

**You can get instant access to your FREE eBook right now using this secure link:[ https://secured.heritage.org/5lies-of-crt-ebook/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-FXI7Xw)** As the Left ramps up their campaign through the power of the media and Big Tech, it is crucial that we inform as many people as possible with the truth about what is really going on. I hope this is a helpful resource for you. Best, Alexander Hyatt
