name: Team DeSantis
subject: The most critical deadline this campaign has faced
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=17972c9925e32176517bc3158fcf2e50bb5cb809073df55936ea6af005bb5a43905ecd8491a606609fcddc30f9bb64950c61bfd4b8b2e138864bbf3acbc04c758eff956ecdb3d02f86de128a736b0e91

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2e090929b347edb45c66570ab45d4a955be9f3cf72c8cb15719ba7bb31d8209839b83bd31de0b6eac2951f22d36a50938af29b4e76b2832b3c3218fe52878531

Friend,

In 5 days our campaign is coming up on our most critical fundraising deadline to date. The FEC's end of year fundraising deadline is on December 31st!

Once we submit our report to the FEC our opponents, media, and the entire nation will see the campaign's financial outlook ahead of the Iowa Caucus.

This is our LAST CHANCE this year to take action against leaving our lives in the hands of Joe Biden any longer. We have to step up, put everything we've got into this race, and fight for our future by
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2e090929b347edb45c66570ab45d4a955be9f3cf72c8cb15719ba7bb31d8209839b83bd31de0b6eac2951f22d36a50938af29b4e76b2832b3c3218fe52878531
supporting Ron DeSantis.

We've done the math. We need our team to help us raise $37,000 every day leading up to the new year or we lose our chance. This it is for 2023, friend.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2e090929b347edb45c66570ab45d4a955be9f3cf72c8cb15719ba7bb31d8209839b83bd31de0b6eac2951f22d36a50938af29b4e76b2832b3c3218fe52878531
Chip in TODAY!

Trust us, we know that this is not the email you want to see the day after Christmas. We love what we do, but we hate having to ask you for money, especially after the holidays. The truth of the matter is that the Left isn't going to take a day off, and we can't either.

We need your support, and we can't wait another day.

This is one of the most crucial elections our country has faced in decades.We can't sit by, slow down, and let the left win. Now is the last chance we have before this race hits its boiling point at the Iowa caucus.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2e090929b347edb4d09e73b9f3b645edf1a3bd3a61bf5baa7330690b75827951c30b4ddcd9b52e825cad667f3b6da363337c8f4d05658e7cda9c97adf60c3166
Chip in $15

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2e090929b347edb4c9a71b5afd3b1aea240f1d841832ccade8e0106379fddbf74778c77be8803111b6c97fb49e1765bfae73b5a5934c03ab94f27c0665ffb80e
Chip in $45

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2e090929b347edb4c55bb6e286d97005935043f1ada45b89dfa9170b22f5430ae5046f43f177cdfcb71a26eabeaea691a6a54e203f38df926b747194d351a1ee
Chip in $75

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2e090929b347edb42d519fe9775612df27bbe47a8c5ffd5675f72013290afbfc6efc3424fcac208f2302b55a4e67e28efea58f5b176a7e9684934699eb7d13ad
Chip in $100

We're asking you to give what you can over the course of the next few days, friend. We know the end of the year is hard, but we have to keep moving forward. This is our last shot. Please, choose whatever option you can today to help us hit our critical $37,000 daily fundraising goal every before December 31st.

Thanks for hearing us out,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2e090929b347edb45c66570ab45d4a955be9f3cf72c8cb15719ba7bb31d8209839b83bd31de0b6eac2951f22d36a50938af29b4e76b2832b3c3218fe52878531

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2e090929b347edb4d4d77b8a08b87ea4cf38ae67be91f93105232f3d1f0770df082da9b1c3d844bae5fcdd9649e57e5aad64e87a9031102b47c833b993c56956
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2e090929b347edb45c66570ab45d4a955be9f3cf72c8cb15719ba7bb31d8209839b83bd31de0b6eac2951f22d36a50938af29b4e76b2832b3c3218fe52878531

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2e090929b347edb45c66570ab45d4a955be9f3cf72c8cb15719ba7bb31d8209839b83bd31de0b6eac2951f22d36a50938af29b4e76b2832b3c3218fe52878531

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Friend, In 5 days our campaign is coming up on our most critical fundraising deadline to date. The FEC's end of year fundraising deadline is on December 31st! Once we submit our report to the FEC our opponents, media, and the entire nation will see the campaign's financial outlook ahead of the Iowa Caucus. This is our LAST CHANCE this year to take action against leaving our lives in the hands of Joe Biden any longer. We have to step up, put everything we've got into this race, and fight for our future by supporting Ron DeSantis. We've done the math. We need our team to help us raise $37,000 every day leading up to the new year or we lose our chance. This it is for 2023, friend. Chip in TODAY! Trust us, we know that this is not the email you want to see the day after Christmas. We love what we do, but we hate having to ask you for money, especially after the holidays. The truth of the matter is that the Left isn't going to take a day off, and we can't either. We need your support, and we can't wait another day. This is one of the most crucial elections our country has faced in decades.We can't sit by, slow down, and let the left win. Now is the last chance we have before this race hits its boiling point at the Iowa caucus. Chip in $15 Chip in $45 Chip in $75 Chip in $100 We're asking you to give what you can over the course of the next few days, friend. We know the end of the year is hard, but we have to keep moving forward. This is our last shot. Please, choose whatever option you can today to help us hit our critical $37,000 daily fundraising goal every before December 31st. Thanks for hearing us out, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead. If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win. Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mIRw_vRceJPn7IqfDQPJlQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbV2CP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIyNiZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZYMZsIplwHEqiVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mIRw_vRceJPn7IqfDQPJlQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbV2CP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIyNiZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZYMZsIplwHEqiVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305

subject: Sign: Call for a grand jury to investigate Trump for coercing 2020 election officials in Michigan
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Add your name: Call for a grand jury to investigate Trump for coercing 2020 election officials in Michigan >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7f886f5-d3d6-4943-a5d6-25cb8aa45177/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T37b36ec9-f37e-4272-a142-373e3850827d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | A recording of a phone call Trump made to Michigan election officials in 2020 has surfaced, revealing exactly what he said while urging them not to certify the election results from Detroit. Trump demanded the two election officials reject the actual results, insisting, "We can't let these people take our country away from us." [**These new revelations add to Trump's pattern of improperly and illegally pressuring state officials after the 2020 election, and trying to overturn the results and subvert our democracy. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4db379bb-31e2-4298-9877-1b14f55cdd66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We need Trump to be held accountable for all of his crimes. This phone call must be investigated, and if there is sufficient evidence, he needs to be charged. Trump is an ongoing threat to our democracy. [**Add your name: Call for a grand jury to investigate Trump for coercing 2020 election officials in Michigan >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb3ebc3c1-2ab8-42aa-96d3-6943bd1d600d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Help me train the next generation of leaders…
body:
Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4bc2a617bbbe49258b17af7833c4337a&_e=wHCbH25BGtbdrWhWx6fsOgcefIgPBLsKclSZZdr6c4JzIRm5_qo9F0JjYEeiHP6hb79Bf_PZs0eu1qJM9KogsWNNpyW3AbiovbkolCh6jgiNS2Jjcr5k8qDaG_P6ZAdGDiTiWeoCj9oG3ziysmyvKPUUUmIPR38bpCj0L4JqTTL0dYs58vF5xVbVvxgURZqaKzgZj3biE0TPAoEXQnPwR1sVHj3l0tXwwME9ASF5dAwAXAfx-oqj9WNKcnXDBPu7Hp_aLZ15aE0P8S3x1gFVgn6-1ufZR0mbXb8ONXpDReV_EQfa3F8YF4YY1lKTs6ZoZFzfHjGlCdHXx8lzwkt1Gf6ZlMbvnn_JN6A0A-tJYuU%3D)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4bc2a617bbbe49258b17af7833c4337a&_e=wHCbH25BGtbdrWhWx6fsOgcefIgPBLsKclSZZdr6c4JzIRm5_qo9F0JjYEeiHP6hb79Bf_PZs0eu1qJM9KogsWNNpyW3AbiovbkolCh6jgiNS2Jjcr5k8qDaG_P6ZAdGDiTiWeoCj9oG3ziysmyvKPUUUmIPR38bpCj0L4JqTTL0dYs58vF5xVbVvxgURZqaKzgZj3biE0TPAoEXQnPwR9_6zHJ0PjmoPcBQyUwJQ0Y0wWx4HtNAPlPCrZdldQT7IOD6YzmdwMO5I6gtVXLyPF7eeRnGQg10KZhetMvil9z65h6evj1VRBJJuzPpXJyeB6P8PXa6xxcf98DhI92e0MTPrHUEYzkviwqs67sW5_Y%3D)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4bc2a617bbbe49258b17af7833c4337a&_e=wHCbH25BGtbdrWhWx6fsOgcefIgPBLsKclSZZdr6c4JzIRm5_qo9F0JjYEeiHP6hb79Bf_PZs0eu1qJM9KogsWNNpyW3AbiovbkolCh6jgiNS2Jjcr5k8qDaG_P6ZAdGDiTiWeoCj9oG3ziysmyvKPUUUmIPR38bpCj0L4JqTTL0dYs58vF5xVbVvxgURZqaKzgZj3biE0TPAoEXQnPwRyE5I_VeJByMKPU5eOrVA2MiODEgPdYfoREPiaPH-Ap6Kt8InKCKbuFaqEGHUG5XaGayS1pH4S978oOUPb7BXOrQ5nJD_DpwKfoMmoLN_GtR5URhVAzZs-31I-_BPvAvD_ZhODBSprh0Pp3grZhhHsw%3D)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:
* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4bc2a617bbbe49258b17af7833c4337a&_e=wHCbH25BGtbdrWhWx6fsOgcefIgPBLsKclSZZdr6c4JzIRm5_qo9F0JjYEeiHP6hb79Bf_PZs0eu1qJM9KogsWNNpyW3AbiovbkolCh6jgiNS2Jjcr5k8qDaG_P6ZAdGDiTiWeoCj9oG3ziysmyvKPUUUmIPR38bpCj0L4JqTTL0dYs58vF5xVbVvxgURZqaKzgZj3biE0TPAoEXQnPwR49yLaydAzr6uRY_e01-pC0gv2Or_LSfE1yhGjdUD0ie3Co8EoVFwnbHXh5SC5tn9WLJe3RhfgPnSD8K3SWMt9u5xFlQ-WmLiddJlljnm9XIAyOqCgW0JgnTBCjb99aSAExWI3YX3mvHjeE2Gl4D3Fo%3D)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Reclaiming American Freedom

I think you may be interested in seeing it. Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate. Best wishes, Riley Gaines P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you: From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org> Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM Subject: Did you see my announcement? Dear Friend, I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center. I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women. The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms. When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things. For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them. To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you. The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through: Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths. A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country. A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action. Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America. Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come. Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country. Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fabc11d84e734ccba0406fb26451ffa9&_e=LoXEoAhy-mGCSKhpdlElh8ItkO_Y4FioAvUfz7NsT3n5ha44YjmZdoYzoYlOheg4CrL_n5oIEW4w2H85YkA7qnQt20caJGOhZi-QA6vd6qf-yltmHZxUu5-k7l7HiOIUNMieL1B1ILhUEDORPFLuwnX4EgrIUShACz3TUPWg21zoDGmQC0UsnZ8B--ceqCC7ln8IK79vvnfF69ixKEsGnRTBXlePTTeuv5oScI5nTXlam6TrUENI7R1n60ucMDBbWHE65_EajkF3965kAGDYSyJA-9eXLJibqt-VvA3UceDtAD10aukMMaJ7xkacWbgAhR0jVFRNGd6gh76RBKW_Z68hDccrpViaB4gypZ5R2-ZQOIMFJSbHCi-3KwtEfEFRKXAovynXvTb1RTkqI8HusN7ayed4VvvET94cfljZG70%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fabc11d84e734ccba0406fb26451ffa9&_e=LoXEoAhy-mGCSKhpdlElh8ItkO_Y4FioAvUfz7NsT3n5ha44YjmZdoYzoYlOheg4CrL_n5oIEW4w2H85YkA7qnQt20caJGOhZi-QA6vd6qf-yltmHZxUu5-k7l7HiOIUNMieL1B1ILhUEDORPFLuwnX4EgrIUShACz3TUPWg21zoDGmQC0UsnZ8B--ceqCC7ln8IK79vvnfF69ixKEsGnRTBXlePTTeuv5oScI5nTXlam6TrUENI7R1n60ucMDBbpMFooBs4pju88SZAka5lYw4-bWQh6hCP9IhvHRaN00vj6ZccpRVV8ux_R8Wadw_HB6aFNcsha0gGrq2VaC3ONSQHRQzYMiyELYuNuBEjVCvuPghS1U_fijOUw8UQplHi_fUVEGvhe7Z7NVwPpg6yaVY5hHpl1Y7BPR4Vne3fnUo%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fabc11d84e734ccba0406fb26451ffa9&_e=LoXEoAhy-mGCSKhpdlElh8ItkO_Y4FioAvUfz7NsT3n5ha44YjmZdoYzoYlOheg4CrL_n5oIEW4w2H85YkA7qnQt20caJGOhZi-QA6vd6qf-yltmHZxUu5-k7l7HiOIUNMieL1B1ILhUEDORPFLuwnX4EgrIUShACz3TUPWg21zoDGmQC0UsnZ8B--ceqCC7ln8IK79vvnfF69ixKEsGnRTBXlePTTeuv5oScI5nTXlam6TrUENI7R1n60ucMDBbV30IRtePJl05LfkMB15HlAnPdlFiPPQRUJNuelmHuPkNmbV6mAlhkvC9-snobE9tvCGODvDoDEmyF5dZiHZ7_89IDrCBa7RK4A9yjIkfQj0ToOzJzXJ7STvKgjOlehZxIkkmmHAwo24tekTmic-5S2Qe7lsxaR0bLmyho3PI41k%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Help me train the next generation of leaders…
body:
Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e95a4bfb840b400c96d8885f256ecc2b&_e=B5vbgFv-n2V7AXDyKhXKSP7d22yj8-6-tRpzshyE5pXe35rz6sDSC2KXPlIMRgxemR-Vko3Sz6__1oiNhdlwXoNbX2QH3KobM1vPsLyAAKOdRnMMWvHpg0MizBUqQEuk06Iz4XN5Jsq48RFSdCgB_rDvE8v0DG7U4AAnAfbOs0KC0NXY6H4KI5ERYED2yQk8m00VgtxqKTGHjjyQ9oxLrl3-DOXMrzW-W2aatUUXh2eAfQ4bfFLPe8DA3muhlbAMKxaDjICG94KoP4t_Hmx7-mODKG9naWIdMDD55hl6XRIEYG8krzlo1cwXfonBnwnAA5I_MoHS8Cb2D4_ur-xgaPTsLPQgM47f9pJx_H6j69Q%3D)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e95a4bfb840b400c96d8885f256ecc2b&_e=B5vbgFv-n2V7AXDyKhXKSP7d22yj8-6-tRpzshyE5pXe35rz6sDSC2KXPlIMRgxemR-Vko3Sz6__1oiNhdlwXoNbX2QH3KobM1vPsLyAAKOdRnMMWvHpg0MizBUqQEuk06Iz4XN5Jsq48RFSdCgB_rDvE8v0DG7U4AAnAfbOs0KC0NXY6H4KI5ERYED2yQk8m00VgtxqKTGHjjyQ9oxLrqjyHg5oikqZtJCQoHwcxKyowZFhA9qBkFMjl48vXIem4ojkCk1hUZzjghCKGItqF7Nlf3-CgXBkEx4_H-bG3liZZzdGE2BhlmQ8brsiq-gE01SZQWiSmm-4LuSvdt-nCAiYw3Va-MHcn068WzAWxAI%3D)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e95a4bfb840b400c96d8885f256ecc2b&_e=B5vbgFv-n2V7AXDyKhXKSP7d22yj8-6-tRpzshyE5pXe35rz6sDSC2KXPlIMRgxemR-Vko3Sz6__1oiNhdlwXoNbX2QH3KobM1vPsLyAAKOdRnMMWvHpg0MizBUqQEuk06Iz4XN5Jsq48RFSdCgB_rDvE8v0DG7U4AAnAfbOs0KC0NXY6H4KI5ERYED2yQk8m00VgtxqKTGHjjyQ9oxLrjppTRa8EoDbf4jZPelz_LoqlL5QWJNqprzVWLmGEbNtJlz1FIkNa9MgPknRGu5Y6Y-KUXeESOPX1ZIt0IlOdZdnv4beTGV8uCC5R4Y_l_TSVkL7NzssHgMciM6k5qoelGQNMklrGHNads7ngwEz17E%3D)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:
* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e95a4bfb840b400c96d8885f256ecc2b&_e=B5vbgFv-n2V7AXDyKhXKSP7d22yj8-6-tRpzshyE5pXe35rz6sDSC2KXPlIMRgxemR-Vko3Sz6__1oiNhdlwXoNbX2QH3KobM1vPsLyAAKOdRnMMWvHpg0MizBUqQEuk06Iz4XN5Jsq48RFSdCgB_rDvE8v0DG7U4AAnAfbOs0KC0NXY6H4KI5ERYED2yQk8m00VgtxqKTGHjjyQ9oxLrn_e_peMiNmkW3PQOqwqb9BWVW5jiYdrnYiWGH02MfV86WIzciY0swPI0YsthlCieI1lphR6s7CBCHGh_LFyGRl641Gd3gNtzFPXQrbwdvwQz2J8NVjpCSy-44da5PRfB1a2xz8-lZECLM7Y9SiPgc4%3D)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Thank you!
body:
I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0htobj4tr6f7ra4uet5j6c21ltun0roovdgu9uo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cdg66ob4c3h2bs)
---

Friend,

I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support.

Traveling the country, hearing your stories, and feeling the momentum swell up on the ground is incredible. We have a country to save and it's clear people like you are ready to help me win this race and right this ship.
**
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt5e4b7lf3955768kvp8mahirbm8fqno1a69rpc0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cdg66ob4c3h2bs)
---

_Together, we've achieved incredible things:_
* Hosted more than 180 town halls across the country, bringing our message directly to the people.
* Soared to second place in New Hampshire, Iowa, and South Carolina!
* Soared to second place in national polls, showing our momentum is undeniable.
* Launched our initial ad buy across Iowa and New Hampshire.
* Earned the endorsement of New Hampshire Governor Chris Sununu, adding to our growing list of supporters.

Our grassroots movement is surging, and with your continued support, our momentum will be unstoppable as we head into **the crucial Iowa caucuses in just three weeks, and the New Hampshire primary just 8 days after that.**

_But there is still much to do._ We need to keep hunkering down, outworking our opponents, and building the unstoppable momentum to get us one step closer to victory.

**[Would you consider joining our team with a ONE-TIME donation of $10 or more? Your support will help us reach more voters, spread our message, and build the momentum we need to win.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcgeovhh2koq92a9ulc3nmblgqr2eqtbgqgr40vg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cdg66ob4c3h2bs "Would you consider joining our team with a ONE-TIME donation of $10 or more? Your support will help us reach more voters, spread our message, and build the momentum we need to win.")**

---
My very best,

---

---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zffr0mqhfprpfi4ehnjfkdvojcdifmmce10rvpug_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cdg66ob4c3h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

subject: Join me in praying for Israel
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW42A-liNS

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW42A-liNS

Hello,

My heart
is grieved by the recent violence and suffering in Israel. I hope
you'll stand with me in support of God's people in these dark
times.

As
Christians, we know that what's happening in Israel is not a
human struggle; it is a spiritual struggle against the forces of
darkness.

God has
promised that His chosen people will endure forever. The Bible
assures us that the enemies of Israel will not succeed. And when
Jesus Christ returns, believe that Israel will receive the
blessings God promised.

How are
we as Christians to live in the light of these events? One small
step would be to join me in signing the pledge to pray for
Israel. When you do, you will not only commit to joining
thousands across the world in prayer that Israel can defeat evil,
but as a thank you and personal reminder of your support, I would
like to send you an Israel prayer bracelet (while supplies last.)

You can
join me in prayer by visiting this link:
https://resources.ptv.org/israel-pledge

Thank you
for committing to praying for Israel.
Sharing
the Truth of God's Word,
Dr.
Robert Jeffress

Friend,

I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support.

Traveling the country, hearing your stories, and feeling the momentum swell up on the ground is incredible. We have a country to save and it's clear people like you are ready to help me win this race and right this ship.

_Together, we've achieved incredible things:_
* Hosted more than 180 town halls across the country, bringing our message directly to the people.
* Soared to second place in New Hampshire, Iowa, and South Carolina!
* Soared to second place in national polls, showing our momentum is undeniable.
* Launched our initial ad buy across Iowa and New Hampshire.
* Earned the endorsement of New Hampshire Governor Chris Sununu, adding to our growing list of supporters.

Our grassroots movement is surging, and with your continued support, our momentum will be unstoppable as we head into **the crucial Iowa caucuses in just three weeks, and the New Hampshire primary just 8 days after that.**

_But there is still much to do._ We need to keep hunkering down, outworking our opponents, and building the unstoppable momentum to get us one step closer to victory.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=23bff2fa15024f38b376834f3a5e56db&_e=-ol0f2cjH2zGYuN1YKKQgBISp2T-LfKdbhv-hv29cGVWw0kx_XZ8XT02BIDg6WB8iHitJLdTRwjej-iNmjBuUcP-dN_N0i12Qtc1JeDRZTwHfG3agouH3HQu5hoZPsnRZu0QHuVsqQ5faPXFq4Zvb6e-o_qdehxn7QMOFfrdSHTbH5VkkL2vd4jRHp1Wyhtivf7BSzM3rqFIfPeNAQmPuQrjuwF3tnDPR_rQb6c5p46l2hX3U4fvncJl4Ag4gw1MoPUHpj7uxkaLB90JmHGvkZFn2Uy3Jxxv9in4xbh4PMfpeOHZ-tI50z10i-gPxVAjTL9LkrVfAVRDQU5KYp1zEKxTHloWoHYqLdvn2XNUIg4OA8xoDy2YQa6KiBsTazt9qg-JcndKQxh6JUrt-NZIpX5q7dLbABnX6zQnz6HWSqPXjf0Qoq8cMiibupbZV_eiTBr4-wFRmTN9mGsnoNjZLXDozeeUfT9sshfPe206T6Qy_PxFPUgERHgywfEx_n1fQuNQsNZrWrCOPGQdOp_wYeupCSkpGjFchR0kG0091ibH4ckRFVrhvXYNLfGu9dbrqVW1AjkfPkP8hNGYLqTa3Qfss8oK-8SkwUPYWImG3xQsavG1WBdqolFCFMC3nV9X "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: | | | | | | Friend, I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support. Traveling the country, hearing your stories, and feeling the momentum swell up on the ground is incredible. We have a country to save and it's clear people like you are ready to help me win this race and right this ship. | Together, we've achieved incredible things: Hosted more than 180 town halls across the country, bringing our message directly to the people. Soared to second place in New Hampshire, Iowa, and South Carolina! Soared to second place in national polls, showing our momentum is undeniable. Launched our initial ad buy across Iowa and New Hampshire. Earned the endorsement of New Hampshire Governor Chris Sununu, adding to our growing list of supporters. Our grassroots movement is surging, and with your continued support, our momentum will be unstoppable as we head into the crucial Iowa caucuses in just three weeks, and the New Hampshire primary just 8 days after that. But there is still much to do. We need to keep hunkering down, outworking our opponents, and building the unstoppable momentum to get us one step closer to victory. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03b14cbdce3b460ca0179c2399b23ffe&_e=dBi0FGDe7OwxRC3XJXja188Pv1U-lClAVqA6bEzstuDhBWJugvEcukupZR48Xbo5J7T2wouuXg72bbjQdIN0qrnnDzv7C2C-o4pjbjNFWFE-IMZXn9Sywj0vNwd_f68YkLlNsyS88Qa4MXNz9opvmI8KvTEUbQXA2KxOAhM483nnyNfngMmycIFmaspFx7Z9W9rFPr7rFKHIMNI9raX_rQ-xhJyP0rqCqmB73QTQGGfQtNHAVabaghNkneLORJp5RP2M2PjV-oVQtY04O41ueDqLEoroeM3H7NaPuNHBlh3Nel4T9RoGY8ls0i8cNOe6d2R46klNkZP78XWsrYsTtBzp7bUqNq6_BwHIeDUUGTrmV7TadtQxj96fa9rg7OsEXQFRhe3ROxK9obaKT0TBa7uAvBPhRDM1EekgDgJd_Iw%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03b14cbdce3b460ca0179c2399b23ffe&_e=dBi0FGDe7OwxRC3XJXja188Pv1U-lClAVqA6bEzstuDhBWJugvEcukupZR48Xbo5J7T2wouuXg72bbjQdIN0qrnnDzv7C2C-o4pjbjNFWFE-IMZXn9Sywj0vNwd_f68YkLlNsyS88Qa4MXNz9opvmI8KvTEUbQXA2KxOAhM483nnyNfngMmycIFmaspFx7Z9W9rFPr7rFKHIMNI9raX_rQ-xhJyP0rqCqmB73QTQGGfQtNHAVabaghNkneLORJp5lc7UbKGDsT1NVOAzd98nUz2dD3WorPw8Vai-J0ODIbUq_s8tT0V8ZVOpb1tJJTJkGGo4lVd2x7qcfPEdExSO9qp6X5-MFE3J8WhKk3nzVisbgiZJ85DjggGfR1_TE-N3-AwDpgqoYpiP7I_PwRzzq7qEjblBPHEo1L2aDfhS8dk%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03b14cbdce3b460ca0179c2399b23ffe&_e=dBi0FGDe7OwxRC3XJXja188Pv1U-lClAVqA6bEzstuDhBWJugvEcukupZR48Xbo5J7T2wouuXg72bbjQdIN0qrnnDzv7C2C-o4pjbjNFWFE-IMZXn9Sywj0vNwd_f68YkLlNsyS88Qa4MXNz9opvmI8KvTEUbQXA2KxOAhM483nnyNfngMmycIFmaspFx7Z9W9rFPr7rFKHIMNI9raX_rQ-xhJyP0rqCqmB73QTQGGfQtNHAVabaghNkneLORJp5roZkT5m9U2zIx3We28UWjqknEf1d0mKef89NE9YDDvjsTtRAnKri3lJ4KpJ3QmjwvVa23fDA2szRkgwBEHuS-cXw4MSJE3W5mf7bhWPiVtGuUhxJV-MB6f_GQ88k__N0oQKr1mKUDxaEVB6xtFRC5muYZ4TA0T7PY5Ej5CCeTzw%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59962e9011a74168aa8d888c51e6beed&_e=Ajof1CJloMQ8qghTH_bITPYnndsb-eLIEFiH7L9vAzvw88JZskIjmhZHT3RjWgAOa5USVXykaFI3-xp4brhqF7zfrTo33A5a6ZlQ2pxR1EcXSuEinqftR4gcG9oT9Tutv3v6AlftgmzCVSLX4YdVuIZ39y5irWn8lErPJhpTlAWH2pmTqPqT0EAiZCRfHldmNe5H9N-eCf3f065PP5Cq61tcTcSU_iGqb6x_YeV92GfLT_2QWsqLCj7kEKfpYiI3j1SnnyEr7FDiPLOy_lqkgZ3YNkuL7Clk143KmFgyafZpVsOn-FmNGYSOCus9BvhT) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59962e9011a74168aa8d888c51e6beed&_e=Ajof1CJloMQ8qghTH_bITPYnndsb-eLIEFiH7L9vAzvw88JZskIjmhZHT3RjWgAOa5USVXykaFI3-xp4brhqF7zfrTo33A5a6ZlQ2pxR1EcXSuEinqftR4gcG9oT9Tutv3v6AlftgmzCVSLX4YdVuDaAzM0TrVKlnVlu2KjmfobYVCPP7jtj1ZsBO4JBpAyOFoz8vJ5WfPZgA2QxSDg7zEEQ8zr12AmpNTw854wAazMnLLPD7fSGr_th8dZf-uEmsPPH1RmnETnG6FBmefWKwlLwYaoqGKZNSTxUsY67oVo5zJbRAAXFdcYlTkSIafE_) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59962e9011a74168aa8d888c51e6beed&_e=Ajof1CJloMQ8qghTH_bITPYnndsb-eLIEFiH7L9vAzvw88JZskIjmhZHT3RjWgAOa5USVXykaFI3-xp4brhqF7zfrTo33A5a6ZlQ2pxR1EcXSuEinqftR4gcG9oT9Tutv3v6AlftgmzCVSLX4YdVuO5u7KoUgEB451Dghfk0FCgDwQUJcR6eU3JQRv_DSQwNXQSoRWvL8sMPtsCW2PU_2P7dwz8E1xzJCKDDRaT3RJVdgcCwuSoQtWx8s9g1dzFa_-28KAQcArUyCHhwBniG_LH9eKapxEaaaHoUxXZ-QSf3jl7LwtXNgMMqCuYxR3Mt). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59962e9011a74168aa8d888c51e6beed&_e=Ajof1CJloMQ8qghTH_bITPYnndsb-eLIEFiH7L9vAzvw88JZskIjmhZHT3RjWgAOa5USVXykaFI3-xp4brhqF7zfrTo33A5a6ZlQ2pxR1EcXSuEinqftR4gcG9oT9Tutv3v6AlftgmzCVSLX4YdVuBdftKLROJuzcePSfQOf7X2eJYCoX87h5mt1VbA0P11hlU2Pasfjs_OUZtpGoTNVzhFnKYRTAWYeY4hPyv00EWebUa-ahTA8S-hFfCRY3AjmFJstWyq_q91vU2YztRYHyMLrhXQEwbC4omUt1r2yng1KQhTi7dzS2lrO9cPx-Tt4)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Help me train the next generation of leaders…
body:
Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0ac48cff3254a658ee4992277885b32&_e=Fcy4NJgd3yIJxIJ6WZiVLgalg_cNNxFCb7uYysnLi0YWM2Szi-Albs0xCaenRKX8QBAqpp1pIN2CZE_9-DULSdl16CZehvFxoVUMrUdVjwzUoyD6FisYW7P3AnxksgBzEyWX56i6ZTfFEBSzZmqZrUFDJHmJeO-9MKBFE2TE3r2-mA-06tWsXUSA45Ri9_qAZUtRwouVA4qHiPa1JEH_kGw6VOYRj3h-ZQzY4SigpJ_8E-HR8_shqGujFeqb4Ne3NLlG8vdz7n6YeKRjh_mzIKmxhP9j4UmLtkV2ymstfUD4fAmSzcbmsDDM3E_Fw1o6nRjVFUMI1GBPTWjsEstRgsDY8CG6UegL3I0nK-gnLN4%3D)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0ac48cff3254a658ee4992277885b32&_e=Fcy4NJgd3yIJxIJ6WZiVLgalg_cNNxFCb7uYysnLi0YWM2Szi-Albs0xCaenRKX8QBAqpp1pIN2CZE_9-DULSdl16CZehvFxoVUMrUdVjwzUoyD6FisYW7P3AnxksgBzEyWX56i6ZTfFEBSzZmqZrUFDJHmJeO-9MKBFE2TE3r2-mA-06tWsXUSA45Ri9_qAZUtRwouVA4qHiPa1JEH_kIhnr2yflRCgdp0GKfEGC19PtT4LeisYB4LvIbbMoMCHDQ0mBDJjsma5aPrgwSrg_eSOrD0RktdGHcUQDrywsM5SwSg6-PrEE-19NaHzPyj105Dn_lHkymnAgV1gNP9nJNN8Ehm-eJ7MHnlCl1VC0W4%3D)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0ac48cff3254a658ee4992277885b32&_e=Fcy4NJgd3yIJxIJ6WZiVLgalg_cNNxFCb7uYysnLi0YWM2Szi-Albs0xCaenRKX8QBAqpp1pIN2CZE_9-DULSdl16CZehvFxoVUMrUdVjwzUoyD6FisYW7P3AnxksgBzEyWX56i6ZTfFEBSzZmqZrUFDJHmJeO-9MKBFE2TE3r2-mA-06tWsXUSA45Ri9_qAZUtRwouVA4qHiPa1JEH_kMhImhSf-47FrlIlKAh6O8iANv1FR7HMVvyOjxe7SsYYAk0oSw2gnNCi9CvZHPAsrjbzLhpe2OXpSHQ70une0uuzDPQpOQ9ne7N2-lY2iOuNVHZuh7V6Oi3E11lhttCgaPuGeljmzhnRTj3bZQuSs4Y%3D)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:
* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0ac48cff3254a658ee4992277885b32&_e=Fcy4NJgd3yIJxIJ6WZiVLgalg_cNNxFCb7uYysnLi0YWM2Szi-Albs0xCaenRKX8QBAqpp1pIN2CZE_9-DULSdl16CZehvFxoVUMrUdVjwzUoyD6FisYW7P3AnxksgBzEyWX56i6ZTfFEBSzZmqZrUFDJHmJeO-9MKBFE2TE3r2-mA-06tWsXUSA45Ri9_qAZUtRwouVA4qHiPa1JEH_kOWe-gOcLkDSbvaesG5luO08sxrRKlbm29SYyH5TceYHxPOCyOF3DdFO95pjZVJD1C0aql-WY5M0JdO-iiy8vVVPW5suuwZXIi7pnx557kzihJBkBEqjAmmiS4LP0mjbeT8Bw6EujA3xODQks2Mx5Ps%3D)**

Riley Gaines

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99cdd034b0d846ab81b650e4eb0abcd9&_e=TVjHLVZjtwKwMsXc37UBmQdG6VJxfMjs27Ie1XVUAVRMhbDIHiX1f6KyobCZFXE9Q-W1K8N-AJVQ9-Ucq96Tb1nyDec4cig7ec65JJsLPYU746enAc3Mig_XXiF6eNB85yI6LH8MK-I1YVBgkz8WVK9QYJRyyfv57iKh7-8OJNqhhAFEUPv_uIt8HOGH0y2_V1H0y2rpuVCKLezOO6lAnI3xO1BAAivO5C4z7wT_okSrbXXYtz3tLuH505CASHxKwGq-87w2YzIqgi3e8NPS96Ypaig5XLyqeFypn_imAPKLIMqKvjr-Oj7sFl4kcARyhEfa8FvzemLQDzSC3tIr0kyqPE6TB7sBtCZGYFzcda2PadpFbOxOKDwg1PcGgj3PL8q2jOza9KEpifyoVVHfFbN5zkwtiGtfBpz3nykakw4%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99cdd034b0d846ab81b650e4eb0abcd9&_e=TVjHLVZjtwKwMsXc37UBmQdG6VJxfMjs27Ie1XVUAVRMhbDIHiX1f6KyobCZFXE9Q-W1K8N-AJVQ9-Ucq96Tb1nyDec4cig7ec65JJsLPYU746enAc3Mig_XXiF6eNB85yI6LH8MK-I1YVBgkz8WVK9QYJRyyfv57iKh7-8OJNqhhAFEUPv_uIt8HOGH0y2_V1H0y2rpuVCKLezOO6lAnI3xO1BAAivO5C4z7wT_okSrbXXYtz3tLuH505CASHxKNCnV9BT47ZvdaoLxDBV3QGVY16WCryAj6cRcCw-SLMQCRe-Rd0LroQyg-JYyyWhhUg3mlmkXWkgnGNuMxR0_-n-QH03ghZysoLQHZDMJSYtfO60qW7Il7EIhkPOTD2PVrmY5WQmXu8YGM2F6g8G9SUFJR2LkkxbLVSlIGxCYOV8%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99cdd034b0d846ab81b650e4eb0abcd9&_e=TVjHLVZjtwKwMsXc37UBmQdG6VJxfMjs27Ie1XVUAVRMhbDIHiX1f6KyobCZFXE9Q-W1K8N-AJVQ9-Ucq96Tb1nyDec4cig7ec65JJsLPYU746enAc3Mig_XXiF6eNB85yI6LH8MK-I1YVBgkz8WVK9QYJRyyfv57iKh7-8OJNqhhAFEUPv_uIt8HOGH0y2_V1H0y2rpuVCKLezOO6lAnI3xO1BAAivO5C4z7wT_okSrbXXYtz3tLuH505CASHxKmzh5wfUaySl-ojwTT4ZTaL10Q7ef5lfr2P7E0eROES35A8ipDi82Zyur8KrrfTWJ4dSHdFFluxA6J_8bEGBxKCJIZh-eW8SjLLBLZFtePIhQn9zzibIcUEHMC8Q3hak7oCnSZ5y_UCpuLwXhETYLg9BPL-7HyvlDEWkSn3SxTTs%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

The dream of home ownership is slipping away for too many Americans.

|
---
| | | **The dream of home ownership is slipping away for too many Americans.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_ownership_1r_2nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
The dream of home ownership is slipping away for too many Americans.
Consider...
* American homeownership is _**declining at the highest rate**_ since the great depression.
* We lost more than 1 million homeowners in 2021 — **_more than in the housing crash of 2008_** — and then another million in 2022.
* The median home price has risen from $**_250,000 in 2019 to $400,000 in 2023_**.

Home ownership is now out of reach for all but the very rich.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_ownership_1r_2nd&n=2)
For younger Americans, home ownership is a luxury of a bygone era...and rent is the new normal.
Millions now face corporate landlords who will raise rent to the highest level the market will bear–squeezing them of jobs and opportunities.
None of this is inevitable.
As President, RFK Jr. will enact a series of policies to put home ownership back within the reach of working families.
_**RFK Jr.’s biggest plan is to implement tax-free 3% government-backed mortgage bonds, to bring the mortgage interest rate back to 2019 levels and even lower.**_
And RFK Jr.’s plan consists of financing that will come from investors, making the cost to taxpayers minimal. This measure alone will reduce monthly costs for the average home purchase by $1,000.
This innovative change will restore home ownership to tens of millions of Americans, and lower costs for tens of millions more.
[DONATE NOW >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_ownership_1r_2nd&n=3)
This simple, yet significant law, will reinvigorate our economy and give hope to hundreds of thousands of young Americans who represent our future.
[Please consider a gift today to help meet our critical end of year $6 Million fundraising goal to put us on the ballot.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_ownership_1r_2nd&n=4)
The maximum amount you can give is $6,600 – $3,300 for the primary and $3,300 for the general. I know that is a lot of money. **But all gifts to our campaign are critical–from $1 to $100.** [I would be grateful to you for your sacrifice.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_ownership_1r_2nd&n=5)
Sincerely,
Team Kennedy
[TeamKennedy.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_ownership_1r_2nd&n=6)

name: Kash Patel
subject: Subpoena list for Congress to expose the Deep State
body:
If Congress is serious about tackling the weaponization of government, then here is the subpoena list I recommend.

_Friend, Congress must subpoena these people and documents if they are to expose the weaponization of government. It 's the only way to save our Republic and defend the rule of law in our country. Please read carefully._

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8dfffba438ef44449ebe1b89aada7a13&_e=drxU2xvWOvY7eZLje0CQD_gLGLJBnWxhnVnUBTkMJFgw8Esd3-oXcPhS_36pUUJm0h9lYLEWQvbw6bb5m7bZuvDMo4oUfV5lw5sNsGejlaaRo82azdzNOGDcYfMVUwIpkZNP7Yxg_4q0ew_tMApMzp2lYRF0D0gWHkOAWb9yU7F7rmdnQHbGC0JbqfEnkLRB_wH6_6kmXgKTOmkVnGOteBmfcT5SVoQ7JLb5sUbILSZ5Ig4hxsDxSSaVy7_fJUpl)

Hello Friend,

The deep state has entrenched itself in every major federal institution. I call them government gangsters because they use their power as leverage against Americans to unlawfully influence elections.

If Congress is serious about tackling the weaponization of government, then here is the subpoena list I recommend.

_You may ask yourself, "What credibility does this guy have?!"_

Good question.

I led the Russia Gate investigation for the House Intelligence Committee in Congress. When Devin Nunes asked me to run the investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, good or bad, had to be published- he said yes, and we did just that.

My investigation discovered it was a fraud, and the DOJ/FBI investigation was unlawful. They did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump and thought they would never get caught.

And only after leaving government service 2 years ago did I discover the FBI was spying on me while I served as Senior Counsel on the committee exposing DOJ/FBI illegal acts before the FISA Court to unlawfully surveil President Trump and his campaign. Yes, they subpoenaed my records to get dirt on Devin Nunes because our investigation was exposing FBI/DOJ corruption.

**After my service with President Trump, I founded the Kash Foundation.** The Kash Foundation's goal is to provide financial assistance to veterans, America-first patriots, and whistle-blowers and fund education programs. As you may know, the Russiagate tactic of the radical left is to baselessly prosecute patriots.

**I am urgently asking for your help. I am looking to raise $100,000 online this month to secure critical funding for Kash Foundation.**
[Can you please donate $250, $50, $35, or even $10 today? Click here to donate >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8dfffba438ef44449ebe1b89aada7a13&_e=drxU2xvWOvY7eZLje0CQD_gLGLJBnWxhnVnUBTkMJFgw8Esd3-oXcPhS_36pUUJm0h9lYLEWQvbw6bb5m7bZuvDMo4oUfV5lw5sNsGejlaZ_y4VmBycfyh_TbHgZHK46Dx4HVF3hQXtcsRwBMrLeugC5jvmtCa3D2TTp9V4A79zR3AvkmsVyGrddmRCqw-4732drtwFGo98t2A7sXhPj9qWMlWlV9Oo7JVr1D2kr97QVgiwCGxnxgxbsR5iiL2dA)

[Donate >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8dfffba438ef44449ebe1b89aada7a13&_e=drxU2xvWOvY7eZLje0CQD_gLGLJBnWxhnVnUBTkMJFgw8Esd3-oXcPhS_36pUUJm0h9lYLEWQvbw6bb5m7bZuvDMo4oUfV5lw5sNsGejlaY9CKy65yksppFatmK0TcNLvnevgBmeCZE3vdxJxSaR8p1YUDgEJ92deF9n6dn-DJril6wUxE2F1oWwf66b8gb2pCV8RISiHfb1G0HzcbfN-VkD2YjABe1KN1OHb0sHr3cvVK3bXO2-dIbU4UD3K9wn)

Congressional Subpoena List
1. **Twitter:** Every contract with FBI/DOJ on election projects (the FBI established an 80-agent task force that met with Twitter weekly before the 2022 election).

2. **FBI and Chris Wray:** He has willingly violated a congressional subpoena and must be brought up on contempt of Congress charges.

3. **James Baker:** Former FBI number 1 lawyer who signed off on the unlawful Trump FISA, caught and fired. Later, the Number 2 lawyer at Twitter was also fired.

4. **ALL 51 Intel officials who signed bogus Hunter Biden** laptop letter

5. **Blinken:** He has now lied about his involvement in said letter and must be held to account. Lying to Congress is a federal crime.

6. **Garland:** The IRS whistleblower has submitted a valid claim that the Hunter Biden investigation is being politically obstructed. Garland testified under oath that it had not happened. Someone's lying.

This is exactly who Congress needs to go after. And guess what? This is only a start!

If you are as concerned about deep state interference, if it is a top priority for you, then please I urge you to support the Kash Foundation.

[I'm counting on you to sustain the Kash Foundation's fight against the deep state. Please consider donating $250, $50, or even just $10 to help defeat the deep state and expose the government gangsters running the show. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6d5c70490dd42859a8555df5b3bf26b&_e=SGW9urEbCx_KSlehbJaQjgV7GdFWZ7nh-zq5lam7SaItPfD47XB0HWC7rSMFOvhCoN8O5-_zP0_78fZegukk1uCleCUW8GW6MZ9IPBmUnQ9iHYGlp2yyMJUlrTDB-wjS_AVw5-BTHTw4Kc08pyiI5oF7ZdZuIX7qwqfs48yEcMygLmLXQ92dpAJZqEp7UEegh1wIysRcJ_N6JTB8WHRUWwoGY9foR2VLfBKCYnpYApsZWB7cfignZfYaN1-yEXOYQJtslDFomFCuFNSLi1dO67rpPxtlBo2h0VfJetubAmJm1HcjRUoW4DxMrgqk-VJdKwQyj_2W4KQgxqKbY8UFDwSM1wNLkmF7ab4pVf5H1NLbtaYxzNq_dZcUk6bhIOi2F1sKbbYopQGBwDd6Fx_X1zSI2Cace5HP3j2zT_RU66g%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6d5c70490dd42859a8555df5b3bf26b&_e=SGW9urEbCx_KSlehbJaQjgV7GdFWZ7nh-zq5lam7SaItPfD47XB0HWC7rSMFOvhCoN8O5-_zP0_78fZegukk1uCleCUW8GW6MZ9IPBmUnQ9iHYGlp2yyMJUlrTDB-wjS_AVw5-BTHTw4Kc08pyiI5oF7ZdZuIX7qwqfs48yEcMygLmLXQ92dpAJZqEp7UEegh1wIysRcJ_N6JTB8WHRUWwoGY9foR2VLfBKCYnpYApsZWB7cfignZfYaN1-yEXOYQJtslDFomFCuFNSLi1dO65M60O3n51L_V0pqH2YnruRrvt8JlW1kJ2fMVNG4Zy8pCuKumdoNOqtwZbWT0s3lkNOGm9BYg6v5UI-2tqKWJhL21uF1sgbudH0bhnZ_b4PklfjcbJS8g3nNt4G-7VsFVUtr3jHvOIe5iWpfXYxX_mc%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6d5c70490dd42859a8555df5b3bf26b&_e=SGW9urEbCx_KSlehbJaQjgV7GdFWZ7nh-zq5lam7SaItPfD47XB0HWC7rSMFOvhCoN8O5-_zP0_78fZegukk1uCleCUW8GW6MZ9IPBmUnQ9iHYGlp2yyMJUlrTDB-wjS_AVw5-BTHTw4Kc08pyiI5oF7ZdZuIX7qwqfs48yEcMygLmLXQ92dpAJZqEp7UEegh1wIysRcJ_N6JTB8WHRUWwoGY9foR2VLfBKCYnpYApsZWB7cfignZfYaN1-yEXOYQJtslDFomFCuFNSLi1dO675VELxJuybDoFz2Jcen03z1nHqnc5hrYx4gteUSinbrj4cUCRU6llVWIUCJz1FsmBQBlYFvMimKQDhAZ1YxBvFTxuv3EDdGVlr2kA_jEs3TxpGy3NfYFiTu75tADdAppmfdcZwBmJMV6RzBjwjrS6E%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6d5c70490dd42859a8555df5b3bf26b&_e=SGW9urEbCx_KSlehbJaQjgV7GdFWZ7nh-zq5lam7SaItPfD47XB0HWC7rSMFOvhCoN8O5-_zP0_78fZegukk1uCleCUW8GW6MZ9IPBmUnQ9iHYGlp2yyMJUlrTDB-wjS_AVw5-BTHTw4Kc08pyiI5oF7ZdZuIX7qwqfs48yEcMygLmLXQ92dpAJZqEp7UEegh1wIysRcJ_N6JTB8WHRUWwoGY9foR2VLfBKCYnpYApsZWB7cfignZfYaN1-yEXOYQJtslDFomFCuFNSLi1dO6x4hQGsv9VN9W_A29n_WE9qbQnjsje-jAjvTdx52WWTv7BRsUcJX7aF_YFoI49Arlt7ziTaJ7ZvAJz7XM0NB9RNbWxUu-EcGwP6pdCO8qMDc__zUkogChAtwdEMaUl05QQC7misp26mx-CPtPIEMZF4%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

---
