name: Riley Gaines
subject: Help me train the next generation of leaders…
body:
Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ea837cf469242e5808d28f0d7f032e1&_e=rDZpI-7bccR0Lp-Lz04sIAGSaDrUTseVNn1a01IBO715UH8HMtnbD-s7jYxHg4cT7QkmoL5qwUvCGxb5A6KST0Ao2qgqE1bMbST015u2oRsmnRJvrgomFGLZU7XTowqEqWhkS2RTKDTu0m1rjNdH6wwIcfPNneA_YmcxUT0CTvFGvBo5bHW10BWMFOWaglsNzOqxz9kLwYVW5tzB3g5NNurx6Q9XYGhQF8J4DvH5wtshAzLgNmUyNQvOsuw18QiRisk7fS-69KMnTy5igMtrtvW-ewVw5-qS24x-0GX6RwnM-DGEWCEKnQQztQMMcBMZJml4EEXzJ7KbgjfmUcOLIdIe0UieN6s5ZXF9JLajey4%3D)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ea837cf469242e5808d28f0d7f032e1&_e=rDZpI-7bccR0Lp-Lz04sIAGSaDrUTseVNn1a01IBO715UH8HMtnbD-s7jYxHg4cT7QkmoL5qwUvCGxb5A6KST0Ao2qgqE1bMbST015u2oRsmnRJvrgomFGLZU7XTowqEqWhkS2RTKDTu0m1rjNdH6wwIcfPNneA_YmcxUT0CTvFGvBo5bHW10BWMFOWaglsNzOqxz9kLwYVW5tzB3g5NNsydDREnMAHouTZJNEpvIiRQL5pPHFacq50VeD62CJKvaKlqLAovaCmOzUDfLTvHyPgs9tRZQ3Y8tLuHoU8UF9LW4bC8ma9LmV5pn6CwIpP2Kap5fbTMh34pT7IoGsfIL-1GdcQGUEFnz276wD8OHzc%3D)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ea837cf469242e5808d28f0d7f032e1&_e=rDZpI-7bccR0Lp-Lz04sIAGSaDrUTseVNn1a01IBO715UH8HMtnbD-s7jYxHg4cT7QkmoL5qwUvCGxb5A6KST0Ao2qgqE1bMbST015u2oRsmnRJvrgomFGLZU7XTowqEqWhkS2RTKDTu0m1rjNdH6wwIcfPNneA_YmcxUT0CTvFGvBo5bHW10BWMFOWaglsNzOqxz9kLwYVW5tzB3g5NNmxZPcqPLGRVwF1xoLQvIu8dHseravuvrunlDrS4ez_bzxXtJ-zn2I94-Rcf20IEHo3V7JwEgtzaJTt09asXo2HjXzIdLSye_IXXm_XtCxdaCEH_DFVdofF8hd1Ceem9OHsbLm75f13qVcT8RAfD40M%3D)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:
* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ea837cf469242e5808d28f0d7f032e1&_e=rDZpI-7bccR0Lp-Lz04sIAGSaDrUTseVNn1a01IBO715UH8HMtnbD-s7jYxHg4cT7QkmoL5qwUvCGxb5A6KST0Ao2qgqE1bMbST015u2oRsmnRJvrgomFGLZU7XTowqEqWhkS2RTKDTu0m1rjNdH6wwIcfPNneA_YmcxUT0CTvFGvBo5bHW10BWMFOWaglsNzOqxz9kLwYVW5tzB3g5NNsJQQmmsL9DDVnSa17xiHh-l2RMqhRV21iTIlm9fIHbgxBRQsKObiB2SeWdDORkG-M8GOinx-QACNXAyJUxcU65oeTUDs0h8W0Kb2Ojt9Y_dBL1dIfWXdqsNvbJ1mTQS0AIi9_gKYvxgjZ6zm_E1x2k%3D)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

Freedom Nation Today

name: Team Kennedy
subject: American Dream: Out of Reach?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
The dream of home ownership is slipping away for too many Americans.

|
---
| | | **The dream of home ownership is slipping away for too many Americans.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_ownership_1r_1d&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
The dream of home ownership is slipping away for too many Americans.
Consider...
* American homeownership is _**declining at the highest rate**_ since the great depression.
* We lost more than 1 million homeowners in 2021 — **_more than in the housing crash of 2008_** — and then another million in 2022.
* The median home price has risen from $**_250,000 in 2019 to $400,000 in 2023_**.

Home ownership is now out of reach for all but the very rich.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_ownership_1r_1d&n=2)
For younger Americans, home ownership is a luxury of a bygone era...and rent is the new normal.
Millions now face corporate landlords who will raise rent to the highest level the market will bear–squeezing them of jobs and opportunities.
None of this is inevitable.
As President, RFK Jr. will enact a series of policies to put home ownership back within the reach of working families.
_**RFK Jr.’s biggest plan is to implement tax-free 3% government-backed mortgage bonds, to bring the mortgage interest rate back to 2019 levels and even lower.**_
And RFK Jr.’s plan consists of financing that will come from investors, making the cost to taxpayers minimal. This measure alone will reduce monthly costs for the average home purchase by $1,000.
This innovative change will restore home ownership to tens of millions of Americans, and lower costs for tens of millions more.
[DONATE NOW >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_ownership_1r_1d&n=3)
This simple, yet significant law, will reinvigorate our economy and give hope to hundreds of thousands of young Americans who represent our future.
[Please consider a gift today to help meet our critical end of year $6 Million fundraising goal to put us on the ballot.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_ownership_1r_1d&n=4)
The maximum amount you can give is $6,600 – $3,300 for the primary and $3,300 for the general. I know that is a lot of money. **But all gifts to our campaign are critical–from $1 to $100.** [I would be grateful to you for your sacrifice.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_ownership_1r_1d&n=5)
Sincerely,
Team Kennedy
[TeamKennedy.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_ownership_1r_1d&n=6)

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YkbPgQa7Ieul_JgBGnH1sA~~/AARclAA~)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YkbPgQa7Ieul_JgBGnH1sA~~/AARclAA~)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YkbPgQa7Ieul_JgBGnH1sA~~/AARclAA~)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/CTKcGXRLwDK4wx7GDYSVVw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbYeyP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmWDedmKZcmPJzZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ECiuxjmDbtOyRu2FbgYE_Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbYeyP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplg3nZimXJjyc2UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

subject: A personal note about my son-in-law
body:
Trump endorsed Brandon Gill
| | | [ ](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0d8911a14a134cdeb6339a06b39575b1&_e=5likiOOse8Su7oxPiixazDT5_12_UA6wPu55YgIf7uD_D7vZh3IoXFvbWEDgM289Qts39T1Q1LPWDPp_Ya9DLmu_GoqMrft6dkZmLHWb6MkbFN_nrea9LVOphmtJwZ46-_U_Gwbl7YrJiWsB8uPUFqivCj2CIYc742eAo4Yo_jYa5uq79JieLyHCXShBSKO6AMO06eE_sjI5RuXfSDQ2KXEtobUt35Agx7Es26E9RiZUSKer-nW16QICb3zgbrhigI2DunQrqCEBPaykF7jaMwgbAz4w446g008c-jbys5_4oPm8lGI0Knz9651z0sK9)
---
Fellow American, I'm writing to you today to share some exciting family news.
**My son-in-law, Brandon Gill , has announced his candidacy for Congress in Texas' 26th district. **
As we both know, I've been documenting the downward spiral of America at the hands of the Deep State and their allies in Washington for decades.
I have personally faced the wrath of the Left as my punishment for exposing the sinister Marxist plots that have taken over our government and institutions.
Despite this, my resolve has never been stronger. **And right now, it's that sort of unwavering drive America needs from our leaders on Capitol Hill.** **Leaders like my son-in-law Brandon Gill.** I got to know Brandon as he courted my daughter and joined my family, and I can tell you with 100% certainty that he shares my unwavering determination to save this country from the evil forces that wish to see it descend into tyranny. _**That 's why President Trump himself has given Brandon his full endorsement.**_ It is for these reasons that I know the Deep State and their Leftist allies are going to stop at nothing to defeat him in his 2024 election. **My son-in-law Brandon poses an existential threat to the Deep State, and because of that, he urgently needs support from grassroots patriots to combat their efforts to stop him.** **[Will you stand with me, Brandon, and my family today by chipping in $10, $25 -- or whatever you can afford?](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0d8911a14a134cdeb6339a06b39575b1&_e=5likiOOse8Su7oxPiixazDT5_12_UA6wPu55YgIf7uD_D7vZh3IoXFvbWEDgM289Qts39T1Q1LPWDPp_Ya9DLmu_GoqMrft6dkZmLHWb6MkbFN_nrea9LVOphmtJwZ46-_U_Gwbl7YrJiWsB8uPUFqivCj2CIYc742eAo4Yo_jbntVWCL7_q6TGjGiFL5JPl3gtxguLnOHFqNkhJWwN4WAtJ-0qGJ0EFy0MzDjPFjxUm-zbg6Nv7E9ONIDIFxxUxlvL_9EPkWA1tLDYWwqWuJgqxyV1Tvmpaj5VLmP2gPrZN0VJxROigMVG890CL47oT)**
| [ **Support Brandon Gill, Donate NOW >>** ](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0d8911a14a134cdeb6339a06b39575b1&_e=5likiOOse8Su7oxPiixazDT5_12_UA6wPu55YgIf7uD_D7vZh3IoXFvbWEDgM289Qts39T1Q1LPWDPp_Ya9DLmu_GoqMrft6dkZmLHWb6MkbFN_nrea9LVOphmtJwZ46-_U_Gwbl7YrJiWsB8uPUFqivCj2CIYc742eAo4Yo_jZtcyJAUeccuCZk7NtrCzu7Y8kdgexT16TmToPSMi9Z2dnWOX6rd-uHxF1A6hjNc3VR-0f1L6In4povKFvGEOfZ6waXmA_awmNIWC7v4G4U3lalmIsF1yXU1D0t4qdzDgrr_Gr-AmBmqTiPJ0ryDvcG)
---
Fellow American, I would love to tell you America is better than it was just a few years ago...
...And I'd be lying if I didn't admit that I'm worried about where we are headed. **But it gives me so much hope knowing there are MAGA champions like my son-in-law Brandon who not only refuse to give up on our country, but are eager to fight for the American people no matter the cost.** And it's up to patriots like us to rally behind him to ensure he can fight in Congress to put America First. **[So please, join me and my family in supporting Brandon by giving a generous contribution of any amount today.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0d8911a14a134cdeb6339a06b39575b1&_e=5likiOOse8Su7oxPiixazDT5_12_UA6wPu55YgIf7uD_D7vZh3IoXFvbWEDgM289Qts39T1Q1LPWDPp_Ya9DLmu_GoqMrft6dkZmLHWb6MkbFN_nrea9LVOphmtJwZ46-_U_Gwbl7YrJiWsB8uPUFqivCj2CIYc742eAo4Yo_jZVSMt-OLnUqSvI1-Aqfwg50QCe2JWS9Zgv-yBpbnN7F8V29vHPsr1UVWd-0fxIBVBjkPZ-41BfWKm-9hAkoXdHCjrqIgbhSLZX2i3rqCa66WOiFdGXSMohQcGaTrzm6YS7LnFqQpV7Hw_20RvzdKT6)** In Liberty,
**Dinesh D 'Souza** [__](UnsubscribeLINK) _D'Souza Media LLC, 6700 Woodlands Pkwy Ste 230, The Woodlands, TX 77382, United States_ _This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails [CLICK HERE](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_s=0d8911a14a134cdeb6339a06b39575b1&_t=_xvg2NRFpe96ISIIUOVKYAxs9mqW542hOgwj5xV28E0bTCsE0lAj1_xYq_XC3wfBLJBBy8vSNZ_R9id6Lu9pRgWFro9IqhGUS_N5vYyXI8c%3D) _ ****

name: Dean Team
subject: Wishing You a Joyful Kwanzaa Celebration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean 24
body:
https://www.dean24.com/ [https://www.dean24.com/]
Hi Friend,
In the spirit of unity, community, and cultural diversity, I wish you a joyous Kwanzaa! Our warmest and festive greetings to you and your loved ones!
May the seven principles of Kwanzaa – Umoja (Unity), Kujichagulia (Self-Determination), Ujima (Collective Work and Responsibility), Ujamaa (Cooperative Economics), Nia (Purpose), Kuumba (Creativity), and Imani (Faith) – inspire and guide you throughout this meaningful celebration.
May the glow of the Kinara bring light to your home and the richness of Kwanzaa traditions fill your hearts with warmth and togetherness. Here’s to a future where light will guide us to drive positive change together. A future where the purpose is clear, creativity abounds, and faith in our shared journey propels us toward progress.
Wishing you and your family a Happy Kwanzaa!
Dean Team

To make matters worse, Biden has a ring of blind followers in Congress ready to back up his failing agenda without a second thought. I see this disaster unfolding right in the center of my own community. Congresswoman Jahana Hayes is wrapped around Biden’s finger, voting with him 99% of the time. Her record shows her priorities don’t lie with the interests of Connecticut's fifth district. The only loyalty she’s proven to have is to Biden and his band of Liberal elites. Last year, I went up against Hayes in one of the most competitive races in the country. She barely passed me by less than 2,000 votes to win re-election. You would think that an incumbent congresswoman would win her district with flying colors, but her track record shows a clear disconnect with everyday Americans. I’m tired of seeing Americans get blindsided by the Democratic party and the elitist Liberal donors that control the party like puppets. I made my choice to face Jahana Hayes once again in 2024. I’m more prepared than ever to defend everyday Americans and re-instill trust in the government that we will do right by the American people. I can’t stand by and watch this madness unfold any longer. Americans need a voice in government that they can trust, and I’m running to be just that. Jahana Hayes is scared of everything I stand for. She knows I almost pushed her out of office last year, and the stakes are even higher this time around. Big Liberal donors are flooding money into her campaign to shut me down for good. I’m not backing down, but I need your help to keep this campaign running strong. https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=15c6a58cc275b5c7e64e12b345ea84d6f4ce2bed3c42ee3a11f5f61bc14da30fcb34bfa32f7e029a4c5293fa08029c18b3196840f711417e Will you pledge to endorse my campaign with a small donation? subject: ☕Coffee w/ the Chairman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Connecting the NEGOP to the voters of Nebraska | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12670822?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=784d457e83&e=25844e23a8)
---
| |
#### Good Morning Republicans,

I started my first newsletter comparing a commonality that many have to the routines and components of a day, such as drinking coffee. As I write this email on Christmas night, fireplace down to embers, hot apple cider in my cup with a white Christmas throughout Nebraska, I can imagine the MANY common things done by Nebraskans today. Traditions. Specific locations or meals or times or games that we make memories of, not only for kids and the excitement of Santa Claus and gifts, but hopefully to truly reflect on the birth OF Christmas, our Savior coming to bring the virtues of Hope, Joy, Peace and most of all Love to His people. We must also pause and give consideration to those that this will be the first Christmas with a drastic life change. A loved one lost. A soldier family member overseas. A job loss. A separation or divorce. Sickness or injuries.

_"Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest. Take my yoke upon you and learn from me, for I am gentle and humble in heart, and you will find rest for your souls."_
**\--Matthew 11:28-30**

Virtues. Tradition. Commonalities. Weary and burdened. Rest for your souls. Somewhere in all of this is the Good Life of Nebraska. It really is a good life filled with opportunities in Nebraska. However, something just feels off over these last 3-4 years. Many people aren't as happy. Many people have sadness and feel lost that sometimes boils over to emotions like frustration and anger. The challenge is we naturally apply _subjective truths_ _(truth that is based off of perspective, feelings, or opinions)_ as to WHAT and WHY we think things have gone astray. Contrary, **OBJECTIVE truths** (measured and calculated truth devoid of emotion) take communication and a genuine desire (filled with empathy and sympathy towards others) to seek solutions. Empathy and sympathy have to come from the heart and soul of the leaders in Nebraska, but where do we determine or ascertain the right path for solutions? And without communication, discussion, debate, discourse, even with disagreement...then what we are seeing is a disconnect.

The disconnect happens when people don't feel heard or even like they are given an opportunity to be heard. As the rift grows wider and different philosophies begin to be emboldened as to their solutions, what gets lost in the middle is the vast majority of Nebraskans. The majority of Nebraskans are Blue Collar, White Collar, Plaid Collar, Scrub Collar, No Collar, Seniors, Young Adults, Ethnic Groups, Families...and they just want the opportunity to live the Good Life without pause.

But taxes NEED reformed, so Nebraskans must pause.
But education systems NEED transparency, so Nebraskans must pause.
But elections NEED accountability and verification, so Nebraskans must pause.
But mental health and crime NEED resources, so Nebraskans must pause.
But Constitutional Rights NEED defended, so Nebraskans must pause.

So we pause our desired life of church, family, work and set our minds to solutions to bring reform, transparency, accountability, verification, resources, and defense to even more local concerns like our jobs, and our agriculture, and drug trafficking, open boarders, sex trafficking, energy reliability/independence, inflation of food, gas, clothing, house, supplies...it's...just not good.

The idea of a Good Life...seems a lot harder than it used to be. I believe this is the case for most Nebraskans.

This is first and foremost why we need Jesus centered in our hearts and mind.

We need Good News FIRST, to see Joy and Hope and Peace and Love in the Good Life. Second, we need to further His principles within our communities. As last weeks newsletter focused on being an Unapologetic Christian, not filled with fear or timidness, but BURSTING with boldness and determination. Third, as Republicans we must further our principles within OUR communities. We must be Unapologetic Republicans. This means we need to be WAY more purposeful, articulate, expressive, vocal in EVERY avenue we can on WHAT it means to be Republican. Iron WILL sharpen Iron, if its repeated over and over again.

Moving into 2024, the leaders of this party will be tasked to speak boldly in newspapers, and radio, and mailings, and social media of OUR Republican principles. We will connect with Nebraskans to develop and create a CLEAR picture as to the Values of the Republican Party of Nebraska. My first goal is drafting several Op-Eds in newspapers and connecting to the local communities the vision for 2024. There are still some conservative newspapers and traditional news media sources out there and we will saturate the content with the Good Values of the Republican Platform. Please see below my first Op-Ed going out in 2024.

The Biblical truth shall set us free.

Blessings,
---
|
---
| –Chairman Underwood
---
| | 2024 NEGOP VISION

In 2024, the Republican Party of Nebraska is going ALL-IN on the VALUES of Education, ALL-IN on Election Accountability and Voter Verification, ALL-IN on Tax Reform, ALL-IN on Protecting Human Rights. This will come to fruition in our Legislative Plan and through the voices of the people who will expect the very most from their elected representatives. The groundwork has been completed and in 2024 it will all come down to a choice by EVERY Republican. The choice is to remove oneself from the party politics and personalities normally associated with power and money AND engage at the doorstep of Nebraskans sharing the truth of our values because our values bring the solutions to local struggles of taxes, community safety, election security, & educational excellence. The Values of the Republican Party resonate with Nebraskans. We are reaching out and connecting in 2024 and this will be a victory for Conservative Principles. 2024 is a victory we can all share in. Americans are thirsting for people of courage, people of honesty and truth...they are hungry for leaders to say what they are going to do...AND...then DO what they say! I am beyond measure proud of the Republican grassroots and coalitions. They are creating stability within this organization. Every false narrative sowing chaos is an attempt by those who seek their power back. The Republicans who prioritize our principles are actively fulfilling the objectives of the party by doing maintenance of the government of, by, and for the people AND furthering their principles within the community. And this effort will continue to grow and grow as more principled Republicans join the efforts. I see this growth and stability EVERYWHERE in Nebraska now. Dixon County, Seward County, Gage County, York County, Sarpy County, Saline County, Madison, Keith, Hall, and on and on...and the growth and stability is coming FROM the people. From leaders of the party, who CHOOSE to grow and build their counties because the people matter and connecting people to our values matters. Common Nebraskans, who say enough is enough...who choose to sacrifice their time to become better every day and engage more volunteers to make more engagement opportunities. From County Chairs and Secretaries, committeemen and women, elected officials to candidates, they SEE the reality of what strong, healthy County Parties can do. These next 3-4 months there will be a purposeful and respectful focus of engagement to demographics and people who share conservative values. We are going ALL-IN on local campaigns and local elected positions such as school boards, city council, county seats, NRD's, power boards. We are going ALL-IN on people of Nebraska who make Nebraska the ‘Good Life’. –Chairman Underwood
---

From County Chairs and Secretaries, committeemen and women, elected officials to candidates, they SEE the reality of what strong, healthy County Parties can do. These next 3-4 months there will be a purposeful and respectful focus of engagement to demographics and people who share conservative values. We are going ALL-IN on local campaigns and local elected positions such as school boards, city council, county seats, NRD's, power boards. We are going ALL-IN on people of Nebraska who make Nebraska the ‘Good Life’. –Chairman Underwood | "Donate" | | County & Candidate Spotlight | {"County & Candidate Spotlight" is an informational component of this newsletter ONLY in an effort to expand Republican relationships to our membership. "C&CS" is not a paid advertisement. "C&CS" is not an indication of financial support to any officers, governing bodies, or entities of the NEGOP. Any county's endorsement of candidates at any time are NOT subsequent endorsements by the governing bodies of the NEGOP. The order of content is based on first come and attempted to maintain chronological order to the upcoming week's events.} | | | | | Weather Update - Lincoln | | Weather Update - Grand Island | | Weather Update - Scottsbluff | | | "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY" | | Copyright © 2023 Nebraska Republican Party, All rights reserved.

name: Joe Biden
subject: As someone who has supported this campaign over the last several months, can I count on you to make a $3 investment today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I promise a donation made right now will help us build a winning campaign to fight back against MAGA extremists -- I mean that. I really do. | | |
---
Folks -- I’m personally asking you to chip in $3 to my reelection campaign. But first, if you’re ready to make your first donation, you can use this secure link to chip in now: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-bfp-december-2023**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZnCojhadU-b1ix1YpHL0vbGADzeqRKxqJ41wJ6X41MfH6lm-9sqvBWhlUCQoVG9JRYuTR64_w5oki5qLbX8qExiU5ulwzQgAwuYXVEEnBjNg1ewMy5C8FdAqepx8U49RPsqsCC6xk2179KWUZ34KouCdPdkuyJJFuXFLP4WZ3CPfOYGR0WyfvHCsrBcDPKN9Rt1rmBkzSuJtLbrtE-djRft5DAE71QXSy5ZDgwhhmqL2cH_jy12p4Jxqgm233sw4r9GMBsFDeNSyPnfaOrRH20TF8R0i2Xod96L0PUVn_oUrzrcjak2BRSTb2a4Pb7xslWAafeVLIgAHYeLol8Cmm2Y3ZyLwukrb6tgAe5JPf6fIEoUYk9Fy2laoAksPL_0kVXJU_rkl-PWt3y7SjwrN-dpvLo43tte0WeyUB18XEH6DtPYYdPhmjOSDULIkoUuL6XHMR19I2TTMoMkJ4nUsQWc8gb22k1dzMByrfJlaYodCF_Dz7eMDlQuWEN5wc2UThJAvf3SPagv2aeiOTM2r3s5Q093r7NjMGyiteQQIBj7sXCnZrLhpC_oBKI7KY-c5lxBTXjKQDd0HzUyQeRIHy9wYX-tJY_Mz81xpRtN4-7If8455QVizsBMg-g6gMVufhdLveKSMtQbBnOCKMhT3_s_ViZ5jOu8SxDkN-Jyy9FUmk2sOLJGTwgATK80eVmj_zAu_C0odqwEGnk4I2VEGAI9yzZSI5IxOoz4WbqsPsKF3BlyNT5Xb_Az6o7DWeXVDsEsTUmct-5kO9rBFn6Ij2SLIllfCqzGbsIPcp6fsDySKsHpH70pPUs82sCwkBxPbpQfWLNBteevR0zWPDgjRWnr5NcaVL0J9FR9lhTmxRqYYXuVFUmLS5xlpyfbQDM1rBAtm-8fYCUiMEo8_UhZEYzeQDkqk_GO9GOON2AzAyNugO8NyfxU3B7sl9yHB5o9xJ58qW6LmGU8iXargLEpqi07FAGlg00IpopbNKmKj83fZUehgcddYaIEFMowEKmGgRg_FMFrdVw4-9ahml0fvtahh6g3Wr9GtGWu28Bi451q-CqxYiKHhCaWMAIJZJNaB0iQUQCfvpgrgyTaPcmWgcrc3GJPNO7cniJPBvQyEl_N37_rUXhdj2FrGmapX5it6wa9B71F-kmwKoyqzJRSjT5qaop36GABcFWl5a8W-2Tz6GObMWj3AzGgSbfVFFGELm4MAEJpMcaCelFDkruXH2oL_qrhvh0zxxNafVEw7oJxccq0M2Xjph17igiRuUcvFAk--HUgInAetjLOAr9wCSog/42g/eVX0I9P8THyjpMaaUT8uVA/h0/zpNPAqpDEhIZ0wltGGi5PYKzyh9ZnXtnDMnZFWX59yE) In 2020, we ran to restore the soul of this nation, rebuild the middle class, and unite the country. And it is because of every member of this grassroots team who has stepped up to support Kamala and me over the last few years that we have accomplished all of that and more. But listen, Peter: Recently, Donald Trump was using rhetoric that echoes the hatred heard in Germany in the 1930s. He compared his political opponents to “vermin.” Between him and the rest of the Republican presidential candidates, one thing is certain: MAGA extremists are trying to eliminate our basic freedoms. [**So, I’m asking you to donate $3. Because the stakes couldn’t be higher.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZnCojhadU-b1ix1YpHL0vbGADzeqRKxqJ41wJ6X41MfH6lm-9sqvBWhlUCQoVG9JRYuTR64_w5oki5qLbX8qExiU5ulwzQgAwuYXVEEnBjNhWDTbcqy3iu7AWAPgEyf4BJqqV0_ivrjrANTcwjJ637Vt6ymaPHMM_TE5VbYTprf13f3zSe50BAOdzN1OLAAscGn8rwNOK4jgorqwNwr-IKmvRXlTnLPtSu_lDFEjLFo2BrE2rUo2tiv5XOjtHQfLD56VNPmRe7D9QaJQopouBcoZQAgrVkYFhGPdVEplzxjYo0pI1dWO-qC4GWt4T32_aGirxUQ7uip3Y3QRKR5ufIPeliPoVoaq0QtEGZSY-Ym4D8jRVcsvDiBdbyj9B__R8EWUM7ZyPMzJSA8s0sgUwL7dqoaeLhq9vdYqal4pOHGunOmjqNdIbaPVl7x-N9LbcriezU0dbEJsJR9i2rqZfiOyWfLfS6bvZsOgPM0honBOIklpdoZCicJBpK4VW5aJ5Q8AnXS_CJPJEpgPU9H071bNM8ou2WfBsTskOSekiSsPXmGHn-yN_fdMEDYQpdLZNmtO28WsoKvjJMvWtDGp331tm5xJJEaVi14BHc9R_3FFW5YHyBrm95oAWu7bBF8ThsNI41jHB8tXJT087hV9bfKE0v9A59nPZ3_isavmVwD7YV2Ix7-UXHaOe4Se-cKtYB4xV9JXXLat-kSoBDYpnh8voMIiCqavEwlwTw2K8LanDRFrIhjbbDgDp67Nqz1BeCpZx-ts2VXqy00OGs1Wd39dk7HtkF3Zoc2x0Zo40R7c6099f58GJoydH3QdG-rkYmCcJP_zSbtH8M_B-ChooydJ1HcrY8jgjpq6Tc9wAgxC06LsoeDO6yVlYzPkjZ-6-pzGyhTJ3PhVW5W7A4Ald1853RmNvbxD4xc1Uy4UMA3bfkTRULz1dgMhJjpYjeeCe0IVWs97utnnA1Zw9YDGgGgDCAsmMUkTUlPuNzHwfMyE7RPf56WvtGCXKbDtGCvzSFErqje2l2ll0bW2b0LyBSFpmKGf5m4_NfgphOxqG0DrLvpxMArKpDlCJP5qLRLxSeStFfUZIWnkNVQaVe_o8KPsN77pS4G8az29-b4WEikCl_4gYynUAUrMgMMga8Lu-Pp6aIrcTGQW8tnq6EKGA4kjm-2oNbXErgCFCV0K21FeYJ2xfac1HFn83ksAq-Ada8OskMNe4csHVCwcr81VTvLElSjjBC18VzLPmSirevXm-GKbQRG7K1j7k8-g_rwSmMSexlUht-Tqz7xwwtKkt-A/42g/eVX0I9P8THyjpMaaUT8uVA/h1/aWI_PtN6WZ7S8RMOw7vewK2emc9L1vICnORHTpPPYZg) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: I promise a donation made right now will help us build a winning campaign to fight back against MAGA extremists -- I mean that. I really do. | | | Folks -- I’m personally asking you to chip in $3 to my reelection campaign. But first, if you’re ready to make your first donation, you can use this secure link to chip in now: In 2020, we ran to restore the soul of this nation, rebuild the middle class, and unite the country. And it is because of every member of this grassroots team who has stepped up to support Kamala and me over the last few years that we have accomplished all of that and more. But listen, Peter: Recently, Donald Trump was using rhetoric that echoes the hatred heard in Germany in the 1930s. He compared his political opponents to “vermin.” Between him and the rest of the Republican presidential candidates, one thing is certain: MAGA extremists are trying to eliminate our basic freedoms. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | I don’t like asking for money, but I can promise a $3 donation made right now will help us build a winning campaign against MAGA extremists -- I mean that, Peter. I really do. $3 to help our campaign push back against the dangerous rhetoric coming from Trump. $3 to fight back against the millions and millions of dollars MAGA extremists are spending to attack us. $3 to protect the basic freedoms that are at stake in this election. Thank you for being on this team. We can’t win without you. Joe Joe Biden President of the United States

name: Senate Majority Update
subject: Kirsten just made a huge announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
stop another red wave in New York
| | |

**Look, the path to defending our Senate majority and retaking the House runs directly through New York.**
In 2022, the New York GOP celebrated their best election cycle in decades. They flipped enough battleground seats that Republicans were able to take control of the House. And they even came within mere _single digits_ of winning the governorship.
**Now, they're trying to build on their wins to expand their House majority, defeat Kirsten Gillibrand and retake the Senate in 2024!**
**Another red wave in New York would be a DISASTER for Democrats.** But if we build a strong grassroots war chest right now, we can defend Kirsten's seat AND retake the House right here in New York.
**That's why Kirsten has set a major $100,000 end-of-quarter goal — her final goal before the election year begins![_Please, will you rush a donation right now to stop another red wave in New York and defend Kirsten's must-win seat? This is our last chance to make sure that we can start 2024 in a strong position, so Kirsten is counting on you to step up now._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75822496/445841514/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4642-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjhjZmIzZS1mYmEzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xmSBCfUv4L1zsjKaQawndVWeXLnkAyvPr0nJ9uo2FqU=)**

name: Christian
subject: Just $70 or $51
body:
Dear Peter,

We have only 70 days until Primary Election Day, and only 51 days until Early Voting Begins.

It's crunch time! And I need your help!

I'm trying something out of the box. I'm not asking you to send me a large check - of course, you're welcome to send one.

**_I want as many patriots, conservatives, and voters like you who demand change, conservative solutions, and honest leadership to send me $70 or $51 TODAY!_**

**[](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/q4_deadline)**

I am $6,410 short of my year-end of fundraising goal. This is the target I need to meet to make sure we stay on target for the rest of our campaign for the primary.

**Please make a contribution of $70 or $51 TODAY!**

_I 'm Christian Castelli. I'm not a career politician breaking my term limit pledge to seek my next opportunity. I'm not a lobbyist representing the Big Insurance agenda. I'm a retired Lieutenant Colonel in the U.S. Army, decorated combat veteran, Green Beret, and senior advisor at the Pentagon. _

I have [trained for difficult situations](https://castellifornc.com/about/) my entire adult life. I've been tested on the battlefield. I am _**prepared and ready**_ for the challenges facing America today.

As the next congressman for the 6th Congressional District of North Carolina, I promise to be the conservative leader with experience and skills to make America safer, more prosperous, representing you.

**We are just $6,410 short of our fundraising goal. With just 70 days until Primary Election Day and 51 days until Early Voting begins, please make a donation of $70 or $51 TODAY!**

**[](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/q4_deadline)**

Let's eliminate Bidenomics and inflation. Let's close and secure the border. Let's defend freedom at home and abroad.

Let's send a Green Beret to Congress, not a career politician or lobbyist!

_****_

Christian Castelli
Lieutenant Colonel (Retired)
U.S. Army Special Forces
Republican Candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives
(336) 810-8100

This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** from **colonel@castellifornc.com**.
If you do not wish to receive further messages from us, [ please click here to unsubscribe](https://emailtracking-cm.aristotle.com/frmEmailUnsubscribe.aspx?databaseId=b33a3810-9cbf-4584-a3d2-01672886537a&activityID=563ba4ca-9b2d-4369-81b6-89a4114df062).

name: Jim Gaughran
subject: Looking Ahead
body:
https://jimgaughran.com/ [https://jimgaughran.com/]
Dear Peter,
From my family to yours, I sincerely hope you’ve enjoyed wonderful holiday celebrations this year.
As I write this, I’m thinking about the year behind us and the one yet to come. We’ve seen our economy begin to gain strength, with unemployment low and inflation receding . But we’ve also seen historic intransigence and petty fighting from the House Republicans, who have passed fewer laws than any modern Congress.
I’m encouraged that life is improving for many, but we can’t let Nick LaLota and the extremist cabal that now runs the House ruin our progress. And that means we need to elect principled Democrats with strong records of accomplishment to keep us on track.
I hope you consider me one of those Democrats. And if you do, I would greatly appreciate a donation before our filing deadline on New Years Eve.
I’m asking you Peter: please send a donation to my campaign for Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jim-gaughran-for-congress-1]
Thank you,
Jim Gaughran
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

Gaughran for Congress
P.O. BOX 20574
HUNTINGTON STATION, NY 11746
United States

clean_body: [] Dear Peter, From my family to yours, I sincerely hope you’ve enjoyed wonderful holiday celebrations this year. As I write this, I’m thinking about the year behind us and the one yet to come. We’ve seen our economy begin to gain strength, with unemployment low and inflation receding . But we’ve also seen historic intransigence and petty fighting from the House Republicans, who have passed fewer laws than any modern Congress. I’m encouraged that life is improving for many, but we can’t let Nick LaLota and the extremist cabal that now runs the House ruin our progress. And that means we need to elect principled Democrats with strong records of accomplishment to keep us on track. I hope you consider me one of those Democrats. And if you do, I would greatly appreciate a donation before our filing deadline on New Years Eve. I’m asking you Peter: please send a donation to my campaign for Congress. [] Thank you, Jim Gaughran [] [] [] [] Gaughran for Congress P.O. BOX 20574 HUNTINGTON STATION, NY 11746 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

subject: A View From The Campaign Trail - Holiday Edition! 🎄
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
Season's greetings, everyone! As you enjoy precious moments with family and embrace the festive spirit, let's hit the highlights from this past week!

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

I hope this message finds you surrounded by the love of family and the joy of the Christmas season. May your homes be filled with the warmth of Christ's love, laughter, and shared moments.

As we celebrate the season of reflection and gratitude, I want to share some highlights from the past week—a time marked not only by Christmas festivities but also by meaningful events that brought our community closer together.

Let's dive in!

** IN THE NEWS: Officials say no action on pipeline without completed study, legislative review (https://www.ibj.com/articles/holcomb-legislative-leaders-promise-to-hold-off-action-on-pipeline?utm_source=breaking-news&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=2023-12-19&utm_id=45616547&fbclid=IwAR02vmnfhjM9GEflOKc4v7wkvZyOQb6nIYTbAYAYOKptSXKaVUtNlOL2xsI&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------
The decision announced last week to delay the unpopular water pipeline initiative until we have a comprehensive Indiana water study is a belated step in the right direction.

I applaud the local officials who stood up for Hoosiers on this issue.
ARTICLE (https://www.ibj.com/articles/holcomb-legislative-leaders-promise-to-hold-off-action-on-pipeline?utm_source=breaking-news&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=2023-12-19&utm_id=45616547&fbclid=IwAR02vmnfhjM9GEflOKc4v7wkvZyOQb6nIYTbAYAYOKptSXKaVUtNlOL2xsI&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** IN THE NEWS: Gubernatorial candidate Suzanne Crouch wants to stand out in the crowd (https://www.ibj.com/articles/gubernatorial-candidate-suzanne-crouch-wants-to-stand-out-in-the-crowd?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------
As we navigate the dynamic landscape of this race, my commitment to setting myself apart goes beyond appearances. My extensive qualifications, rooted in nearly 30 years of public service, uniquely position me to lead Indiana into a new chapter.

>From my early days as a county auditor to serving as lieutenant governor, I have dedicated my career to making a positive impact on the lives of Hoosiers.
https://www.ibj.com/articles/gubernatorial-candidate-suzanne-crouch-wants-to-stand-out-in-the-crowd?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
ARTICLE (https://www.ibj.com/articles/gubernatorial-candidate-suzanne-crouch-wants-to-stand-out-in-the-crowd?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Celebrating Tiffanie Ditlevson's Swearing-In
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

A momentous occasion unfolded as Tiffanie Ditlevson was sworn in as a member of the Fishers City Council. Her vision and energy promise to enrich the lives of Hoosiers in Fishers.

Congrats, Tiffanie, on this significant achievement! I look forward to witnessing the positive impact she'll undoubtedly make in her new role!

** Wine, Women, and Pickleball at Grand Park Sports Campus
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

It was a pleasure to attend the Wine, Women, and Pickleball event at the Grand Park Sports Campus in Westfield.

Not only was it a delightful occasion for women to enjoy a spirited game of pickleball, but it also supported a cause close to our hearts—the Little Red Door Cancer Agency. The combination of sport, camaraderie, and philanthropy made for an unforgettable afternoon!

** Hamilton County GOP Holiday Party
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

The Hamilton County Holiday Party was a splendid celebration, honoring the GOP's dedicated volunteers.

Held at the Lucas Estate, the event showcased the robust strength of our Republican Party and the unwavering commitment of those who contribute tirelessly to its success.

A heartfelt thank you to the volunteers, the Hamilton County GOP, and Chairman Mario Massillamany for pouring their energy into the recent elections!

** Year-End Push: Help Us Finish Strong!
------------------------------------------------------------
As we approach the end of 2023, I need YOUR help to finish the year strong. Your generous contributions have made a significant impact, but to achieve our end-of-year fundraising goal, we need your continued support. Your backing fuels our fight to tackle the challenges facing Indiana.

https://www.greenfieldreporter.com/2023/12/05/ready-in-red-lt-governor-shares-experiences-which-she-believes-make-her-fit-to-be-the-next-governor/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Here's how I'm fighting for you:
1. Meeting with law enforcement leaders to understand and address their concerns.
2. Prioritizing mental health resources to combat Indiana's crisis.
3. Advocating for policies that support our Republican values.

Whether through a recurring contribution or a one-time gift, your generosity shapes the future of our great state. Thank you for standing with us, and may your holiday season be filled with joy and hope.
DONATE (https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-suzanne-crouch/web?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Last Week's Endorsements
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"I'm proud to endorse Suzanne Crouch for Indiana's next Governor. During her tenure as Lt. Governor, she has visited our city many times and supported Richmond through the various agencies she oversees. It is important to choose a Governor who will not forget the importance of Indiana's border cities, like Richmond, and how we serve as gateways into the state."
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

“Suzanne Crouch is the only candidate for governor who wants Hoosiers to keep more of their own money. Her ‘Axe the Tax’ plan will help families combat Bidenflation and other Washington, D.C. policies. Suzanne is my choice to be Indiana’s next governor."

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"Suzanne Crouch is the only candidate for Governor who has been actively involved in the day-to-day workings of State government. By meeting with Hoosiers throughout Indiana, she knows and appreciates what we need and want now. Her Axe the Tax program will significantly benefit all Indiana residents without lessening our services. I strongly support Suzanne Crouch for Governor."

** Last but not least...
------------------------------------------------------------

May the memories of this Christmas be a source of inspiration and comfort as we embark on the final stretch of the year. I want to express my sincerest wishes for a season filled with hope, love, and the abiding peace that comes from knowing we are surrounded by the grace of our Savior.

Wishing you a joyful and restful holiday season!

Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email!
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Twitter (https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.instagram.com/crouchforindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/crouchforindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com Email (mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com)

** Get Involved!
------------------------------------------------------------
Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more.
GET INVOLVED (https://crouchforindiana.com/get-involved/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0923c65818-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_18_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0923c65818-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Attend one of my upcoming fundraisers!
------------------------------------------------------------
Your support plays a pivotal role in our mission to connect with Hoosiers across the state and convey our vision for Indiana's future.

If you'd like to be a part of our journey and attend one of our upcoming fundraisers, here's the list of events:
For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at:
heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) .

------------------------------------------------------------

name: Al Franken
subject: He thinks we’re dumb:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta9fcf72b-2fc1-4d83-ad14-0fa5241f8d46/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, I like to think I’ve got pretty thick skin, but I’m offended. [I’m so fired up that I’m going to ask you right at the top to help kick the jerk who’s pissing me off out of Congress. I’ll explain more below, but will you split a donation between Blue Amp Action and Josh Riley’s campaign right now?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3e81a693-7049-4349-b59b-b50fe7d37244/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T659340f2-0734-4bb4-8daa-822338867343/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Marc Molinaro, the MAGA Republican representing NY-19 in Congress, voted TWICE to make Jim Jordan the Speaker of the House. When that didn’t work, he found the one guy even crazier than Jordan to actually give the job to. And if putting an anti-abortion extremist in charge of the House wasn’t bad enough, when confronted about supporting these nutsos, this is what Molinaro said: “[Upstate New Yorkers] don’t give a sh*t who the Speaker of the House is... Most of the people I represent wouldn’t know the Speaker of the House if he backed over them with a pickup truck.” Does he think we’re dumb? [I, for one, do give a sh*t who’s running our government... and I know you do, too. If you’re as pissed off as I am, I hope you’ll split a contribution between Josh Riley and Blue Amp Action today to fire both Marc Molinaro AND Mike Johnson.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b339dcc-2a08-4e9e-903a-2b916185cea2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [CHIP IN NOW >>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb4afe1e3-7a26-4cbe-bc34-93fc26be3fbe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It’s clear Molinaro doesn’t think much of the people he represents. But you know who does care a hell of a lot about Upstate New Yorkers? My friend and former Senate counsel, Josh Riley. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68cdc99c-5482-4d10-828e-1e99548d4415/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
(I swear I’m not actually this short... Josh is just REALLY tall.) Josh grew up in a working-class neighborhood in Endicott, NY. When the local factories closed, Josh saw his community struggle – but he worked to put himself through school and graduated from Harvard Law. In the Senate, Josh and I brought Republicans and Democrats together to actually get stuff done (yes, it really is possible)! The bills we worked on together expanded rights for survivors of domestic abuse and provided new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. It wasn’t easy, but Josh got them signed into law. Josh DID learn how to drive on a pickup truck, so maybe Molinaro was right about that. But he’s dead wrong if he thinks we’re too stupid to know or care that he’s voting to screw us over at every turn. [This is one of the most competitive races in the country, and Josh isn’t going to get to Congress without our help. Please join me by splitting a contribution between Josh and Blue Amp Action right now.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T33773689-1ba6-4363-a5f4-50d1d33b2c4f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2106e245-5a62-464e-9c7a-4fc41a19194d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks, Al
P.S. I mean seriously, isn’t this guy such a jerk? [Give to Josh today!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5590e770-70c0-426c-a6fc-88e6eceab598/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: 15% of Clarkston, Michigan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=952%2E135344%2EWAG8W9)

Friends -
When we say that this is a grassroots funded campaign, we are talking about the people from all walks of life who are coming together to send Elissa Slotkin to the Senate.
One of the things we're most proud of is the strong level of support that Elissa has in some of the smallest towns in Michigan. Just take the town of Clarkston – a “purple” community with a population of 916 – where there are 140 people who have contributed to Elissa's campaign for Senate. That's 15% of the town! Incredible.
This campaign is made possible by people of all ages. From Michiganders in state and across the country. From small towns and big cities. Because it's going to take a village to protect Michigan's Senate seat for Democrats.
We are very grateful that you are a part of this team. With an FEC deadline coming up in just a few days, it would mean a lot if you could make a donation today.
[**Can you chip in $3 to stand with Elissa Slotkin before her official FEC fundraising deadline this weekend? Any amount you can give will make a big difference for her campaign.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231226-1-tt&t=2&akid=952%2E135344%2EWAG8W9)

name: Tom Suozzi, special election candidate
subject: It’s That Time of Year
disclaimer_text: Paid For By The Future Forum Political Action Committee And Not Authorized By Any Candidate Or Candidate's Committee
body:
I love the holidays

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75827770/445856583/-65493016?&refcode=E5781-20231226-TomSuozzi2-Image-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxYTZmOTFjLTAxYTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2nENI2o2LmBVDXAc4QU80LEWxYO5qQtIaPg1Pao9EJg=)** Hi there, Peter, it’s Tom Suozzi. I’m the Democratic nominee for the special election on February 13 to replace George Santos. Future Forum sends you Season's Greetings and so do I. Merry Christmas and Happy New Year! I love the holidays, and I hope that you and your family enjoy this special season. I will spend time with my family as well, but unfortunately I can’t take as much time off as usual. **That’s because in just a few weeks, there will be a must-win, toss-up special election in NY-03 to replace George Santos.** This election matters so much for Nassau, Queens, and the whole country. People are looking for leadership that can deliver for families, solve problems, and rise above the endless fighting that has consumed Washington in recent years. _And February 13 will be a critical day in getting America back on track!_ **So, while we’d all rather take more time to log off, hang out with our kids, and enjoy the holiday season, I had to write you this note, because we can’t waste a single day between now and February 13.** [**Peter, I really need your help today. Can you rush a split donation before the end of the year so we can start off 2024 strong and win on February 13?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75827771/445856584/-65493016?&refcode=E5781-20231226-TomSuozzi2-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxYTZmOTFjLTAxYTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2nENI2o2LmBVDXAc4QU80LEWxYO5qQtIaPg1Pao9EJg=) [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75827772/445856585/-65493016?&refcode=E5781-20231226-TomSuozzi2-SB-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxYTZmOTFjLTAxYTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2nENI2o2LmBVDXAc4QU80LEWxYO5qQtIaPg1Pao9EJg=) Thank you so much for taking the time to read this, and I hope you enjoy the rest of your holiday. Tom Suozzi |

clean_body: I love the holidays = Hi there, Peter, it’s Tom Suozzi. I’m the Democratic nominee for the special election on February 13 to replace George Santos. Future Forum sends you Season's Greetings and so do I. Merry Christmas and Happy New Year! I love the holidays, and I hope that you and your family enjoy this special season. I will spend time with my family as well, but unfortunately I can’t take as much time off as usual. That’s because in just a few weeks, there will be a must-win, toss-up special election in NY-03 to replace George Santos. This election matters so much for Nassau, Queens, and the whole country. People are looking for leadership that can deliver for families, solve problems, and rise above the endless fighting that has consumed Washington in recent years. And February 13 will be a critical day in getting America back on track! So, while we’d all rather take more time to log off, hang out with our kids, and enjoy the holiday season, I had to write you this note, because we can’t waste a single day between now and February 13. = = Thank you so much for taking the time to read this, and I hope you enjoy the rest of your holiday. Tom Suozzi | Future Forum PAC is a coalition of young democratic members of Congress focused on issues and opportunities for the next generation. =** = =

| []() | [Listen, Jamie Raskin just made an AMAZING call to action to ABOLISH the Electoral College — and he needs 10,000 Democrats to stand with him RIGHT NOW and sign our urgent petition. Sign on now to abolish the Electoral College »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231226_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20572%2E4449941%2EElmYzX)
---
Look, Jamie Raskin is 100% right — the Electoral College is eroding our Democracy election by election!

_**Donald Trump would NEVER have been President if it wasn’t for the Electoral College.**_

Republicans have only won the popular vote ONCE since 1988.

_But they’ve won the Presidency three times during that period thanks to the Electoral College – it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!_

**[_So we’re launching a MASSIVE petition to stand with Jamie Raskin & demand Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ABOLISH the Electoral College IMMEDIATELY! Add your name right away!_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231226_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20572%2E4449941%2EElmYzX)**

name: Team Fetterman
subject: With your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John announced our goal, and we have to come to you to ask:
#
Hey Derek, our end-of-quarter deadline is coming up — and it’s the last fundraising deadline before the election year of 2024.
John already announced our goal: **Having 10,000 grassroots donors chip in any amount by 11:59 PM on December 31.**
So we have to ask:
**[Can you step up to the plate and be one of the donors that we need from 18326? We need as many people to help us reach our 10,000-contribution goal by midnight on December 31.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231226-1?refcode=em20231226-1-8725&refcode2=8725_434096_sbyK4p&akid=8725%2E434096%2EsbyK4p)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231226-1?amount=5&refcode=em20231226-8725&refcode2=8725_434096_sbyK4p&akid=8725%2E434096%2EsbyK4p)**
**Derek, we’re in this together.** Folks all over the Commonwealth chipped in what they could to elect John and continue powering his effort to fight for working people in the U.S. Senate.
And since John doesn't take a single cent from corporate PACs or the fossil fuel industry, the only way we’ll reach our 10,000 donor goal by December 31 is with your help.
**[If just a few more people from 18326 chip in, we’ll be able to reach our goal and finish 2023 strong. Will you make a contribution today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231226-1?refcode=em20231226-1-8725&refcode2=8725_434096_sbyK4p&akid=8725%2E434096%2EsbyK4p)**
Thank you!
Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231226-8725-footer&t=1&refcode2=8725_434096_sbyK4p&akid=8725%2E434096%2EsbyK4p)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8725%2E434096%2EsbyK4p)

name: Team Debbie
subject: let us explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Why we are asking you to make a donation to support Debbie's campaign:
| | |
---
Team, here are five reasons why we're asking you to make a donation to support Debbie's campaign for Senate:
1.) Rick Scott supports Trump's election lies, wants to overturn the Affordable Care Act, and wrote the plan to end Social Security and Medicare.
2.) _CNN_ ranks Rick Scott as one of the top 10 most vulnerable senators in Washington — and **polling shows that this race is already a statistical TIE!**
3.) Debbie is a proven fighter: She flipped a battleground seat blue, wrote the bill to expand Medicare, and is a bold advocate for working families.
4.) With Democrats all but certain to lose West Virginia after Manchin announced he’s not seeking reelection, _flipping Florida blue could be our ONLY viable path to saving our majority._
5.) Rick Scott is a mega-millionaire who spent $64 MILLION to buy this seat in 2018. And this time around, **he's already dumped millions into attack ads!**

clean_body: Why we are asking you to make a donation to support Debbie's campaign: | | | Team, here are five reasons why we're asking you to make a donation to support Debbie's campaign for Senate: 1.) Rick Scott supports Trump's election lies, wants to overturn the Affordable Care Act, and wrote the plan to end Social Security and Medicare. 2.) CNN ranks Rick Scott as one of the top 10 most vulnerable senators in Washington — and polling shows that this race is already a statistical TIE! 3.) Debbie is a proven fighter: She flipped a battleground seat blue, wrote the bill to expand Medicare, and is a bold advocate for working families. 4.) With Democrats all but certain to lose West Virginia after Manchin announced he’s not seeking reelection, flipping Florida blue could be our ONLY viable path to saving our majority. 5.) Rick Scott is a mega-millionaire who spent $64 MILLION to buy this seat in 2018. And this time around, he's already dumped millions into attack ads! = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

**2023 has been a GREAT year for state Democrats **– and that’s thanks to grassroots supporters like you. We want to thank you for helping...
* **Secure victories in 33 special elections across the country,**
* **Protect our hard-won majority in the Pennsylvania House, and**
* **Invest over $2.2 million dollars to defend our progress in Virginia.**

This movement is powered by grassroots support and because of that, we are thrilled to be launching our 2024 membership offer, so you can _officially_ renew your support as a member of this team. **If you activate your membership before midnight on the 31st, a generous group of donors has agreed to 7X-match your donation, making it SEVEN times as meaningful.**[Chip in to claim your membership card (_yes, a physical card!_) with a 7X-matched gift of $10 or more before our deadline on the 31st →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xP1bRbO086_ZX-9NTtP6aHPn2zH-kA8WAybiWRZjfn_MwteT1SPEP6C1i_74mw5ZgI0EC8BlpOgM2309iyRdjOvYBxH8S_nBd8Sj1lVNzWdJ0qMspwmePuVVl012CK7X4fu_CbXxeHAK2WJmJWYEA23B1U1ZRavZbIF8F0YaKNRDxyIGS9GYlGnFvkGU5g61LHXtT6a4opPZncpI0bGAw1sjWc9-i5ssgHaegIUy_PeGhSYv9n_iThnU1wpWWl1ddnEYPnqijPLJz_1TwGMJdDBoeG9yb-Yr092lrbWP-FYUsOHPjkg3JDBc699ZQPTtTEO8pcnKwY9bmq6maeR8ND74TqI4GF4w5A8G-7UzB1sniumSe4VYEXqQp6s8Vc8z97zrbxjH-ynpICFkpBleoA/42g/00MfHkyESReCNWS-nvoRPw/h0/l9qaIB9M4HYe_WUYr_Dbhvl3-MOIIKAwIBgK3GIAetQ) [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xP1bRbO086_ZX-9NTtP6aHPn2zH-kA8WAybiWRZjfn_MwteT1SPEP6C1i_74mw5ZgI0EC8BlpOgM2309iyRdjOvYBxH8S_nBd8Sj1lVNzWdJ0qMspwmePuVVl012CK7X4fu_CbXxeHAK2WJmJWYEA23B1U1ZRavZbIF8F0YaKNREJRaVITUfxlx4MddrVfSWRMIBlPlw0VdfW4nbcS6JPNy-wHY7LngwmaNTyRljVZY4rAk33YRcW-8lJrgQ6CHVMClQWipmr3dnBVTed7GY6EbFe4RZzDHFiKFBi-aDg_TTbC6TbvXJwBBEiiS_U3Y_L5CFcTXRwzFCa_7PCLOUUSh8XHlb-ZmGK0pydgJD9n2sWI5q2iVUPw0qQ9cEX6sw2qmmrowC-0ZG3lcU1wYZfO/42g/00MfHkyESReCNWS-nvoRPw/h1/3vvodqgV-VAM652veTiivEufgJ3QaJWZ6uSLftQ3EqY) There couldn’t be a better time to become a member of this team. clean_body: We’re calling for grassroots supporters to activate their Official 2024 DLCC Membership and claim a triple match donation all before December 31st at midnight → | | | | | ---|--- 2023 has been a GREAT year for state Democrats – and that’s thanks to grassroots supporters like you. We want to thank you for helping... Secure victories in 33 special elections across the country, Protect our hard-won majority in the Pennsylvania House, and Invest over $2.2 million dollars to defend our progress in Virginia. This movement is powered by grassroots support and because of that, we are thrilled to be launching our 2024 membership offer, so you can officially renew your support as a member of this team. If you activate your membership before midnight on the 31st, a generous group of donors has agreed to 7X-match your donation, making it SEVEN times as meaningful. There couldn’t be a better time to become a member of this team. State Democrats are facing gerrymandered maps, right-wing governors, and a slew of all-important special elections. Your support could be the difference between state Dems having the resources they need to win, or being left unable to compete against their GOP opponents. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Looking forward to having you on the team, DLCC Membership Team ** The information provided above is associated with the following email address: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Team Lizzie
subject: #TeamLizzie Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231226wu?refcode=lpfe231226wu [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231226wu?refcode=lpfe231226wu]
With 10 weeks to go until the primary, the field is set and Lizzie has an opponent in the Democratic primary. A lot of people in #TX07 don’t know this, and for the next 10 weeks, it is our job to tell them.
We can do this. After all, we’ve done it before! In 2018, Lizzie won a competitive primary and runoff, defeating six candidates. She went on to flip #TX07, delivering a key win to take the House majority.
We know those types of victories require a far-reaching coalition and that’s what we’ve been building since 2017! We’re so glad you are a part of it.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231226wu?refcode=lpfe231226wu]
With filing day behind us and 10 weeks until the primary, our campaign is picking up steam. We’re holding our 2024 kickoff on Saturday, January 6! If you’re able to join us, let us know here [https://www.mobilize.us/?org_ids=337] . And get ready, because our weekly postcard parties are returning, too!
We’re building our team of volunteers in anticipation of all of the on-the-ground work we have ahead of us in January and February. If you can help us get out the vote in the coming weeks, we’d appreciate it. Sign up here to volunteer with us and we’ll reach out with upcoming opportunities! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ln8e8kjn2Euuh3daVlmozQ2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ln8e8kjn2Euuh3daVlmozQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ln8e8kjn2Euuh3daVlmozQ2]
You can also show your support around TX-07 in other ways. Might we suggest a Team Lizzie bumper sticker [https://store.lizziefletcher.com/products/lizzie-fletcher-for-congress-bumper-sticker] for your car? Or a T-Shirt [https://store.lizziefletcher.com/products/lizzie-fletcher-for-congress-logo-tee] you can wear to show your support? Maybe a tote bag [https://store.lizziefletcher.com/products/team-lizzie-tote] ? You can get it all in our Merch Store [https://store.lizziefletcher.com/] !
https://store.lizziefletcher.com/ [https://store.lizziefletcher.com/]
There are lots of ways to show your support, and we need every one of them. Thanks for being a part of the team,
Team Lizzie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231226wu?refcode=lpfe231226wu]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States

name: Kari Lake
subject: Honesty is the best policy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate
body:
December.

| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=40b78bc5b8c94e8cb08e86251e364164&_e=xO_tvf2r4siemXx2CkjrZ89syccjZ_qB4Uoal7Wkz7JBip9lJSmuQrHFbdrebkJ_P4h3r8TwBnATykpxUL2giYPW4A0EdL_6qDuAZE7NWfrfExSjg7K_Xp1ZKkTJouAh49iJ1lQSJPYhsGcDwK99yMBGBbAMVSkW_P2KsqUb-UtjHsrDLtRphwRRGg_HTxYe00baFqeHzJ4bkEuz9QkrL9HvQWvXhBmwcaHaIzCZVLtU2sm9PeHvUnqW0Ww50np2tASY-MRKhSVLTQKDZVhVFGlkSSopxtetumROqdJ97Y6KtLLkColmbv7a9U1cQJ52PGpDfwjbkbodpp6qhcrxok-5dTqdcDbidJoiG4PQOlJL9AbgRTscN2UVDK4jVN4RKA46syKA65z6UmyQc-hRMa43Y4C9iE5sgUg7nLNOb1Y%3D)

Fellow American

Keep reading this is the most important email you will receive for the entire year.

December's here, so I can finally send this to you. I've been patiently waiting for this moment, so here I go...

This is coming directly from me, Kari Lake: My December deadline is approaching, and if we don't crush this goal, we risk falling behind the Democrats in donations.

December is a notoriously bad month for fundraising, and even though we're one foot away from 2024, these end-of-year fundraising deadlines tend to be disasters. These deadlines are REAL, and they are IMPORTANT. I would love to let the world know that our December fundraising numbers were the BEST in the country.

**To give us the best chance possible, I have an offer for you if you can contribute even $1 to my deadline.**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75833788/445872953/1666406465?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2ZhYzFmNS0wN2E0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m2jzUc-pNjFRKK7ezy1u1TqVe9slj_7DIGEtf8wzbr8=)
Hi Friend, it’s your governor Wes. I am going to ask you to make an online contribution to my campaign. Please give me a chance to explain: In two weeks, the 446th session of the General Assembly will meet here in Annapolis — and from January 10 until April 8, my team will be prohibited under Maryland election law from any and all fundraising. (We call it “the freeze”.) Listen, I can’t wait to get into session and start getting more done for Marylanders — but there are a few important reasons why **[I'm asking you to chip in now, and kick off a big push to raise $10,000 before the new year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75833789/445872954/1942360010?refcode=em20231226&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2ZhYzFmNS0wN2E0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m2jzUc-pNjFRKK7ezy1u1TqVe9slj_7DIGEtf8wzbr8=)** Chip in now...because for every year I’m in office, we’re only able to fundraise for 75% of the year. That’s going to be a BIG obstacle the closer we get to a re-election fight, so it’s really important to hit our pre-freeze goal this week. Chip in now...to show your support ahead of our next legislative session! Last year, the Moore-Miller administration passed 10 out of 10 of our legislative packages. This year, we’re going to keep leading the way and passing policies to help Maryland families thrive. Your support will help make it happen. Finally, chip in now...if you believe this really is Maryland’s decade. Just like we’re passing laws now that will improve Marylanders’ lives for the next ten years, we’re working to raise grassroots resources _now_ to be ready for the long haul. This isn’t a moment, after all — it’s a movement. **[We need to raise $10,000 before midnight on December 31st to be ready for the freeze. If you can, I’m asking you to make a contribution today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75833790/445872955/1942360010?refcode=em20231226&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2ZhYzFmNS0wN2E0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m2jzUc-pNjFRKK7ezy1u1TqVe9slj_7DIGEtf8wzbr8=)** | **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75833791/445872971/1942360010?refcode=em20231226&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2ZhYzFmNS0wN2E0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m2jzUc-pNjFRKK7ezy1u1TqVe9slj_7DIGEtf8wzbr8=)**
---
I don’t expect you to give to every email we send, or even most of them, but I do hope you will contribute today if you’re able to. Trust that I’m humbled and grateful by every person who’s willing to invest in our work.
Elevate,
Wes
