name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: The truth is…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Democracy is a perpetual work in progress, shaped by our collective commitment.
|
---

Friend – Democracy, much like a muscle, requires consistent exercise to thrive. In order to protect democracy, we have to do democracy.
As we stand less than a year away from the next election, our focus is unwaveringly fixed on pressing forward. Over the past several years, we put our nose to the grindstone alongside passionate supporters like you, and made real progress toward a truly representative democracy. Now, with the clock ticking down to 2024, we lean on your strength and commitment more than ever.
**Our mission is clear: we must hold leaders accountable, tirelessly advocate for fair maps across the nation, and unwaveringly uphold the core principles of democracy reform and election integrity.**
[**But, my friend, to turn these commitments into reality, we need your support. Will you make a donation to All On The Line to amplify our efforts ahead of 2024?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75833643/445872693/760843237?refcode=20231222_AOTL_P_EHHB2_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmYTg1YmQyLTA3YTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lgQrhE21yTnuCq3NzNwSi0UapDPVVGckqdSQMk5-h0w=)

Over the past several years, we put our nose to the grindstone alongside passionate supporters like you, and made real progress toward a truly representative democracy. Now, with the clock ticking down to 2024, we lean on your strength and commitment more than ever. Hello,
Did you see what Chris Hayes said on MSNBC? **Lauren Boebert is in serious trouble of losing her seat in 2024.**
Last year, Adam Frisch came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert. It was the closest race in the _entire_ country – decided by a margin of just 0.17%.
Now, Adam is running again, and we have an historic opportunity to end Boebert’s political career in what’ll be the most closely-watched race on Election Night.
The latest poll shows Adam leading Lauren Boebert – 50% to 48% – but Boebert’s Super PACs are already on the attack. In 2022, we were heavily out-spent, and we cannot afford to fall behind again.
**We need to raise $2 million before our final FEC fundraising deadline of 2023 to counter Boebert’s lies, but with just days left to go, we’re still $216,834 short of our goal and what we need to win.**
**The only way Adam is going to defeat Lauren Boebert and finally restore some sanity and dignity to Washington is if grassroots donors like you give right now:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford before our final FEC fundraising deadline of 2023 – to help Adam Frisch defeat Lauren Boebert? No amount you can afford is too small.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75834250/445874267/1610638071?refcode=em20231226am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=74a85bd2-07a4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGE4NWJkMi0wN2E0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oe2trhCkKHPFX47103f-nekXwm1vARkL4w3NTsezhcc=)

Last year, Adam Frisch came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert. It was the closest race in the entire country – decided by a margin of just 0.17%. Now, Adam is running again, and we have an historic opportunity to end Boebert’s political career in what’ll be the most closely-watched race on Election Night. The latest poll shows Adam leading Lauren Boebert – 50% to 48% – but Boebert’s Super PACs are already on the attack. In 2022, we were heavily out-spent, and we cannot afford to fall behind again. We need to raise $2 million before our final FEC fundraising deadline of 2023 to counter Boebert’s lies, but with just days left to go, we’re still $216,834 short of our goal and what we need to win. Your donation now is truly the only way we’ll be able to fund our campaign and send Lauren Boebert packing. This is one of the most important races in the country, and nothing – truly nothing – will feel better than knowing you were a critical part of Boebert’s defeat. **Peter, as we enter the brutal winter months, New York City's persistent housing crisis remains unresolved.**

Over the last couple of years, New Yorkers have accrued millions of dollars in back rent owed, and the brunt of this debt is shouldered by financially vulnerable households and communities. In fact, renting a typical unit "would require a household income of at least $110,000 a year" –**more than double that of the average New York City renter.**
This is incredibly tragic. Renters who have already fallen behind are at risk of accruing even more debt and potentially ending up homeless. **Every person should have a right to housing that is both safe and affordable** – but decades of discriminatory housing practices, the manipulative actions of private investors, and a multiyear battle with COVID-19 have taken this right away from millions of New Yorkers.

That’s why, as the People’s Lawyer, I’m fighting to secure fair access to affordable housing for all. I will not rest until every New Yorker has a safe, clean place to put their head at night – but I cannot win this fight alone. **I need to collect at least 2,500 responses before this survey closes at midnight tonight, and I still don’t know where you stand, Peter. Please, let me know:**
| | **Should everyone have access to affordable housing?**
---

clean_body: Friend, We're hoping you could join us in sending a birthday message. [] Happy belated birthday, Dr. Bob Lorinser! [] Age is but a number when you have the work ethic of a Clydesdale! Bob is a Christmas baby, and has taken on the audacious journey to run Congress. To encourage him to continue the fight and create meaningful change in our communities, we've created a digital birthday card for you to sign. [] Thank you for your help making Bob's day extra special this year. -Kevin Friends of Dr. Bob Campaign Manager SIGN THE CARD [] Or, send a check to FRIENDS OF DR. Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=97e6036871891a799d414424987eb1bd9b2eb2ca06a5af121116b47c21abe345d392ca8bdab57a37bef22d086d536a7199d692c2748ed28d8db19da0d687890b

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

| | Patriot,

---
2023 will forever be remembered as a dark year in American history.
---
The sitting president and ruling party have become a Third World Marxist _regime_ that weaponized the courts to unconstitutionally _**REMOVE**_ their leading opponent (_ME_) from the 2024 ballot.
---
They’re already trying to throw me in JAIL for life as an innocent man, they’ve gagged and censored me, took a MUGSHOT of me, and are even seeking the “corporate death penalty” against me and my family...
---
_...But now, as the 2024 election rapidly approaches, their target is_ _**_YOU_**_ _._
---
_Crooked Joe is actively trying to_** _NULLIFY_** _every “Trump ballot” in America and_** _STEAL_** _this election from the majority of voters like YOU!_
---
What you are witnessing is not American, it is not even just “dirty politics,” it is a dictator refusing to abdicate the throne.
---
But despite all this, despite the endless witch hunts, I have never been more confident that we _will_ emerge victorious in 2024. Mark my words, Patriot, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
---
Because we have something the Left _NEVER_ will...
---
...A movement of more than 74 MILLION patriotic Americans who will _**NEVER**_ _**SURRENDER**_ their country to tyranny!
---
As America barrels down the path of Third World Marxist tyranny, I’m more committed than _ever_ to SAVING her. _**_Are YOU?_**_
---

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Bob has an important deadline coming up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter, it’s Senator Chuck Schumer here with an important message about Bob Casey.
Defending our Democratic Senate Majority in 2024 is mission-critical, but the odds are stacked against us. With an open seat in West Virginia, we need to re-elect every single incumbent -- and that includes Bob. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip one more seat to take control, and it’s no secret that Pennsylvania is at the very top of his list.
**Take it from me, if we’re going to hold the Senate majority, we need to re-elect Bob Casey.** But that takes resources, and with Bob’s final FEC deadline of the year rapidly approaching, he needs all hands on deck.
**[Protecting our Senate majority won’t be easy, but if Democrats are going to maintain control, we need to win in Pennsylvania. Can you rush $5 or more right now to defend this must-win seat and protect our Democratic Senate majority?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231226-1?refcode=em20231226-1&recurring=1&refcode2=1497_552475_FQvghg&akid=1497%2E552475%2EFQvghg)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231226-1?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20231226-1-el&refcode2=1497_552475_FQvghg&akid=1497%2E552475%2EFQvghg) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231226-1?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20231226-1-el&refcode2=1497_552475_FQvghg&akid=1497%2E552475%2EFQvghg) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231226-1?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20231226-1-el&refcode2=1497_552475_FQvghg&akid=1497%2E552475%2EFQvghg) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231226-1?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20231226-1-el&refcode2=1497_552475_FQvghg&akid=1497%2E552475%2EFQvghg) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231226-1?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20231226-1-el&refcode2=1497_552475_FQvghg&akid=1497%2E552475%2EFQvghg) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231226-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20231226-1&refcode2=1497_552475_FQvghg&akid=1497%2E552475%2EFQvghg)
---
Bob Casey is no stranger to tough races -- but he can’t win alone. He’s counting on grassroots support from people like you, Peter, to compete with the tsunami of right-wing money that is going to come his way.
**[With our Senate majority on the line, I have to ask again: Will you make a donation to Bob’s campaign before his critical FEC deadline? This is too important of a race to sit out.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231226-1?refcode=em20231226-1&recurring=1&refcode2=1497_552475_FQvghg&akid=1497%2E552475%2EFQvghg)**
Thank you for your support.
Chuck Schumer
Senate Majority Leader

name: OFFICIAL - Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: It’s time to hit the gas.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
After the ball drops in Times Square, we’re in the Election Year.
#

Peter, thanks for opening this email. It’s an important one.
This is the home stretch to the end of the year. This is our last chance to catch up before our deadline hits on New Year’s Eve. Because after the ball drops in Times Square, we’re in the Election Year.
And things are going to get very real, very fast.
One of the first things this campaign will do in January is get our report ready for the FEC. Once that report goes public, everyone will know how we did in 2023.
Our allies, our adversaries, and anyone in between will know how much we raised, how many donations we received, and how many donors chipped in.
It’s going to answer a lot of questions folks have about our campaign.
Let’s give them good answers.
[**Please. If you can afford it, make a donation to Ruben Gallego’s campaign today. Show the media and the GOP that we’re going to fight for Arizona and do everything we possibly can to hold the Senate in 2024.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec23.csjDeB&refcode=em231226-1-f&t=1&akid=1596%2E734936%2EP_Zwz-)

subject: Dallas is my home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Dallas is my home, Peter.

name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: Get your free, limited-edition “I’m voting in 2024” matte sticker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
We’re launching a limited-edition “I’m voting in 2024” matte sticker so you can show off your plans to participate in our democracy next year

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1871%2E4032634%2EcjWAi6)
---
Let's face it, one of the best parts of voting is getting an "I voted" sticker. And it’s great to wear them on Election Day. But as you know, the months leading up to that occasion are absolutely critical for participating in democracy and getting the word out, too — so where’s the sticker for all those other days? **[We’re launching a limited-edition “I’m voting in 2024” matte sticker so you can show off your plans to participate in our democracy next year — all day, every day. Chip in any amount to support our campaign before the December FEC fundraising deadline, and you’ll get this free “I’m voting” sticker as a thank you to put on your water bottle, laptop, or anywhere you want to show off your pride as a voter!](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1056?amount=28&t=8&akid=1871%2E4032634%2EcjWAi6)** | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1056?amount=28&t=9&akid=1871%2E4032634%2EcjWAi6)
---

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1056?t=23&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=1871%2E4032634%2EcjWAi6)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1056?t=25&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=1871%2E4032634%2EcjWAi6)
---

---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1056?t=29&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1871%2E4032634%2EcjWAi6)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1056?t=19&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1871%2E4032634%2EcjWAi6)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1056?t=21&express_lane=true&akid=1871%2E4032634%2EcjWAi6)
---

---
Voting — making our voices heard — is the beating heart of our democracy. And after witnessing the GOP fight tooth and nail to try to silence voters and weaken our democracy these past years, voting is an act of resistance. Every contribution to our campaign helps power Elizabeth’s fight to root corruption out of Washington and strengthen our democracy — and helps spread the word about her pro-democracy plans across the country, like abolishing the filibuster, banning members of Congress from owning or trading stocks, and rebalancing the Supreme Court. And when you show off your sticker, you’ll show your commitment to saving our democracy in 2024 — while also reminding everyone around you to register to vote and make their voices heard, too. **[Please support Elizabeth’s campaign today with a donation of before the FEC fundraising deadline at the end of the year, and you'll receive one of our brand-new "I’m voting" matte stickers as a sign of Elizabeth's gratitude — and a sign of our strength as we head into this critical election year.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1056?amount=28&t=15&akid=1871%2E4032634%2EcjWAi6)** Thanks, Team Warren

I hope that you will consider making a tax-deductible contribution to MCPP in 2023.

Our team is committed to making the intellectual, moral, legal and practical case for freedom in our state – and beyond.

Your investment will support our program of work in 2024 as we fight for the conservative cause in our state.

To contribute, you can make a donation by clicking on the button below:

Thank you for your consideration.

| We can’t let right-wing Eric Hovde anywhere near the Senate.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1764%2E35263%2EztHoQg)
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dec23.PriOoE&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20231226_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1764%2E35263%2EztHoQg) Listen here, Peter: This month, Senate Republicans’ campaign arm confirmed that Mitch McConnell’s hand-picked Republican opponent will enter Wisconsin’s Senate race. Before I tell you more about Eric Hovde and the threat he poses to our Senate majority,**[will you rush in a donation toward Tammy Baldwin’s end-of-quarter fundraising goal to help her keep this seat blue?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dec23.PriOoE&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20231226_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1764%2E35263%2EztHoQg)** Eric Hovde is national Republicans’ #1 choice in Wisconsin’s Senate race. He’s an anti-abortion extremist who wants to cut Social Security and repeal the ACA. Hovde’s also a megamillionaire California bank owner — and he’s willing to spend up to _$20 million_ of his own personal fortune to defeat Tammy! **We can’t let right-wing Eric Hovde anywhere near the U.S. Senate, especially not when defending our Senate majority depends on reelecting Tammy.** But it’s going to require a CRAZY amount of resources to defend Tammy against the flood of attacks that will soon be heading her way — so I’m personally asking: **[Will you rush a donation of any amount to help Tammy Baldwin keep Wisconsin blue? | | The Freedom Virginia team wishes all those who celebrate a Blessed Kwanzaa. As a time of joy and celebration of heritage and family, we hope that all seven days of the Kwanzaa holiday are meaningful for you and your families. The principles of Kwanzaa, unity, self-determination, collective work and responsibility, cooperative economics, purpose, creativity, and faith are valued at our organization. We hope that the holiday break proves to be a time of renewed faith in the principles of Kwanzaa and a period of rest and rejuvenation for the year ahead!

name: Jerrad
subject: Slippery slopes
body:
Disqualifying Trump from the presidency is not a slippery slope. Ignoring our courts and the Constitution is.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I6IzicYYRfnxOyv79vfLzNqlIGyf-OxnvDmbEtlrlDrRmSlTXSXLvvFNc_9TFadxz6Ki2Qz3_hE78-1woxmjwXmeF1dVpkUCAr7lDYkOiO8MbA0cfNjeMWb8lTttH7Nwz_sL4tGy3B1AhbN9ZiSxRcxpiH-1EN3TUr4yZdFp-E00P40VUN2_ovKd6eHHOIzbWNX6Ot7E0DzgyMHsNA3lQA==&c=Z22jWNRRK7AsgcWnKGVsJMh8yCkL16JEgPFeyMWuDyxrCemxT9iXfw==&ch=QNWCD-WLprVf7kZWL5TJXbj9vRMon7KjHo8wnO8_kKlOZQz0aTCHgA==)
---

Friend,
On Tuesday, the Colorado Supreme Court ruled that Donald Trump's active involvement in the January 6, 2021 insurrection disqualifies him from seeking the presidency. He will not be allowed to appear on a ballot in that state, pending an appeal to the U.S. Supreme Court.
In response, Republicans have offered a slippery slope argument that this ruling is somehow anti-democratic--and also, President Biden should be thrown off the ballot too!
That's not really an argument of course; any high school English student can tell you the 'slippery slope' is a logical fallacy meant to confuse and frighten. Here, the Colorado Supreme Court concluded that ignoring the law would be a miscarriage of justice. The justices ruled that ignoring the law would in fact be the slippery slope. Makes sense to me.
The real issue at hand is adherence to the Constitution, which explicitly calls for the disqualification of an official who engages in insurrection or rebellion against the United States--a principle that transcends party lines.
The fact that a state Supreme Court has ruled that the January 6th insurrection disqualifies Trump from the presidency is not a slippery slope. Ignoring our courts and the Constitution is.
[Today, I'm reaching out to ask for your support in championing the rule of law and defending our democracy. By contributing $10 or more to our campaign, you're investing in a future where our leaders are held accountable for their actions, regardless of party affiliation:](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I6IzicYYRfnxOyv79vfLzNqlIGyf-OxnvDmbEtlrlDrRmSlTXSXLvvFNc_9TFadxz6Ki2Qz3_hE78-1woxmjwXmeF1dVpkUCAr7lDYkOiO8MbA0cfNjeMWb8lTttH7Nwz_sL4tGy3B1AhbN9ZiSxRcxpiH-1EN3TUr4yZdFp-E00P40VUN2_ovKd6eHHOIzbWNX6Ot7E0DzgyMHsNA3lQA==&c=Z22jWNRRK7AsgcWnKGVsJMh8yCkL16JEgPFeyMWuDyxrCemxT9iXfw==&ch=QNWCD-WLprVf7kZWL5TJXbj9vRMon7KjHo8wnO8_kKlOZQz0aTCHgA==)

clean_body: Disqualifying Trump from the presidency is not a slippery slope. Ignoring our courts and the Constitution is. | | | | == Friend, On Tuesday, the Colorado Supreme Court ruled that Donald Trump's active involvement in the January 6, 2021 insurrection disqualifies him from seeking the presidency. He will not be allowed to appear on a ballot in that state, pending an appeal to the U.S. Supreme Court. In response, Republicans have offered a slippery slope argument that this ruling is somehow anti-democratic--and also, President Biden should be thrown off the ballot too! That's not really an argument of course; any high school English student can tell you the 'slippery slope' is a logical fallacy meant to confuse and frighten. Here, the Colorado Supreme Court concluded that ignoring the law would be a miscarriage of justice. The justices ruled that ignoring the law would in fact be the slippery slope. Makes sense to me. The real issue at hand is adherence to the Constitution, which explicitly calls for the disqualification of an official who engages in insurrection or rebellion against the United States--a principle that transcends party lines. The fact that a state Supreme Court has ruled that the January 6th insurrection disqualifies Trump from the presidency is not a slippery slope. Ignoring our courts and the Constitution is. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | Donate == | Our fight is not just about winning elections: it's about preserving the integrity of our democratic institutions. Together, we will stand up against those who would compromise our values and work towards a future where the rule of law prevails. Sincerely, Jerrad Christian Democrat for Congress Ohio's 12th Congressional District | | | | == | Jerrad Christian Candidate for Congress (OH-12) | | | | == | Mail checks to: Citizens for J Christian P.O. box 315 Galena, OH 43021 | | | | | | | | | | Citizens for J Christian | P.O. box 315, Galena, OH 43021 | Sent by mailto:jerrad@christianforohio.com powered by

name: Blue Amp Action
subject: Gloria Johnson is ready to stand up for ALL Tennesseans.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
She’s running for the U.S. Senate to replace Marsha Blackburn.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf270b00a-5a92-47a9-bd28-e8ee28c9937f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, When we first heard of Gloria Johnson, it was immediately clear that she was a fighter. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T06c95428-56c2-400f-a640-200469acd8c8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Just days after a school shooting devastated their community, far-right Tennessee Republicans refused to take the action that survivors and families of victims demanded — too scared of losing their campaign contributions to take on the gun lobby. Gloria was one of three courageous Democratic representatives who stood up to fight back, even though she knew it was against the Legislature’s rules. She’s standing up now to take on Marsha Blackburn and give Tennesseans a better choice for their next senator. [Peter, we're supporting Gloria in her campaign for the U.S. Senate, and we're urgently requesting you do the same — before the end-of-year deadline on Sunday — by splitting a donation of $10 (or any amount that’s right for you) to our respective campaigns today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70259421-d2ed-4bdc-9d13-7c3667055d10/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52eb8a98-0dc7-4387-af31-e7efd8ca7367/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Gloria has spent years working for commonsense gun violence prevention, improving public education, increasing health care access, and other no-brainer solutions to the problems facing Tennessee. These are issues where legislators who care about their constituents should try to come to an agreement. These issues shouldn’t be controversial. But instead of working with Gloria to deliver the solutions Tennessee needs, Republicans in Nashville have tried to make her sit down and shut up. But that hasn’t stopped her yet. Gloria believes that every voter deserves a choice in who will represent them — no matter how “red” the state may seem. She’s ready to work hard and fight like hell for everyone in Tennessee. But she needs our help. [Democrats like us have to come together to support candidates like Gloria who are ready to fight for their communities no matter the opposition. Please, split a donation of what you can to power her campaign before the end-of-year deadline. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T04f1ed21-46a5-4812-8ebd-300629579228/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tecd31034-7135-421e-ba88-f69803d2f757/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks, The Team @ Blue Amp Action
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---

---|---

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

subject: more bad rulings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elizabeth for Nevada]( "Paid for by Elizabeth for Nevada")
body:
The Court ruled to remove the President | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2735f3c02518/more-bad-rulings?e=54a81bd33c)
---
| | [ ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=793646f59a&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| Peter,
---
| | Today, I reach out to you not just as a candidate, but as a concerned citizen deeply troubled by the recent events threatening the very core of our Republic. The Colorado Supreme Court's decision to disqualify President Donald Trump from the presidential primary ballot is a stark reminder of the lengths to which those opposed to our American values will go to silence our voices. [Speak up right now with your support.](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=1682fd0a96&e=54a81bd33c)

This isn't just about one candidate or one election; it's about the sanctity of our electoral process and the democratic principles that make our nation great.

The Democrats' blatant act of election interference in Colorado is an affront to every American voter, regardless of party affiliation. It undermines our collective trust in the system and sets a dangerous precedent for future elections.

As Nevadans, we cherish our caucus system, a testament to the power of the people's voice over the whims of any single judge or court. But today, more than ever, we must stand united to protect our electoral integrity across the nation.
---
|
---
| [Stand With Me – Protect Our Electoral Integrity](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=616c095872&e=54a81bd33c "Stand With Me – Protect Our Electoral Integrity")
---
| [Your support is crucial in this fight](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=46a4ac93da&e=54a81bd33c). Every [contribution](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=cd1bb12da7&e=54a81bd33c) empowers our campaign to advocate for fair and free elections, to rally our fellow Americans, and to push back against those who seek to undermine our Republic. We cannot allow this injustice to go unchallenged.

Let's [stand together](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=085ef2897c&e=54a81bd33c) to defend our rights and ensure that every American has the opportunity to participate in fair and free elections. This is about preserving the foundation of our nation for current and future generations.

---

clean_body: The Court ruled to remove the President | | | | | | Peter, | | Today, I reach out to you not just as a candidate, but as a concerned citizen deeply troubled by the recent events threatening the very core of our Republic. The Colorado Supreme Court's decision to disqualify President Donald Trump from the presidential primary ballot is a stark reminder of the lengths to which those opposed to our American values will go to silence our voices. This isn't just about one candidate or one election; it's about the sanctity of our electoral process and the democratic principles that make our nation great. The Democrats' blatant act of election interference in Colorado is an affront to every American voter, regardless of party affiliation. It undermines our collective trust in the system and sets a dangerous precedent for future elections. As Nevadans, we cherish our caucus system, a testament to the power of the people's voice over the whims of any single judge or court. But today, more than ever, we must stand united to protect our electoral integrity across the nation. | | "Stand With Me – Protect Our Electoral Integrity" | . Every empowers our campaign to advocate for fair and free elections, to rally our fellow Americans, and to push back against those who seek to undermine our Republic. We cannot allow this injustice to go unchallenged. Let's to defend our rights and ensure that every American has the opportunity to participate in fair and free elections. This is about preserving the foundation of our nation for current and future generations. | For America, | | Elizabeth Helgelien Candidate for U.S. Congress, NV-3 | | | | | | | | | | | | | "Paid for by Elizabeth for Nevada" | | Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. Contributions to Elizabeth for Nevada are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited. An individual may contribute up to $3,300 per election (the primary and general are separate elections) and a multi-candidate PAC may contribute up to $5,000 per election. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of the employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. By adding a spouse, you are making a joint contribution to be attributed evenly between you and your spouse. body:
Here, let us explain...

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75842376/445892922/1272516037?refcode=em_XX_XXXX.XX.XX_XX_XX_header_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmRmODM1YjItMTNhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fRVNor3pXJM598_1dcG4r99YSqXIBDVBkECbpKQs8oA=) Peter, may we present the _**First Poem In the History of Campaign Emails***_ _‘Twas the day after Christmas
And all through our campaign
People were scurrying.
Here let me explain...

Though Andrei’s supporters are
All snug in their beds
The countdown to the deadline
Keeps ticking ahead

While the New Year’s approaching
And you’re still enjoying your tree
There’s an end of December
Report to the FEC

All through the months
Of the calendar year
Andrei’s lead had been building;
His momentum so clear

With the donations of thousands
And no corporate PACs
Andrei had shown the support
That David Schweikert so lacks

But while our friends are enjoying
Their goodies or coal
We awoke after Christmas
Behind on our goal

With New Year’s Eve coming fast
We’re not popping champagne
But worried our shortfall
Will derail our train

So Andrei asks you to help us
With a contribution – or two
So he can bring to the Congress
Some representation that’s new

Andrei’s the best leader
And a heck of a guy
So help him say “Merry Christmas to All...
And to Schweikert: Good bye.”_ [***Actually, we have no idea if this is the *first campaign to email a poem or not... but we do know we need your help before Andrei’s critical end-of-year FEC deadline. Peter, I hope you had a wonderful, warm, and very merry holiday!

I for one had a wonderful holiday surrounded by family and friends. It was
great to take a few days off from the campaign trail to be around loved
ones.

We’re in the home stretch of 2023, and there’s just one big item left on
our 2023 to-do list: our end-of-year FEC fundraising goal.

Crossing it off the list will be a challenge, Peter. But more
importantly, it’s an opportunity to tell everyone exactly who we are.

A force to be reckoned with. A dedicated, energized, WINNING team.

The pressure is high. But I know you have my back at moments like this.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9012?t=1008&amount=5&akid=778%2E52803%2EF-00wV ]With your help, we can greet 2024 with our heads held high. Will you
chip in $5 or more towards our crucial end-of-year goal?

clean_body: [ ][IMG] Peter, I hope you had a wonderful, warm, and very merry holiday! I for one had a wonderful holiday surrounded by family and friends. It was great to take a few days off from the campaign trail to be around loved ones. We’re in the home stretch of 2023, and there’s just one big item left on our 2023 to-do list: our end-of-year FEC fundraising goal. Crossing it off the list will be a challenge, Peter. But more importantly, it’s an opportunity to tell everyone exactly who we are. A force to be reckoned with. A dedicated, energized, WINNING team. The pressure is high. But I know you have my back at moments like this. [ ]With your help, we can greet 2024 with our heads held high. Will you chip in $5 or more towards our crucial end-of-year goal? | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

name: Braeden Lentz, Working Families Party
subject: A generous (real!) individual donor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
I wanted to send a quick update about our fundraising since we’re just a few days away from the end of 2023. | | | Hi, Peter, this is Braeden — the Development Director here at WFP. I wanted to send a quick update about our fundraising since we’re just a few days away from the end of 2023. Over the last few years, our movement and our party have grown through the generosity of individuals who share our vision, doing what they can. For some folks, that is giving $1 or $3 at a time — while others are able to give more. **I’m excited to share that thanks to a generous (real!) individual donor, we will be able to match ALL online contributions from right now through the end of the year.** That means when you contribute $1, $5, or $10 today through December 31st, the impact of your contribution will be doubled. [**We are grateful for your support all year round, but if you can afford it at this time, will you make a contribution today? Thanks to an individual donor, every online contribution will be matched up to a total of $30,000 until midnight on 12/31.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUM5vobwOfJAP3q8AFTqku9y8FRdoZhUAVDoK8D_gxyPyMAnkdSAr1VU6j1KVHPDDanBObZzCpI935nzRYgYgeUx4R0FhEpezz1Hs7e72ez9PY4hNBH3NT_Jsy2tflBbUpgOBRYPnZG5kpjATBlFvDbN2tv09iu864sAIFjwf3nh0zTfEct9AwRJxPzsyRTLb76foB-mRB_0GLGS0ljbK-GZ38b_jtJSXlpedAaG14iDjh54xlW8wppZWpdVWSxIdkKQbr1ejtwDCfBnaEJtbm--c80r7rq_0Si1GpAo_513UAz_pcHZsJb7FQfNQgKmExqlQL5UXHRiEb2pezhyUrp5Wf3XPq9LUdXGBXj8CSqHwu6qoxD3XAgmwS73VB0TXt/42g/p3cO8YgITHy-eeuWrnrfLg/h0/NSXAKbwNd8cgMMQFHn96-vz2G-A3Ibq_18EAL34ypiA) **[Contribute $15 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUM5vobwOfJAP3q8AFTqku9y8FRdoZhUAVDoK8D_gxyPyMAnkdSAr1VU6j1KVHPDDaj_WUKE7Phv3YR3QbTu3HM2qNz9NOQL4bXa0qT3i04Kq0iQ5ptfvk7XIHMtYiE2bO-6rNdvMv5s0k-Wkx7Veb31piHEreSTTOxDxHG8j7wS6P182oe9VQxbifs2LlOYyORvwn3mIRsxr2RGAlwU-2zwPVb9hUIu0a5HD3CFBfIYAxwOF_ZS9CrVsr0dEfD1VoSSMYgywzc5E9GwjO7sA08swYVlSMbSj04vsS-of_omQLXPPfbU1ixV0Zw4XmJrLrBAUrEopYLfg24Fe8OWlFzPhY7ktsuxpLZvD1Z2PGHKNjjzbzxHyPPGla_N1xmbvY/42g/p3cO8YgITHy-eeuWrnrfLg/h1/p1GcUmBZvg8IM9kWqdA5CCbrP4W4kspvMStlxY2uSd8)** Since I started at WFP almost five years ago, we have seen both surges and downturns in fundraising. The effort to deny Trump a second term in 2020 alongside a resurgence in the movement to defend Black life, the opportunity to flip the senate in 2021 through Georgia, and our work to help make the “red wave” a myth in 2022 were all accompanied by increases in donations. In between those moments, and in electoral “off-years” like 2023, we’ve gone through some more challenging stretches. But through it all, thanks to donors who believe in our vision, we have been able to maintain a stable footing. At the Working Families Party, our long-term vision is of a society rooted in equality, dignity, solidarity, and compassion, where everyone has a voice — regardless of how much money you have. **Our vision requires building governing power by and for working class people of all races. And it calls for out-organizing corporate and conservative donors by pooling our resources together to build our financial independence.** When you give to WFP now through the end of the year, you are joining with tens of thousands of others, each giving what they can, to help us work towards this vision, together. **[We know that different people can step up in different ways – and if you’re someone who can give right now, please do. No matter the amount, your support makes a difference. clean_body: I wanted to send a quick update about our fundraising since we’re just a few days away from the end of 2023. | | | Hi, Peter, this is Braeden — the Development Director here at WFP. I wanted to send a quick update about our fundraising since we’re just a few days away from the end of 2023. Over the last few years, our movement and our party have grown through the generosity of individuals who share our vision, doing what they can. For some folks, that is giving $1 or $3 at a time — while others are able to give more. I’m excited to share that thanks to a generous (real!) individual donor, we will be able to match ALL online contributions from right now through the end of the year. That means when you contribute $1, $5, or $10 today through December 31st, the impact of your contribution will be doubled. Since I started at WFP almost five years ago, we have seen both surges and downturns in fundraising. The effort to deny Trump a second term in 2020 alongside a resurgence in the movement to defend Black life, the opportunity to flip the senate in 2021 through Georgia, and our work to help make the “red wave” a myth in 2022 were all accompanied by increases in donations. In between those moments, and in electoral “off-years” like 2023, we’ve gone through some more challenging stretches. But through it all, thanks to donors who believe in our vision, we have been able to maintain a stable footing. At the Working Families Party, our long-term vision is of a society rooted in equality, dignity, solidarity, and compassion, where everyone has a voice — regardless of how much money you have. Our vision requires building governing power by and for working class people of all races. And it calls for out-organizing corporate and conservative donors by pooling our resources together to build our financial independence. When you give to WFP now through the end of the year, you are joining with tens of thousands of others, each giving what they can, to help us work towards this vision, together. Gratefully, Braeden Lentz Development Director Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

name: Roland Gutierrez
subject: It’s time for Ted Cruz and his political stunts to end, Peter. Are you with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas
body:
You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=By4iaF%2B2ulrlhfHG7czvRVE8EE%2B8NTutfcInG3zOLun01bABxSEhq2G5%2F6nrkrTPMgTbWN1OdN28UcPgK3PCPPH3bfjxqsthXxOr2phxj5l2anOmvbIV7yuHnax30jMusFfChdbPSJfEnG1bXFtmGXAtYT5URBEY%2BsPK8CaEJP%2FwY4g4DkNYiwriq%2FZde3WeZMHFRVkyS4MVt0D%2BORjTBtspeG7hgqZX5lj9iYFoNcu%2FP2%2BMzRu6%2Fcq5fS9EzvRLoWHaaCM0zS8BY71hHqn%2BluKXzyOqe7UMQRJOf1qO%2FFm6s5Xh3%2BSAJOhlm7UJN4xzBQXi%2BaktNrSOFeqmahq3JDWLGf%2FcSaQGUgx782OYoiu2DHy6%2FH%2FEm7pyX%2BBdDexKrjGXMaaSCHBdRUu8BY3RSZZf7Y8FizzvPnBg3RcKA14gDBdew%2F5rAFK7EX8dGpBq .
secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25 [secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25]
Peter, it’s Roland Gutierrez.
I recently joined my fellow Texan, Joaquin Castro, on MSNBC to discuss the latest Washington efforts to address America’s southern border.
Take a look at what I had to say — and then, if you’re able, chip in $5, $10, or even $15 to help me defeat Ted Cruz and bring real leadership to this critical issue for our country. >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Look, Peter: Buoys and the Trump wall aren’t border security. They’re stunts.
We need real immigration reform that will put our economy on steroids
We need to have the Hispanic caucus at the bargaining table.
And we need to talk about things that we know will work, like giving citizenship to DREAMers and providing a pathway to citizenship for undocumented immigrants.
But as long as Ted Cruz represents Texas in the United States Senate, he and his Republican colleagues will continue to play political games.

We’re reaching out to our strongest supporters ahead of our end-of-year deadline.
Team,

We’re just days away from our end-of-year fundraising deadline. We set an ambitious online fundraising goal to help us start the election year off on strong footing so we can flip NY-17 and retake the House majority.

With not much time left, we’re not on track to reach our goal. We’re going through our records and reaching out to our strongest supporters to see if they can help us get across the finish line before the new year.

Take a look at what we have on file for you: | **2023 Supporter Record for dpwillis67@gmail.com**

**Donor status:** Non-Donor
**Suggested donation:** $5

Look—it’s critical that we don’t fall short of our end-of-year goal. _Punchbowl News_ called NY-17 one of the top races that will determine the House majority next year, and election experts are calling the match-up between Mondaire and Mike Lawler a “toss-up.”

That’s why national Republicans and corporate PACs have wasted no time raising money for Lawler. We need the support of this grassroots team to ensure we have the resources to keep up.

**[If you’ve been waiting for the right time to make your first donation to Mondaire’s campaign, this is it. Please chip in before our end-of-year deadline to help us defeat Lawler and retake the House majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75845114/445898357/-1250271359?refcode=em23_231226_eoy2_fndd_gq_ndn___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231226_eoy2_fndd_gq_ndn___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e5dc6095-18a4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWRjNjA5NS0xOGE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tcDxNvSrley6hZ1SY2kDHEejaqlQQnyyh5Ydx59iakk=)**

Thank you,

Team Mondaire

Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. clean_body: We’re reaching out to our strongest supporters ahead of our end-of-year deadline. Team, We’re just days away from our end-of-year fundraising deadline. We set an ambitious online fundraising goal to help us start the election year off on strong footing so we can flip NY-17 and retake the House majority. With not much time left, we’re not on track to reach our goal. We’re going through our records and reaching out to our strongest supporters to see if they can help us get across the finish line before the new year. Take a look at what we have on file for you: | 2023 Supporter Record for dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor status: Non-Donor Suggested donation: $5 According to our records, you haven't yet made a donation in 2023. = = If you've recently donated at an event or with a different email address, thank you! Your online record may not be up to date, but don't worry—we've received your donation and will update our records accordingly. Look—it’s critical that we don’t fall short of our end-of-year goal. Punchbowl News called NY-17 one of the top races that will determine the House majority next year, and election experts are calling the match-up between Mondaire and Mike Lawler a “toss-up.” That’s why national Republicans and corporate PACs have wasted no time raising money for Lawler. We need the support of this grassroots team to ensure we have the resources to keep up. = Thank you, Team Mondaire Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. = = = PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

body:
| Your support means everything to Adam — it shows that you believe in him and want to see him represent and advocate for Californians in the Senate.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4855%2E5257348%2E72iaMT)
Hey Derek — We know you’re probably enjoying well-deserved quality time with your family at the moment, so we’ll keep this brief: **[Is there anything we can say to convince you to donate to Adam’s Senate campaign?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20231226_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=4855%2E5257348%2E72iaMT)**

Friend, Last year, Rep. Summer Lee overcame more than $4 million in attack ads and mailers from the anti-Palestinian group AIPAC and its network of PACs. She became the first Black woman to represent Pennsylvania in Congress. And in her first term, she’s been courageously leading calls for a ceasefire. **Summer has been by my side, holding the Israeli and U.S. governments accountable for war crimes and human rights violations.** She joined me in voting against HR 894, a dangerous resolution conflating anti-Zionism with antisemitism that could silence and criminalize our movement. **Because Summer Lee and I are standing up for human rights for all people (including Palestinians), right-wing groups that want to continue the genocide of the Palestinian people are planning to spend at least $100 million in an attempt to defeat us in next year’s elections.** [**Can you split a donation today between my and Rep. Summer Lee’s re-election campaigns? Like me, Summer Lee ran for Congress after having spent years as a grassroots organizer and state legislator, where she fought against corporate greed, systemic racism, worker exploitation, and environmental injustices.
Like me, her priorities include fully funding the replacement of all lead water lines, and ensuring that clean air and water are treated like the human rights they are.
Like me, she doesn’t take money from corporate PACs, and she stays true to herself and her values to sanctify all life—without exceptions. She continues to act with moral courage despite political risks.
**Together, we’re taking on oppression in our communities and around the world. We will keep standing up for marginalized people, including Palestinians. But we’re up against right-wing groups that want to undermine our democracy and kick us out of Congress.**

clean_body: [] Dear Peter, We hope you had a wonderful holiday! As we gear up for an exciting new year, we want to remind you of the special event happening on December 28th: "‘Tis the Season To Thrive - Community Building in 2024 and Beyond". Your support as a Valued Member of our community has been phenomenal, and we can't wait to see you at our 60-minute online fundraiser. This is your chance to become a Founding Member or sponsor of a transformative journey for GA-12 and to help us strengthen the fabric of our communities. CLICK HERE TO REGISTER [] Don't forget, the event will be hosted by our very own Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson. Your presence will greatly contribute to the discourse and direction of our collective future. Mark your calendar: 🗓 Date: Thursday, December 28th 🕒 Time: 7:30pm EST 📍 Location: Online - *The viewing link will follow in a separate email Our Future Together Matters! Together, let's build a brighter 2024 and beyond! Warmest regards, Team Liz Johnson For Us Lizjohnsonforus.com [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ ] Liz Johnson for Us 2024 P.O. BOX 1404 Statesboro, GA 30459 United States Want to change how you receive these emails? You can update your preferences [] or unsubscribe from this list []. [] []

Hi Derek,

My team tells me we're behind on our end-of-quarter fundraising numbers, and we can't afford to go into 2024 without hitting our goals. That's why I'm asking for your help, Derek.

I'm running for reelection in Western PA to protect the Common Good from corporate jagoffs and extremist politicians. I've dedicated my life to public service, first in the Navy and now in Congress – where I represent the district I grew up and where I’m raising my own kids.

But I've got right-wing dark money organizations campaigning against me. I won't take a dime from extremists or special interest groups. Instead, I rely on people like you, Derek, to help me power this campaign.

Will you join me in fighting to protect the Common Good? My team and I are behind on our crucial end-of-quarter fundraising goal, and I need your help to stay in this fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del_email?refcode=231226_cd_eoq1_l1]

Chip in [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del_email?refcode=231226_cd_eoq1_b1]

Thank you for your support, Derek. You're the reason I'm in this race.

– Chris Deluzio

But first, let us explain why your support is so critical at this moment: 1. We need resources to plan our spending to win this race! We are planning our spending for voter communication, as well as our on-the-ground programs to spread the word about Joanna to undecided voters. All these efforts take resources, which makes this FEC deadline all the more urgent. 2. Our final FEC fundraising deadline of 2023 – and the last FEC deadline before the March primary – is in just 5 days. Come January, our fundraising over the last three months will go public for everyone to see – including our opponents. 3. This race continues to be one of the most competitive in the entire country. Political experts at the Cook Political Report rank CA-47 as a must-win district for Democrats to retake the House majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Joanna Weiss HQ =** | Joanna's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Joanna's campaign = To learn more about Joanna, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . PAID FOR BY JOANNA WEISS FOR CONGRESS Joanna Weiss for Congress PO Box 3122 Costa Mesa, CA 92628 United States

| | 2023 started with the drama of House Republicans attempting to elect a new Speaker of the House. And after Kevin McCarthy gave promise after promise to the most extreme wing of his party, it wasn't hard to see that the chaos in the House was far from over. McCarthy wound up ousted as Speaker in October because MAGA Republicans were angry that he avoided a government shutdown. And so for more than three weeks after that, we were forced to endure House Republicans' petty fights as they attempted to secure a potential replacement. Finally, from the fray, Rep. Mike Johnson emerged and was elected the new Speaker of the House. It's obvious why he consolidated support — take a look at just a few of his positions:
* He orchestrated the effort to overturn the 2020 Presidential Election
* He proposed a nationwide abortion ban and celebrated the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_
* He's voiced his desire to make cuts to Medicare and Social Security

The Republican Party has shown us time and time again that it is well out of step with the challenges facing American families, and prefers to sow chaos rather than govern. **And if we're not careful, the extremism that has gripped the House could take over the Senate next.** [**With our end-of-year deadline fast approaching, I need your help as I fight to help Democrats flip back the House — and keep our Senate majority. And across the country, Democrats are defending a one-seat Senate majority and facing tough fights from Montana to Nevada to Ohio to Wisconsin to Pennsylvania. **I'm fighting hard to help Democrats mobilize in the races that will determine control of Congress, and I need your help to do it.** [**In 2024, we need to restore a Democratic majority to the House, keep GOP extremism out of the Senate, and once and for all put a stop to the politics of power over people. clean_body: We can’t afford to let the GOP’s extremism prevail. | | | | 2023 started with the drama of House Republicans attempting to elect a new Speaker of the House. And after Kevin McCarthy gave promise after promise to the most extreme wing of his party, it wasn't hard to see that the chaos in the House was far from over. McCarthy wound up ousted as Speaker in October because MAGA Republicans were angry that he avoided a government shutdown. And so for more than three weeks after that, we were forced to endure House Republicans' petty fights as they attempted to secure a potential replacement. Finally, from the fray, Rep. Mike Johnson emerged and was elected the new Speaker of the House. It's obvious why he consolidated support — take a look at just a few of his positions: He orchestrated the effort to overturn the 2020 Presidential Election He proposed a nationwide abortion ban and celebrated the overturning of Roe v. Wade He's voiced his desire to make cuts to Medicare and Social Security The Republican Party has shown us time and time again that it is well out of step with the challenges facing American families, and prefers to sow chaos rather than govern. And if we're not careful, the extremism that has gripped the House could take over the Senate next. = = Oregon will see at least 3 competitive House races next year. And across the country, Democrats are defending a one-seat Senate majority and facing tough fights from Montana to Nevada to Ohio to Wisconsin to Pennsylvania. I'm fighting hard to help Democrats mobilize in the races that will determine control of Congress, and I need your help to do it. = Grateful for your support, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by ** Wyden for Senate P.O. Box 3498 Portland, OR 97208 United States Email is an important way for Ron Wyden to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

I'd like to personally invite you to the '**Voice of the People: Jameson Ellis Grassroots Initiative** ' training **tomorrow at 6:30 PM CST via Zoom**. This is more than a meeting; it's the start of something big in grassroots campaigning.
This training is for the Jameson Ellis for Congress Grassroots Volunteer Team _only_.
**A few things:**

Don't miss this unique opportunity to be at the forefront of defeating Dan Crenshaw and restoring liberty!

body:
Enjoy the Holidays |
---
| | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=34ea1139b2&e=1090c5c412)

|
---
| Dear Friends and Neighbors,

My wife Susan and I hope you are enjoying time with friends and family as you reflect on the abundant blessings we enjoy as Americans. We have a lot of problems in our country, but it's still the best place to be in the whole world. Thank God for that.

This holiday season, please remember the young men and women deployed far away in dangerous places who are protecting our freedoms. Yesterday on Christmas, three Americans were wounded in an attack in northern Iraq. The bad guys never take a holiday.

**Keep America Free.**

_Kevin Dellicker is a Republican from Heidelberg Township, Lehigh County, running for U.S. House of Representatives in Pa.’s 7th District. He is a 28-year military veteran, technology company owner, husband and father to three sons. He’s not a career politician. He’s an experienced leader with the courage and expertise to Keep America Free. Learn more at[www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=3faf132954&e=1090c5c412)._

**Please consider volunteering and/or making a campaign donation.**

**Learn more about Kevin's campaign at[www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=5744cb779f&e=1090c5c412). **

Thank you!

Our campaign was pleased to collect a carload of donations for the Valor Clinic in Kunkletown, which serves homeless veterans throughout our region. Thanks to Cherry's Family Restaurant in Kresgeville for hosting our "Giving Christmas" event.

name: Team Cori
subject: No matter how much they spend, Cori won’t back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
AIPAC is set to spend $100 million to oust Cori and other members of the movement for ceasefire from Congress in 2024. | |
---
Peter, **** **** **** As the year comes towards an end, it’s important we address the $100 million elephant in the room: AIPAC. AIPAC is a right-wing PAC that funded over 100 insurrectionist Republicans and is funded by Republican mega donors. AIPAC often targets progressive candidates of color, especially Black progressive women like Cori. And **AIPAC is planning on spending $100 million to oust Cori and other members of the movement for ceasefire from Congress in 2024.** AIPAC is a smear machine. They twist our words, distort truth, and purposely mislead and spread misinformation. They’ve established an infrastructure in which they spend tens of millions of dollars to buy politicians, but you know what: Cori will never be bought off. Her loyalty is to the people. **[Can you donate $10 today to help our campaign defend ourselves against these attacks from AIPAC in 2024, so that Cori can continue to lead on her pro-humanity, pro-peace clean_body: AIPAC is set to spend $100 million to oust Cori and other members of the movement for ceasefire from Congress in 2024. | | Peter, ** As the year comes towards an end, it’s important we address the $100 million elephant in the room: AIPAC. AIPAC is a right-wing PAC that funded over 100 insurrectionist Republicans and is funded by Republican mega donors. AIPAC often targets progressive candidates of color, especially Black progressive women like Cori. And AIPAC is planning on spending $100 million to oust Cori and other members of the movement for ceasefire from Congress in 2024. AIPAC is a smear machine. They twist our words, distort truth, and purposely mislead and spread misinformation. They’ve established an infrastructure in which they spend tens of millions of dollars to buy politicians, but you know what: Cori will never be bought off. Her loyalty is to the people. Want to know why they’re spending $100 million against Cori and other leaders pushing for a pro-peace, pro-humanity agenda? Becausethey’re afraid of how large our movement’s grown. Over the last few months, we’ve seen so many people from our country take to the streets to advocate for an end to the bloodshed, and poll after poll have shown that the majority of people, not just Democrats, want a ceasefire now. They will continue to work to fund primary challenges against Cori. They will continue to try to intimidate Cori and every member of Congress arguing for the humanity of Palestinians, but it won’t work. Cori will keep speaking up for what’s right. She will keep speaking the truth. Speaking out against unjust policies is something Cori will never shy away from. People’s lives depend on us shining a light on these abuses and not backing down. And we know the price for speaking our truth: $100,000,000. AIPAC and other corporate super PACs are going to spend this ridiculous amount of money to punish Cori and all those pushing for a ceasefire and an end to this violence. They want to teach our movement a lesson, but let’s teach them this: no matter how much you spend, you can’t buy us off and you can’t win against the people’s will. Friend,

This is day one of our end-of-year sprint to our FEC fundraising deadline, and right now, we are $11,000 short of raising the $37,000 we've set out to earn every day this week.

We hate to ask this right after the holidays, but we need you to step up before the day ends to help us hit our daily fundraising goal.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=66cb46d333a3754c237666a7f646281d2c255b9a8d135d403b2861e60bd1a7f934a0ea05ce9e0ddb018a8a93342fa0e71c869a9dbc308d1afe9ac516777033e1
Help us out by donating any amount before midnight

With just a few hours left until midnight, we don't have much time to stay on pace—and we CANNOT fall behind now.

We cannot afford to fall behind during this critical stretch. If we do not put up good numbers at the end of this FEC fundraising period it will hurt our chances of winning in Iowa and New Hampshire next month.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=66cb46d333a3754ca3c2b91c601451553661e9aff8cde752ed3e6928fa8fd88d7f9c918f56e8ad917ad66b255a6edcf21f8117bd222057ba7bcb536f1dfd5644

Team DeSantis

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=66cb46d333a3754c237666a7f646281d2c255b9a8d135d403b2861e60bd1a7f934a0ea05ce9e0ddb018a8a93342fa0e71c869a9dbc308d1afe9ac516777033e1

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=66cb46d333a3754c237666a7f646281d2c255b9a8d135d403b2861e60bd1a7f934a0ea05ce9e0ddb018a8a93342fa0e71c869a9dbc308d1afe9ac516777033e1

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Friend, This is day one of our end-of-year sprint to our FEC fundraising deadline, and right now, we are $11,000 short of raising the $37,000 we've set out to earn every day this week. We hate to ask this right after the holidays, but we need you to step up before the day ends to help us hit our daily fundraising goal. Help us out by donating any amount before midnight With just a few hours left until midnight, we don't have much time to stay on pace—and we CANNOT fall behind now. We cannot afford to fall behind during this critical stretch. If we do not put up good numbers at the end of this FEC fundraising period it will hurt our chances of winning in Iowa and New Hampshire next month. Chip in $25 before 11:59 pm Chip in $47 before 11:59 pm Chip in $75 before 11:59 pm Chip in $100 before 11:59 pm Friend, how much we raise this week will play a direct role in influencing the election results soon to come out of Iowa and New Hampshire. This is when it counts the MOST. Thanks for your support, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead. If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win. Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75851135/445909475/-898110066?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODk5Y2NhMDYtMjFhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FxfAee6nyAq5_U2ScrCzMtCsaQqp0iQY5adobwk37Jk=)
Hi there, what a year!

It’s been a little over 7 months since we started this race, and as I look back on 2023, I’m inspired by the thousands of people we’ve met on the campaign trail to flip AZ-01 from red to blue. It’s clear that Arizonans want better representation than do-nothing extremist Rep. David Schweikert. I’m ready to get to work.

So today I want to recap some of my favorite moments from the campaign trail this year. I’m proud of the coalition we have built so far, and I’m grateful that you’re on this journey with me.

[**Before I get into it, can I count on you to chip in $3 toward our end-of-year goal to help fund future campaign events, door knocking, and more as we head into the election year?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75851136/445909476/-381882994?refcode=em-12.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODk5Y2NhMDYtMjFhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FxfAee6nyAq5_U2ScrCzMtCsaQqp0iQY5adobwk37Jk=)

Thank you,

Marlene
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75851137/445909477/-381882994?refcode=em-12.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODk5Y2NhMDYtMjFhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FxfAee6nyAq5_U2ScrCzMtCsaQqp0iQY5adobwk37Jk=)****
---

* * *

**I’m committed to meeting with voters in AZ-01 to share my vision for our community.** Earlier this month, I met with active Maricopa County Democrats to do just that.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75851138/445909478/-381882994?refcode=em-12.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODk5Y2NhMDYtMjFhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FxfAee6nyAq5_U2ScrCzMtCsaQqp0iQY5adobwk37Jk=)
**I’m proud of how far our grassroots campaign has come these last several months – we’ve put together quite the coalition.** One of my very first endorsements came from former Rep. Ann Kirkpatrick (pictured below). I’m grateful to the leaders from Arizona and across the country, local organizations including the Professional Firefighters of Arizona, and more who have joined Team Marlene.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75851139/445909479/-381882994?refcode=em-12.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODk5Y2NhMDYtMjFhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FxfAee6nyAq5_U2ScrCzMtCsaQqp0iQY5adobwk37Jk=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75851140/445909480/-381882994?refcode=em-12.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODk5Y2NhMDYtMjFhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FxfAee6nyAq5_U2ScrCzMtCsaQqp0iQY5adobwk37Jk=)
**I’ve lost count of how many LD meetings I’ve attended and how many house parties my team and I have put on in this last year.** This is a key way to hear real feedback from Arizonans about what they want to see in this district – something that is critically important to our campaign going forward.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75851141/445909481/-381882994?refcode=em-12.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODk5Y2NhMDYtMjFhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FxfAee6nyAq5_U2ScrCzMtCsaQqp0iQY5adobwk37Jk=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75851142/445909482/-381882994?refcode=em-12.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODk5Y2NhMDYtMjFhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FxfAee6nyAq5_U2ScrCzMtCsaQqp0iQY5adobwk37Jk=)
**And finally, I connected with voters of all ages.** My meeting with the ASU Young Dems was one of the highlights of the year – our future is in great hands with our young people, and as leaders we must continue to inspire them.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75851143/445909483/-381882994?refcode=em-12.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODk5Y2NhMDYtMjFhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FxfAee6nyAq5_U2ScrCzMtCsaQqp0iQY5adobwk37Jk=)
I’m energized by the progress we’ve made this year toward our ultimate goal of flipping AZ-01 and ousting our far-right extremist opponent David Schweikert.

In 2024, we’re hitting the ground running with more events across the district to connect with undecided voters and supporters alike. Our campaign grows with every passing day, and soon enough we’ll officially be in our critical election year.

[**Thank you for standing with me throughout this year. Will you continue to support our campaign with a $3 donation today? Every dollar helps us do more in the district to win this seat.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75851144/445909484/-381882994?refcode=em-12.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODk5Y2NhMDYtMjFhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FxfAee6nyAq5_U2ScrCzMtCsaQqp0iQY5adobwk37Jk=)

Thank you,

Marlene
