clean_body: | = Hi there, what a year! It’s been a little over 7 months since we started this race, and as I look back on 2023, I’m inspired by the thousands of people we’ve met on the campaign trail to flip AZ-01 from red to blue. It’s clear that Arizonans want better representation than do-nothing extremist Rep. David Schweikert. I’m ready to get to work. So today I want to recap some of my favorite moments from the campaign trail this year. I’m proud of the coalition we have built so far, and I’m grateful that you’re on this journey with me. = Thank you, Marlene | **= I’m committed to meeting with voters in AZ-01 to share my vision for our community. Earlier this month, I met with active Maricopa County Democrats to do just that. = I’m proud of how far our grassroots campaign has come these last several months – we’ve put together quite the coalition. One of my very first endorsements came from former Rep. Ann Kirkpatrick (pictured below). I’m grateful to the leaders from Arizona and across the country, local organizations including the Professional Firefighters of Arizona, and more who have joined Team Marlene. = = I’ve lost count of how many LD meetings I’ve attended and how many house parties my team and I have put on in this last year. This is a key way to hear real feedback from Arizonans about what they want to see in this district – something that is critically important to our campaign going forward. = = And finally, I connected with voters of all ages. My meeting with the ASU Young Dems was one of the highlights of the year – our future is in great hands with our young people, and as leaders we must continue to inspire them. = I’m energized by the progress we’ve made this year toward our ultimate goal of flipping AZ-01 and ousting our far-right extremist opponent David Schweikert. In 2024, we’re hitting the ground running with more events across the district to connect with undecided voters and supporters alike. Our campaign grows with every passing day, and soon enough we’ll officially be in our critical election year. = Thank you, Marlene **=** | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Peter, this is urgent! Despite overwhelming public opposition, former Vice President Mike Pence and his GOP allies are shamelessly doubling down on their plans to cut Social Security and Medicare benefits. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75851170/445909506/-2090587605?refcode=em_UTC_FR_MikePenceMedicare_122623_RS_IMG1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NDNhOGY3LTIwYTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LTAwVsWE56-mUOLpx3dX6gE1mhL39qRA7kzLdfJM2B4=) Meanwhile, President Biden has made it clear he will veto any attempt to cut life-saving programs like Social Security and Medicare: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75851174/445909509/-2090587605?refcode=em_UTC_FR_MikePenceMedicare_122623_RS_IMG2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NDNhOGY3LTIwYTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LTAwVsWE56-mUOLpx3dX6gE1mhL39qRA7kzLdfJM2B4=) Millions of Americans have worked their entire lives to earn these benefits, and we can't let the GOP take them away. [Rush a donation to help us send Republicans a strong message: _HANDS OFF OUR BENEFITS_ >>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75851175/445909511/-2090587605?refcode=em_UTC_FR_MikePenceMedicare_122623_RS_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NDNhOGY3LTIwYTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LTAwVsWE56-mUOLpx3dX6gE1mhL39qRA7kzLdfJM2B4=) It’s clear that we can't rely on the GOP to protect what's rightfully ours. clean_body: (re: Social Security and Medicare) | = Peter, this is urgent! Despite overwhelming public opposition, former Vice President Mike Pence and his GOP allies are shamelessly doubling down on their plans to cut Social Security and Medicare benefits. = Meanwhile, President Biden has made it clear he will veto any attempt to cut life-saving programs like Social Security and Medicare: = Millions of Americans have worked their entire lives to earn these benefits, and we can't let the GOP take them away. = It’s clear that we can't rely on the GOP to protect what's rightfully ours. But we can hold them accountable and support President Biden's commitment to these vital programs. Joe is working around the clock to ensure that our seniors can retire with dignity and security. And JAMES PINKERTON: Decades After Reagan, The United States Is Still ‘The Last Best Hope For Man On Earth’

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688168%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nIZVkAxqRJ3cQZbgsAngeA&sysid=1 US Strikes Facilities Used By Iran-Backed Groups In Retaliation For Attack Leaving One American Critically Wounded

The U.S. struck facilities tied to Iran-backed militias after an attack earlier on Monday injured three service members in the most serious attack on American troops in Iraq and Syria, the Pentagon and White House confirmed. U.S. military forces conducted “necessary and proportionate” strikes on the facilities in direct response to the Monday attack by Iran-affiliated Kataib Hezbollah group at Erbil

U.S. retail sales from Nov. 1 to Dec. 24 grew only 3.1%, matching inflation and indicating that consumers are feeling the effects of poor economic conditions, according to a report from Mastercard. The slow growth for retail sales for the holiday season pales in comparison to the last two years, with sales growing 5.3% year-over-year in 2022 and 13.5% in 2021,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
There aren't many Republicans in Congress with records quite as extreme as Ken Calvert's.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75852293/445911915/395234972?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-12-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2NjAwYjA1LTIyYTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OacqKHsZ-SfXJAgEj4po43or2zZDDRVy-p2ZE8ntO5Y=)
---
Peter,

There aren't many Republicans in Congress with records quite as extreme as Ken Calvert's.

_Democracy:_
No on certifying President Biden's victory in 2020

_LGBTQ issues:_
No on the Matthew Shepard & James Byrd Hate Crimes Prevention Act
No on recognizing gay marriage nationally and sought to ban it in California
He publicly outed a former Democratic opponent

_Women’s rights:_
No on the right to Contraception Act
No on the Violence Against Women Act
No on the Equal Rights Amendment
No on the Fair Pay Act

_Sensible gun laws:_
No on assault weapons ban
No on expanding background checks
No on the Protecting Our Kids Act
Yes, to expand conceal and carry laws
Yes, to protect firearms manufacturers from lawsuits

_The environment:_
No on the Inflation Reduction Act, which made historic investments in clean energy
No on protecting people from toxic incinerators
No on recovering America’s wildlife
No on investing in transportation and water infrastructure
No on cracking down on oil company price gouging

**I've said this before, and I still mean it: Lives are at stake in the coming 2024 elections. LGBTQ+ rights are at stake. Our democracy is at stake. The right to choose is at stake -- and so much more.**

[_**Stopping the GOP from retaining House control starts by ousting Ken Calvert here in CA-41. That's why I'm all in on electing Will Rollins, and it's why I'm counting on your support. Please split an urgent $10 between Fight for Progress and Will’s campaign today.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75852294/445911916/395234972?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-12-26_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2NjAwYjA1LTIyYTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OacqKHsZ-SfXJAgEj4po43or2zZDDRVy-p2ZE8ntO5Y=)

name: Bob Lorinser

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Good afternoon, Friend.
My team set a goal to hit 5,000 contributions in our campaign for change before 2024.
I'm proud to say, closing in on the last quarter, we just knocked that fundraising milestone out of the park, and have you to thank.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
But, we're slightly behind in our dollar-amount goal and it's crucial we show the nation what we can do. To hit our final milestone of 2023, we need to push forward. Our average donation is $30.
If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express,
your donation will go through immediately:
EXPRESS DONATE: $20.24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=20.24&refcode=express_lane_20.24#]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
Raising exorbitant amounts of money for campaigns has a corrupting influence on our political system.
I am a fierce advocate for campaign finance reform because candidates who receive funding from giant corporate PACs, ultra-wealthy donors, or dark money may have a windfall, but they don't have people power, and that's not democracy.
I will not compromise
my values to raise money.
To get to DC and influence reform — like overturning Citizens United — our grassroots movement needs fuel.
Today, I'm asking you to help me fight for change. Help me unseat the so-called 'Freedom Caucus' ally, Rep. Jack Bergman. Trump sycophants — and anyone who violated their oath to the Constitution — no longer deserve to represent us in Congress.
If you are able, can you pitch in $20.24, or any other amount? Whether $5, $50, or $500, a single contribution can go a long way.
Your support means a lot. Thank you.
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01

shop.votedrbob.com [shop.votedrbob.com]

"Friends of Dr. Bob"
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855

U.S. retail sales from Nov. 1 to Dec. 24 grew only 3.1%, matching
inflation and indicating that consumers are feeling the effects of
poor economic conditions, according to a report from Mastercard. The
slow growth for retail sales for the holiday season pales in
comparison to the last two years, with sales growing 5.3%
year-over-year in 2022 and 13.5% in 2021,

body:
An Apres Ski conversation with the candidate

|
---

**

Dear Peter,******We're pleased to invite you to an exclusive event to meet Robert F. Kennedy Jr. on New Year's Day in Aspen, Colorado.** As we anticipate the start of a historic New Year, your attendance at this event will help us ring in a new era. As you know, your support is vital to this campaign and the change that is so desperately needed in our beloved country. [](https://www.kennedy24.com/aspen-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aspen_week_of_national_list_12&n=2 "Aspen") Christina Hale, Scottie Upshall, Anthony Kennedy Shriver, Catherine Anne Hennessy, Jodie Fisher and Morgan Law are proud to host a special event at a private venue in the heart of Aspen, Colorado. **Monday, January 1st, 2024** **6:00 PM - 7:00 PM MST
Private Reception with Mr. Kennedy** **7:00 PM - 9:00 PM
Remarks from Mr. Kennedy with Q & A for all guests** Special Performance by Tim Hockenberry The private reception will include remarks from the candidate, a photo opportunity, hors d'oeuvres and cocktails. **[Tickets](https://www.kennedy24.com/aspen-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aspen_week_of_national_list_12&n=3) are available with a campaign contribution of $2,400 and $1,400.** _Apres Ski attire is recommended.

I’ve always considered assisted suicide a form of existential cowardice. It is sought by people who are unable to deal with the two ultimate consequences of being human: mortality and pain (mortality is, by definition, not “chosen”, by the way. Who would choose a life of suffering and mortality if he really had a say in it?). **I mention this because “death with dignity” perfectly describes the Democrat attitude toward democracy.** It is now very obvious that for Democrats, democracy has a terminal diagnosis: Donald Trump. The experts, those very “doctors of democracy” themselves, thought at first that we might be able to beat the disease. After all, back in 2020, democracy was declared in remission!

clean_body: Tucker Launches News Company, Market Corrections, Political Tipping Point, and more... | | | | | | I’ve always considered assisted suicide a form of existential cowardice. It is sought by people who are unable to deal with the two ultimate consequences of being human: mortality and pain (mortality is, by definition, not “chosen”, by the way. Who would choose a life of suffering and mortality if he really had a say in it?). I mention this because “death with dignity” perfectly describes the Democrat attitude toward democracy. It is now very obvious that for Democrats, democracy has a terminal diagnosis: Donald Trump. The experts, those very “doctors of democracy” themselves, thought at first that we might be able to beat the disease. After all, back in 2020, democracy was declared in remission! | MORE ARTICLES MUST SEE VIDEOS | THIS HOLIDAY SEASON, PLEASE SUPPORT OUR SPONSORS | ABOUT THE PRICKLY PEAR The Prickly Pear () is focused on delivering timely, fact-based news, and citizen opinion that reflects our mission to “inform, educate and advocate about the principles of limited government and personal liberty.”Please follow us on Twitter for all our latest content. | | | | | Copyright © 2023. name: Team Shapiro
subject: Josh Shapiro sent you a very long email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:

We’ve gotten a lot of stuff done this year. Here’s just some of it:

When a tanker truck crashed in Northeast Philadelphia under 1-95, we got that road reopened in just 12 days – and we set up a live stream for people to watch the work get done.

We delivered the largest increase in public education funding in the history of Pennsylvania, even with a divided legislature.

We delivered universal free breakfast for 1.7 million Pennsylvania schoolchildren.

We passed the largest targeted tax break for seniors in nearly two decades.

We secured more than a billion dollars in private sector investment. That's more funding for our farmers, and for the first time ever, state funding for minority, women and veteran-owned small businesses.

We sped up government, eliminated backlogs and slashed red tape.

We created a money-back guarantee system for the first time. So if you don't get your permit in time, we'll give you your money back.

We funded nearly 400 new Pennsylvania State Troopers.

On day one, I signed an executive order eliminating the college degree requirement for 92% of state government jobs, because we value skill and experience not arbitrary degree requirements.

We were the only state to secure two regional hydrogen hubs and all the jobs that come with them, making Pennsylvania the center of the clean energy universe for years to come.

And I brought Automatic Voter Registration to Pennsylvania, and in just the first two months, 58,000 people have registered to vote or updated their voter registration status.

When the nation's eyes were on Pennsylvania, we showed that we can do big things again. But there’s still more work to do, and I’m not going to slow down.

**[I’ll keep working my tail off to bring people together to get common sense things done for Pennsylvanians, and I hope I can count on your support in the big fights ahead.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75853740/445916123/396869819?refcode=email_122623_accomplishments-kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2ZmZWQxOC0yN2E0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vj7cAZ3w7c7Y6pDn_A5TEFk0FZye-qPUtEFo8jiBatg=)**

Thanks for taking the time to read this,

Josh

name: Qasim Rashid
subject: Support Qasim Rashid: Help us confront the climate crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY QASIM FOR CONGRESS]
body:
[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/9?t=1001&akid=34583%2E120265%2E0Gd-vX ]Qasim for Congress

Hi, Friend,

I'm Qasim Rashid, and I'm reaching out to you as a fellow advocate for
environmental justice.

As the only Democrat running for Congress in IL-11 who rejects campaign
funding from fossil fuel companies, I am dedicated to making a significant
impact on the climate crisis right here in our district.

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/4317?t=1002&akid=34583%2E120265%2E0Gd-vX ]Click here to donate to our campaign.

The climate crisis, fueled by human activity and fossil fuels, affects us
all. In IL-11, we experience longer droughts, more severe storms, and
increased flooding.

I believe that, together, we can take decisive action to confront this
crisis. More specifically, I promise to:

* Stop issuing new, and withdraw unused, permits for oil drilling on
federal land.
* Invest in clean energy and infrastructure for a carbon-neutral U.S. by
2030.
* End fracking and the debunked science of 'carbon capture' immediately.

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/4317?t=1003&akid=34583%2E120265%2E0Gd-vX ]Click here to donate to our campaign.

Your generosity powers our movement. Every donation, no matter the size,
brings us closer to ensuring environmental justice for communities that
need it most.

Thank you for your support.

Sincerely,

— Qasim Rashid

Donate to our campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/qr-em-footer?t=1004&refcode2=34583_120265_0Gd-vX&akid=34583%2E120265%2E0Gd-vX

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1005&akid=34583%2E120265%2E0Gd-vX
Update Your Information: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/signup/update-your-info/
Unsubscribe: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=34583%2E120265%2E0Gd-vX

Hitting this big milestone is critical to ensure we have the resources we need to take on the GOP at the ballot box next year. Will you split a donation of any amount that’s right for you to my campaign and Roy Cooper?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75854567/445919085/-679975975?refcode=ea.1637c653-2aa4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ms=ea.1637c653-2aa4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjM3YzY1My0yYWE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5UPD6v5m4l-3ndTSFfQ6gjnTcCu2Jnw1INAnNOeK1qk=)** Look, we’re not just up against a politician with dangerous views on women’s reproductive rights, our public education system, and access to the ballot box. clean_body: I promise it’s worth 60 seconds of your time. | Peter, I’ve spent the last seven years as North Carolina’s Attorney General standing up to corporate bad actors and powerful special interests to protect our families. On the other hand, my extremist Republican opponent — Mark Robinson — has a clear track record of supporting extremist policies and peddling conspiracy theories. To put it bluntly: Mark Robinson is wrong for our state, and we cannot afford to let him win the Governor’s race next year. But our race is truly a toss-up — Robinson could still clinch victory. We’ll only stop him if we stand together. = Look, we’re not just up against a politician with dangerous views on women’s reproductive rights, our public education system, and access to the ballot box. We’re up against the national Republican establishment. North Carolina Republicans have spent years preparing for this race, but far-right politicians in DC and beyond are targeting us, too. We can count on them to flood our state with outside money next year. The polls already show us in DEAD HEAT with Mark Robinson, so we need to be ready to respond to whatever attacks the GOP throws our way. That’s why hitting my campaign’s end-of-quarter goal is so important. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thanks, Josh Stein = = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. | | The political analysts at the _Cook Political Report_ just released their initial rankings of all 50 states in the 2024 Presidential election, _**and there are just SIX TOSS UPS.**_

The list:
* Arizona

Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](http://links.redwavepolitics.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6feab24f7075401bbe6a0306df1e01aa&_e=RDVrt8dyPgdZk5yts6nNB5glD9dOoCIt9ln31V3JsOZXLzCuC1KTbVol1C2Z5pBedThLwPVwPDShPA8Guxkalmp61KSfSOx3IaJD6mSkvVJioC-61moLbVlnav6wmhNTBYGWUeV4eQKqbA7wypkoNrOH7WZkTJKM1WqiqpAQn8Rfv87S8haferG2OSB6ekdd0OwJBDQE5DV53_4ZTbzEGWMlU0SYRGidGQWsIFs5cJGnrbiM6evHQmETxnVP83GAhwg2ArzW8dL8YeTqshjapPZ7gbQtjobivKGcgiR2atpZywD0yhVejqjaSeJAIc-XFTqGv_UaWEv_aogkdCkYhW08XYJO4axzcucTfmECrPCtDXn7DDL48ncVTsXeDKo7Lgv_9Rw7xy0vqkaeTHIKGw%3D%3D)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend:**](http://links.redwavepolitics.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6feab24f7075401bbe6a0306df1e01aa&_e=RDVrt8dyPgdZk5yts6nNB5glD9dOoCIt9ln31V3JsOZXLzCuC1KTbVol1C2Z5pBedThLwPVwPDShPA8Guxkalmp61KSfSOx3IaJD6mSkvVJioC-61moLbVlnav6wmhNTBYGWUeV4eQKqbA7wypkoNrOH7WZkTJKM1WqiqpAQn8Rfv87S8haferG2OSB6ekdd0OwJBDQE5DV53_4ZTbzEGWMlU0SYRGidGQWsIFs5cJGnrbiM6evHQmETxnVP83GA7rNCy2zmoBrEehIlL7ui28DWUFbgt3yrUQi2kM5IMmHuj8-Ud1zGm3Wtczja4M4sKKxc-5wBLAUl1BkxBxjr8smtNeXrc7EFqxawCl1pc4YYJ_NdIcKa5MDS5zLIVhYGp77bvRor7VWb-RsUqxN6fQ%3D%3D)

Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today.

I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals.

I intend to make you proud.

God Bless,

Jim Banks

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today. I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

I have been reviewing the names for our official NRSC Roll of Honor, and your name is NOWHERE to be found. _How could you abandon us at such a critical time?_

I have been reviewing the names for our official NRSC Roll of Honor, and your name is NOWHERE to be found. How could you abandon us at such a critical time? Your generous donation will earn you a spot on the Roll of Honor in the Ronald Reagan Republican Center lobby. What is the Roll of Honor? It is for the most loyal patriots who contribute $10 or more to the NRSC and distinguish themselves among our supporters. We need supporters like you, who we can count on when times get tough, and we need your support the most. So, we’ve secured one of the TVs in the Ronald Reagan Republican Center lobby to have a 24/7 roll of names to honor our best supporters. The only way to be featured on our Roll of Honor is to offer a timely contribution before the New Year! Can we count on your support when we need it most? Your place on the Roll of Honor is reserved for you, and WAITING for your contribution to activate it. Senate Republicans are counting on your support at this critical moment. We are preparing our campaign to take back the Senate, and in many places, we are already on the ground campaigning to win. Friend, 2024 is just six days away. If we want ANY chance of saving our Senate majority next fall, it's time to unhitch the trailer and kick things into high gear.
**And it’s not just about our Senate majority — Rick Scott is one of the biggest threats to our country. Period.**
This guy wrote the plan so extreme even Republicans couldn’t win on it! **He wants to end Social Security, end Medicare, and raise taxes on everyone EXCEPT millionaires. Meanwhile, he’s one of the richest members of Congress.**
**[That's why I'm personally asking you to chip in $5 today to help Debbie Mucarsel-Powell (D) hit her $300,000 end-of-quarter goal and flip Florida blue next November. This race is our best and possibly our ONLY chance of saving the Senate majority, and beating one of the worst politicians in America.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75854998/445920821/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk571-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDVjYjIzNTUtMzBhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=J-4FNGo81VwoeQ3OEuGss6fi4BaRPyQbTSbtej5GEuA=)**

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: When I came out in college
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| This is a longer email.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1770%2E35263%2Eh5CleI)
Peter, can I tell you a little bit about how I got to where I am today? This is a slightly longer email than usual, so if you’d rather cut to the chase, **[you can click here to make a donation to my campaign’s end-of-year goal now.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dec23.PriOoE&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20231226_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1770%2E35263%2Eh5CleI)** When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public service, but I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly. After seeing others in the LGBTQ+ community demonstrate acts of courage by coming out, being themselves, and being public about who they are, I came to realize that I could both run for office _and_ be true to myself. I was elected as the first openly gay Senator and I’ve been fighting to make a difference in peoples’ lives ever since. But as a Senator in a swing state like Wisconsin, where elections are won and lost by razor thin margins, **the GOP has made me a top target to defeat.** Republicans are recruiting TWO far-right megamillionaires to run against me in 2024 — _because they know only wealthy self-funders can make up for what the GOP’s deeply unpopular right-wing views lack in grassroots support._ My campaign’s very last public fundraising deadline before 2024 is coming up, and showing up strong is the most meaningful way to prove we have what it takes to keep Wisconsin blue as this race kicks into high gear. **[We’ve come so far, Peter, but Republicans are hell bent on taking us backwards — and stopping them all comes down to defending our Democratic Senate majority. Will you pitch in toward my campaign’s final fundraising goal of the year to help send me back to the Senate?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dec23.PriOoE&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20231226_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1770%2E35263%2Eh5CleI)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-dec23.4hRD_b&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20231226_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1770%2E35263%2Eh5CleI)
---

Friend,
---
Under Joe Biden’s administration, _**600,000**_ illegal immigrants cross America’s borders into our country **every four months**.
---
**That’s more than the entire population of Milwaukee.**
---
I believe we need to secure our border, end the abuse of the asylum process, and prevent fentanyl from flowing into our communities.
---
But dark money liberal groups are targeting me for supporting these common-sense policies and standing up to the Biden-Harris immigration agenda.
---
With well over _**$1,000,000**_ spent on TV ads attacking me so far in 2023, **National Democrats** are working hard to defeat me. They know I won’t back down from pursuing common-sense policies to secure our border.
---
Friend, I could use your support to continue leading the charge to secure our border and put an end to Joe Biden’s immigration crisis.

body:
At the end of the month we’re going to hit our final FEC deadline of the year
#
Derek - just a quick message from VoteVets today.
At the end of the month we’re going to hit our final FEC deadline of the year. After it hits, we’re going to publish our numbers. Everyone’s going to see what we raised and spent over the last year, and they’ll get a good read on our capabilities going into the Election Year.
That goes for friends and foes alike.
If we put up a big number we’ll show them that we’re going to hit the ground running and flood the space with the hardest-hitting ads in politics.
If we’re weaker than we need to be, it’ll show our friends that we can’t afford to support as many candidates. It could show our foes that they’ve got an opening — one they’re sure to exploit.
So please, as we approach this critical deadline, we have a humble request.
[**We need you to make your first donation to VoteVets before that final FEC deadline of the year. Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

clean_body: This is what we need. | = | Peter, At the end of this quarter, we got some shocking news: Josh’s opponent Kevin Lincoln was the #2 GOP fundraiser in the country! Now we’re only 5 days away from our final end-of-quarter deadline of the year and we need your help to make sure we don’t fall behind. According to my calculations, we still need to raise another $20,000. = = = I calculated that if we get 2,000 donations of just $10 before the deadline on Sunday, we can raise the $20,000 we need to reach our goal. And if we do that, we’ll be able to stay competitive with the #2 GOP fundraiser in the country. This goal is going to require every person who sees this to chip in before Sunday. $10 would be a huge help! = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Let’s get this done and have a great New Year! \- Evelyn, Team Harder *

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want you to know the truth
body:
Whether you’ve been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn’t be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you. | |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_s=2986bca08dd4478ebb177a36a70a85bc&_t=Zvt1r_qbX415hvz4F3iWz3_8yeDwPjxEE2jGEoEZwS9nJVhDQv8wNtuaJWbOzQgTsMKl8H7bUAqXNzCCbvFbib1FpzTyhIYBWlKYkwKvGLQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_s=2986bca08dd4478ebb177a36a70a85bc&_t=Zvt1r_qbX415hvz4F3iWz3_8yeDwPjxEE2jGEoEZwS9nJVhDQv8wNtuaJWbOzQgTsMKl8H7bUAqXNzCCbvFbib1FpzTyhIYBWlKYkwKvGLQ%3D)

Hi Fellow Conservative,

Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you.

Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=2986bca08dd4478ebb177a36a70a85bc&_e=4wYcfTsSVcNeCu3wSfSCddRx081UZIppx4iI3wfV89m-_wZtShfDHtc5IIvmNLbAJRmN0m5doHrRPP_V2mlJHpRdCE8DRKJvgOyIN2UpnLf4O68bHfDtVOwC-6JWYLLBJ7t8GsvkNzGMXcYkc2zwnhGvVjbqkJIE1Fqo2DkQkmy27rYDgb2_PDm5UGued4Lu4W8QMkaS1VXM2j2uQTMTT7UPZ31zfKzCfx-X5XZein5DAmV069uzdnnisbYYQXxl9WrmDhrXYZIebiNKYbYDI09LISlkocea1_7e6419Xi4rWDzWPjnODe7Z1VcziGl2WR5Z12nkL8JKQqJUR8yf-mDBjjwDOF3JNJH-DnfCNmeVICbFdZxYRKM8fM5uYNI1)**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable._**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=2986bca08dd4478ebb177a36a70a85bc&_e=4wYcfTsSVcNeCu3wSfSCddRx081UZIppx4iI3wfV89m-_wZtShfDHtc5IIvmNLbAJRmN0m5doHrRPP_V2mlJHpRdCE8DRKJvgOyIN2UpnLf4O68bHfDtVOwC-6JWYLLBJ7t8GsvkNzGMXcYkc2zwnhGvVjbqkJIE1Fqo2DkQkmy27rYDgb2_PDm5UGued4Lu4W8QMkaS1VXM2j2uQTMTT7UPZ31zfKzCfx-X5XZein4PQIy-2w2HRMPT3-fOEFfQ146Dv7jzvhh_BYvi-36nhv7oxe1TsqToi5nTvybpfbH1ZYa3RkbWoML8rSS26_lklNx-ZIsiWb5-0UjLu-B9wcnWAnemzSiedvAmZnEWvewtu32KmFJmKLLLg5vK7X1q)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.

---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.** ➡️

It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.
---
| | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=2986bca08dd4478ebb177a36a70a85bc&_e=4wYcfTsSVcNeCu3wSfSCddRx081UZIppx4iI3wfV89m-_wZtShfDHtc5IIvmNLbAJRmN0m5doHrRPP_V2mlJHpRdCE8DRKJvgOyIN2UpnLf4O68bHfDtVOwC-6JWYLLBJ7t8GsvkNzGMXcYkc2zwnhGvVjbqkJIE1Fqo2DkQkmy27rYDgb2_PDm5UGued4Lu4W8QMkaS1VXM2j2uQTMTT7UPZ31zfKzCfx-X5XZein4UPJ7wvaQZ5eCmKBdsNyLixNAKdaZH-hOvSVPrOul0t6o0raVRmml4Z-Kq1z6C4-ET9oTaI2jXLSS4-QbAEf_EQzakrLxvuf42Ax__l2PqYbwCzoLLZDFAXEWePYgYXhjkGlqBRcWgu4srwjrjMFcu)
---
When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=2986bca08dd4478ebb177a36a70a85bc&_e=4wYcfTsSVcNeCu3wSfSCddRx081UZIppx4iI3wfV89m-_wZtShfDHtc5IIvmNLbAJRmN0m5doHrRPP_V2mlJHpRdCE8DRKJvgOyIN2UpnLf4O68bHfDtVOwC-6JWYLLBJ7t8GsvkNzGMXcYkc2zwnhGvVjbqkJIE1Fqo2DkQkmy27rYDgb2_PDm5UGued4Lu4W8QMkaS1VXM2j2uQTMTT7UPZ31zfKzCfx-X5XZein5qFlHP1ChaIGESlzAreKeup-wFzaa0jEk6jcX747YEfv1h83hGSNH8ooPLQyf96j28SbIfCyXALDLT6tLPDyhNGf2Zpnb8UAN8WUeWS1j6wKQq_RRbrYPz3zktZ6qQM0fcxoyG215LRjLpehIE3lPA)

clean_body: Whether you’ve been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn’t be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you. | | | | | Hi Fellow Conservative, Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you. Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable.Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. | | When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, our campaign is catching fire, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will showcase the tremendous momentum we have gained! | | | | | - | | Fellow Conservative, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. name: Zach Shrewsbury
subject: Which side are you on?
body:
| | | [ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQQgKpCQx3A-ttyWpaLdNfpIH7B99p6-YyLOUcfb70geI&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=122623_labor&n=1)
---
Dear Friend, It's no secret that I am a proud supporter of the labor movement. Union blood runs in my veins like it does many Mountaineers. My grandfather worked in the coal mines in West Virginia. He was a United Mine Workers of America (UMWA) member. He supported his family on the wages and benefits UMWA miners fought for and won from the coal barons. I've always known which side I was on. The phrase "Which Side Are You On" comes from the memorable song by Florence Reece, wife of UMWA organizer Sam Reece, during a bitter labor strike in the coalfields of Harlan County, Kentucky, in 1931. The local Sheriff, sent by the coal barons, broke into their home and threatened physical harm to the Reece family to stop them from supporting the strike. Afterward, Florence sat down and wrote the haunting lyrics, later popularized by Peter Seeger. To this day, the song is still a major part of union events. **I am and always will be on the side of workers fighting to organize against fierce employer opposition.** Whether at Amazon, Starbucks, automobile plants, UPS, hospitals, or large universities, 2023 has been a year of workers fighting an uphill battle to negotiate contracts that improve their wages, hours, benefits, and working conditions. No matter their industry or the fight, I will always be on the side of unions. The recently concluded strike by the United Auto Workers (UAW) led to one of the best labor agreements for workers. Their new contract provides for a 25% wage increase over the next four and a half years, reinstated cost-of-living adjustments, increased employer 401K contributions, higher starting wages, the right to strike over future plant closures, and abolishes the two-tier wage system. None of this would have happened without the courage and sacrifice of rank-and-file members fighting for themselves and their families. However, the power of mega-corporations like Starbucks and Amazon to resist negotiating in good faith with their newly organized workers demonstrates the obstacles we face in our labor laws. Since 1980, wage inequality has grown in tandem with the decline in union power. No act of God caused that. It was deliberate policy decisions driven by politicians beholden to their big-money donors and business allies at the expense of the working class. **We need to pass labor law reform that protects the right to organize and disincentivizes employers who refuse to negotiate in good faith with their workers.** Unlike the highly organized and experienced UAW, workers in non-unionized industries need help in getting started. I support the Protect the Right to Organize Act, which would accomplish just that. As the next Senator from West Virginia, I will fight to pass this and other laws to strengthen workers' rights and uplift working people across this country. In his epic song, The Times They Are a-Changin' Bob Dylan wrote, "There's a battle outside and it's ragin'." I stand firmly on the side of the workers in this battle. **[Will you join me by donating today to propel our campaign to victory in 2024, helping secure the Senate to make the Protect the Right to Organize Act possible and ensure workers have a new Senate champion?](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQQgKpCQx3A-ttyWpaLdNfpIH7B99p6-YyLOUcfb70geI&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=122623_labor&n=2)** In Solidarity, Zach Shrewsbury, Candidate, U.S. Senate (D-WV)
---
| [](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQQgKpCQx3A-ttyWpaLdNfpIH7B99p6-YyLOUcfb70geI&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=122623_labor&n=3 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQQgKpCQx3A-ttyWpaLdNfpIH7B99p6-YyLOUcfb70geI&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=122623_labor&n=3)

[ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQQgKpCQx3A-ttyWpaLdNfpIH7B99p6-YyLOUcfb70geI&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=122623_labor&n=4)
---
Zach Shrewsbury (D-WV) is running for the U.S. Senate seat as the only Democrat in the race. A native West Virginian, a Marine Corps veteran, and a grandson of a coal miner, Zach has a passion for making a difference in his community. He has seen firsthand the struggles faced by working families who are just trying to get by. Zach's military service experiences and his work as a community and climate justice organizer shaped his commitment to fighting for social and economic justice, and he's dedicated his career to making a difference in people's lives. **[For Democrats to keep the Senate, Zach has to win. Support the campaign today.](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQQgKpCQx3A-ttyWpaLdNfpIH7B99p6-YyLOUcfb70geI&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=122623_labor&n=5)**

Friend,
_We’ve got big plans for early 2024._
When the calendar switches over, the race is officially on: time will be our biggest enemy, and we will need YOU to help us stay on track. We cannot afford to fall behind and falter in this absolute critical mission to flick Jim Jordan into the dustbin of history.
The people that my team and I talk to every day are ready for change. They are desperate for something new, someone different, and a person of integrity, grit, and passion who will take up their cause and FIGHT for THEM. **
****I am the woman that will defeat Jim Jordan, and I am that person that my constituents are looking for.** But I can’t do any of this alone—I truly rely on you, friend, to hit our marks and stay on track to win.
[**So if you can, will you send in a $25 donation to power our work to defeat Jim Jordan before the end of the year?**](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDg2NjM3OTE5NTk0MTA0NzQsXCJyXCI6MTA4NjYzODMyNTAzNjQ5NTYxfSIsInMiOiI5YjIwN2UxY2FhMjViZDFiIn0) [](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDg2NjM3OTE5NjQ2NTMzNTUsXCJyXCI6MTA4NjYzODMyNTAzNjQ5NTYxfSIsInMiOiI0NGM5YzAyOWY5ZmUzOGExIn0)

Hello Friend,

The deep state has entrenched itself in every major federal institution. I call them government gangsters because they use their power as leverage against Americans to unlawfully influence elections.

If Congress is serious about tackling the weaponization of government, then here is the subpoena list I recommend.

_You may ask yourself, “What credibility does this guy have?!”_

Good question.

I led the Russia Gate investigation for the House Intelligence Committee in Congress. When Devin Nunes asked me to run the investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, good or bad, had to be published- he said yes, and we did just that.

My investigation discovered it was a fraud, and the DOJ/FBI investigation was unlawful. They did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump and thought they would never get caught.

And only after leaving government service 2 years ago did I discover the FBI was spying on me while I served as Senior Counsel on the committee exposing DOJ/FBI illegal acts before the FISA Court to unlawfully surveil President Trump and his campaign. Yes, they subpoenaed my records to get dirt on Devin Nunes because our investigation was exposing FBI/DOJ corruption.

**After my service with President Trump, I founded the Kash Foundation.** The Kash Foundation’s goal is to provide financial assistance to veterans, America-first patriots, and whistle-blowers and fund education programs. As you may know, the Russiagate tactic of the radical left is to baselessly prosecute patriots.

Congressional Subpoena List
1. **Twitter:** Every contract with FBI/DOJ on election projects (the FBI established an 80-agent task force that met with Twitter weekly before the 2022 election).

2. **FBI and Chris Wray:** He has willingly violated a congressional subpoena and must be brought up on contempt of Congress charges.

3. **James Baker:** Former FBI number 1 lawyer who signed off on the unlawful Trump FISA, caught and fired. Later, the Number 2 lawyer at Twitter was also fired.

4. **ALL 51 Intel officials who signed bogus Hunter Biden** laptop letter

5. **Blinken:** He has now lied about his involvement in said letter and must be held to account. Lying to Congress is a federal crime.

6. **Garland:** The IRS whistleblower has submitted a valid claim that the Hunter Biden investigation is being politically obstructed. Garland testified under oath that it had not happened. Someone’s lying.

This is exactly who Congress needs to go after. And guess what? This is only a start!

If you are as concerned about deep state interference, if it is a top priority for you, then please I urge you to support the Kash Foundation.

It’s the only way to save our Republic and defend the rule of law in our country. Please read carefully. Hello Friend, The deep state has entrenched itself in every major federal institution. I call them government gangsters because they use their power as leverage against Americans to unlawfully influence elections. If Congress is serious about tackling the weaponization of government, then here is the subpoena list I recommend. You may ask yourself, “What credibility does this guy have?!” Good question. I led the Russia Gate investigation for the House Intelligence Committee in Congress. When Devin Nunes asked me to run the investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, good or bad, had to be published- he said yes, and we did just that. My investigation discovered it was a fraud, and the DOJ/FBI investigation was unlawful. They did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump and thought they would never get caught. And only after leaving government service 2 years ago did I discover the FBI was spying on me while I served as Senior Counsel on the committee exposing DOJ/FBI illegal acts before the FISA Court to unlawfully surveil President Trump and his campaign. Yes, they subpoenaed my records to get dirt on Devin Nunes because our investigation was exposing FBI/DOJ corruption. After my service with President Trump, I founded the Kash Foundation. The Kash Foundation’s goal is to provide financial assistance to veterans, America-first patriots, and whistle-blowers and fund education programs. As you may know, the Russiagate tactic of the radical left is to baselessly prosecute patriots. I am urgently asking for your help. I am looking to raise $100,000 online this month to secure critical funding for Kash Foundation. Congressional Subpoena List 1. Twitter: Every contract with FBI/DOJ on election projects (the FBI established an 80-agent task force that met with Twitter weekly before the 2022 election). 2. FBI and Chris Wray: He has willingly violated a congressional subpoena and must be brought up on contempt of Congress charges. 3. James Baker: Former FBI number 1 lawyer who signed off on the unlawful Trump FISA, caught and fired. Later, the Number 2 lawyer at Twitter was also fired. 4. ALL 51 Intel officials who signed bogus Hunter Biden laptop letter 5. Blinken: He has now lied about his involvement in said letter and must be held to account. Lying to Congress is a federal crime. 6. Garland: The IRS whistleblower has submitted a valid claim that the Hunter Biden investigation is being politically obstructed. Garland testified under oath that it had not happened. Someone’s lying. This is exactly who Congress needs to go after. And guess what? This is only a start! If you are as concerned about deep state interference, if it is a top priority for you, then please I urge you to support the Kash Foundation. A critical way to uncover the government gangsters is if brave whistleblowers come forward with the TRUTH. But they can’t do so without help. That’s why the Kash Foundation protects patriots from deep-state tyranny. But I can’t do it alone. Your support is critical to our mission. subject: Time is running out to use your Political Tax Credit!
body:
Midnight on December 31st is the deadline to use your Oregon Political Tax Credit. | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75857417/445928614/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhNWZhOGU0LTQwYTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9U_9IZemDbWiwQmyrwwK7euvEASdRZVxWjd9PW-frCU=&emci=06e28751-3fa4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=6a5fa8e4-40a4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=2107230) Peter, Do you know about [**Oregon's Political Tax Credit?** **If you're eligible, you can give $50 or $100 to the OLCV PAC and get your donation back when you file your taxes.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75857418/445928615/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhNWZhOGU0LTQwYTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9U_9IZemDbWiwQmyrwwK7euvEASdRZVxWjd9PW-frCU=&emci=06e28751-3fa4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=6a5fa8e4-40a4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=2107230) It's basically a FREE donation that you can use to help us elect pro-climate and pro-environment candidates! You're eligible if:
* You are an Oregon resident
* You will submit an Oregon tax return for 2023
* You will make less than $75,000 in 2023 (or $150,000 for joint-filing couples)

**2024 is a critical election year with many important races–including attorney general, secretary of state, and treasurer, all statewide races with four-year terms.** We also have to hold Republican legislators who participated in this year's walkout accountable on the ballot. We're building the resources now that we will need to elect future climate and environmental champions up and down the ballot. **[Will you help by using your Political Tax Credit to donate to OLCV today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75857419/445928616/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhNWZhOGU0LTQwYTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9U_9IZemDbWiwQmyrwwK7euvEASdRZVxWjd9PW-frCU=&emci=06e28751-3fa4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=6a5fa8e4-40a4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=2107230) ** Thanks for all you do. PS: If you aren't eligible or have already used your Political Tax Credit this year, please consider making a year-end donation to **[OLCV](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75857420/445928617/-1698714710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhNWZhOGU0LTQwYTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9U_9IZemDbWiwQmyrwwK7euvEASdRZVxWjd9PW-frCU=&emci=06e28751-3fa4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=6a5fa8e4-40a4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=2107230)** or the **[OLCV Education Fund](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75857421/445928618/1159068111?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhNWZhOGU0LTQwYTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9U_9IZemDbWiwQmyrwwK7euvEASdRZVxWjd9PW-frCU=&emci=06e28751-3fa4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=6a5fa8e4-40a4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=2107230)** (tax-deductible). We can't do our work without you.** **

Time is running out, and we wanted to make sure you don't miss the chance of a lifetime!

Make a $10 donation to the Kennedy campaign, and each contribution earns you an entry into the sweepstakes. **Picture yourself meeting RFK Jr., enjoying an exhilarating day of falconry, and engaging in inspiring conversation.** The lucky winner, along with a guest, will also receive round-trip airfare, a 2-night hotel stay, and a delightful lunch.
This is your last opportunity to seize this extraordinary experience, all while supporting our campaign for a brighter future. Every contribution counts, and we appreciate your dedication to our cause.

name: Crow HQ
subject: Three reasons why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Hi there — Team Crow here!
In a moment, we’re going to ask you to pitch in $6 to power our work and reelect Jason in CO-06 before our big FEC deadline. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-december-2023?amount=6] But first, we wanted to give you a few reasons why we’re asking you to donate now.

#1: The American people deserve a government that works.
MAGA Republicans had their chance to prove they can govern with integrity — and they’ve blown it. Instead, they’re prioritizing right-wing culture wars and punishing political enemies like President Biden and Adam Schiff for speaking the truth.

#2: Everything is on the line in this election.
Voting rights.
Abortion rights.
Affordable health care.
The gun violence epidemic.
Action on climate change.
The rule of law and democracy itself.
Action on these issues starts by taking back the House majority.

#3: Grassroots donors are the engine of Jason’s work.
While MAGA Republicans have right-wing billionaires cutting them checks, our team is powered by grassroots donors pitching in just $5 or $10 at a time to advance our values. Our average donation this year is just $22.94 — and we’re proud of it.

Jason isn’t afraid to take on tough fights to stand up for the American people. Now with just a few days until 2024, he’s rolling up his sleeves to finish the job — but he can’t do it alone.
Sunday’s FEC deadline is our final deadline of the year. It’s our last chance to show MAGA Republicans we’re ready to take back the House and bring real leadership to Congress.
So we’re asking: Will you pitch in $6 to Jason Crow for Congress before 12/31 so we can start the new year in the strongest possible position? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-december-2023?amount=6]
DONATE $6 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-december-2023?amount=6]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-december-2023]

With you by our side, we will reelect Jason.
We will defeat extremists like Lauren Boebert.
We will take back the House.
And we will usher in a new generation of leadership to government.
Thank you for your support!
— Team Crow
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
*Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

Here we go... Trump is praising dictators _again._ In a surprise to no one, Trump once again praised authoritarian leaders including Hungary's Viktor Orban, China's Xi Jinping, and North Korea's Kim Jong Un at his New Hampshire rally. Oh, and he called President Joe Biden a "threat to democracy" – a classic “no YOU are!” argument. Folks, this isn’t new, but that doesn’t make it any less troubling. Trump continues to applaud dictators, says he will be a dictator, and praises far-right extremists who actively tried to overthrow the election. And he’s still leading GOP presidential polls by a mile. [We’re heading into a long, hard battle for our democracy in 2024, and we need all the resources we can get to fight back. | Friend, This year's Christmas season was especially heartwarming for us as we celebrated our family's first Christmas together following the wedding of my daughter Emma and her husband Jon. Gathering together during this special time has filled our hearts with immense gratitude. I wanted to take a moment to express my deepest appreciation for your support and contributions to our campaign. Your belief in our vision is the driving force behind our success. Together, we've made significant strides toward securing the corner office for our Granite State.
Wishing you a joyous holiday season and a prosperous year ahead. Warm regards,**
Chuck **

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Friend, This year's Christmas season was especially heartwarming for us as we celebrated our family's first Christmas together following the wedding of my daughter Emma and her husband Jon. Gathering together during this special time has filled our hearts with immense gratitude. I wanted to take a moment to express my deepest appreciation for your support and contributions to our campaign. Your belief in our vision is the driving force behind our success. Together, we've made significant strides toward securing the corner office for our Granite State. Wishing you a joyous holiday season and a prosperous year ahead. Warm regards, Chuck | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Friends of Chuck Morse By providing your number, you are consenting to receive recurring calls and texts, including calls and texts, to that number from Friends of Chuck Morse. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: The Day After Christmas... Now What?
body:
The Day After Christmas Today is the DAY after Christmas. So now what??? I say continue to BE CHRISTMAS all year round. BE LOVE. BE JOY. BE GENERO
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4626075.1600.1.1ed591b9c1d70488b52ac5c8eaa813b6) |
---
## The Day After Christmas
---
Today is the DAY after Christmas. **So now what???** I say continue to **BE CHRISTMAS** all year round. **BE LOVE. BE JOY. BE GENEROUS.** This last WKND at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4626075.1601.1.ffc0e400ed17a7b2d3082656c572dd58) Tulsa, I preached a message on the _connection_ between the **Rachel** giving birth in Bethlehem and **Mary** giving birth in Bethlehem nearly 2000 years later. **This message will give you a lightbulb moment, I promise.** Watch the message here: [Rachel & Mary In Bethlehem](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4626075.1602.1.98ea227692078b334475070aeb59e57c) I also want to challenge you to **end 2023 strong**. _How we exit one season determines how we enter the next season._ This week is your **FINAL** opportunity to make a tax deductible donation to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4626075.1603.1.0a2a8e5d5257300f39f97142e45cd8cb) which is a 501c3. You can end 2023 by making a donation at [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4626075.1604.1.aca7186b245b33ea8d2f90bbe8ee5a01) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4626075.1605.1.28d9aaec8cae3e3c8d2839b1e9c9e580), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4626075.1606.1.9e2482b0bec1890e0f8810d99a9c0845), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4626075.1607.1.a89c1f315c7e40e95bbfe5970ec34b6f), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4626075.1608.1.be6857ace749983bb50af06f9da961e7), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4626075.1609.1.0a7c06734b3282e4e0485fa26918c307), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4626075.1610.1.a365dc9a89ec79c580c9ec379226320a)). body:
In the Biden Family
|
---
| [ ](http://links.newspatriot.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5dd063a806174d0780d541d1811e6f95&_e=_Ugv1w-JdUwBvlrDEwr44QdXAWHqKKJy3GTBSmPBl12JvUgfI3aG1QO51u3pFp48Xzu7wTgBmPc1YIv9AtbG5Lw-HpKz-hE4AsqgHfYdF4HMZ9Lest-n0gf-kc5LmumHv2xHUtKSkuxhU49VVH_cybBNfm2KX8BPRQMB0rD25UB_aA7KoM7RKHQT_Wr-Uymi7OrIrJFTnXD0RjjAqhU79HlOUWxm301pnFrfh86sL5_mz5xF7WZZiEs_CQ45EIRKsPBwX1x03mMGBOIuHoWuS61iyPfXvcvfqM34xxsddZ_64ewQhRBnTAyYxmw7q6N8IEA8yed58ZqFymHyX9NQA8vHflRBP-1mkBn_TE0nvakjQLHrxuG0lGNxyoyRoDzx)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.newspatriot.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5dd063a806174d0780d541d1811e6f95&_e=_Ugv1w-JdUwBvlrDEwr44QdXAWHqKKJy3GTBSmPBl12JvUgfI3aG1QO51u3pFp48Xzu7wTgBmPc1YIv9AtbG5Lw-HpKz-hE4AsqgHfYdF4HMZ9Lest-n0gf-kc5LmumHv2xHUtKSkuxhU49VVH_cybBNfm2KX8BPRQMB0rD25UB_aA7KoM7RKHQT_Wr-Uymi7OrIrJFTnXD0RjjAqhU79HlOUWxm301pnFrfh86sL59j8iHwvL_wuvBpROigg4Jom3OdH3hhSQqmZqEC9v7ZUFkOQ459zH2NBZgClPQiDVv36xKDQzXH86qrMSd5QhB95Pb9ngMm9t6-jNSxu4RLAGDZhmdNSv2vqitbSOCQ9kT6YBr_npnno9aB4rbMsKu9)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.newspatriot.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5dd063a806174d0780d541d1811e6f95&_e=_Ugv1w-JdUwBvlrDEwr44QdXAWHqKKJy3GTBSmPBl12JvUgfI3aG1QO51u3pFp48Xzu7wTgBmPc1YIv9AtbG5Lw-HpKz-hE4AsqgHfYdF4HMZ9Lest-n0gf-kc5LmumHv2xHUtKSkuxhU49VVH_cybBNfm2KX8BPRQMB0rD25UB_aA7KoM7RKHQT_Wr-Uymi7OrIrJFTnXD0RjjAqhU79HlOUWxm301pnFrfh86sL58IDldp3dNOMM9vM-SvsCrQ6fICycTfzVQFkNIpv5uR-v7dSCY7f_-6N7VAXsarqAvQPuXiSwejIggXKx635g6KRJPw8hbRB_WKVYIrqWVqEZiDZyG-M0ElbEgq1MoOPEGr70K9Uckp0rNu5ddyT3D7)
---
I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **
[**If you 're with me, I'd be honored to have your support.**](http://links.newspatriot.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5dd063a806174d0780d541d1811e6f95&_e=_Ugv1w-JdUwBvlrDEwr44QdXAWHqKKJy3GTBSmPBl12JvUgfI3aG1QO51u3pFp48Xzu7wTgBmPc1YIv9AtbG5Lw-HpKz-hE4AsqgHfYdF4HMZ9Lest-n0gf-kc5LmumHv2xHUtKSkuxhU49VVH_cybBNfm2KX8BPRQMB0rD25UB_aA7KoM7RKHQT_Wr-Uymi7OrIrJFTnXD0RjjAqhU79HlOUWxm301pnFrfh86sL5_vBb6aydinkH_Bc2aBkz2KFREeAAoSjHs2OxmkE7g63g895ndLoUpF9kgY8Iq1vgUKCxc5hgP7LMFDByhP-AUvlUxyZCk1W_tKp-0owVvZ0oCk1Akv4cScpiIPq-1r7h5qLVcFqGeGq2D3Q--f707u)

_With Courage,_ James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee

name: Brian Mast
subject: My Purple Heart Reminder
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
I live on, and the fight continues

| [ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=d00f5e8b0a3e48c995f3c34d76d8b859&_e=oxIMvwHbbrgAV1iY5fd_0VlFC2rPzUhMgTYuZd-i_SRQhF7vK972h-fx_dOlvhSYiLybL11rUdl-a8XcTRQpkdlDNpQNqirGJ_hrGl4a0JT5t1A0T5yTgzB_gKBqdR_2e5uleMDM7HooSZRfU2S4L8b2qXaepV_IiGw02wmLC-xLiSTlCtbqhl1Y423PQEq1FUnZjxblH0TqAksfROe2pbgUkUyjF8dR7oz7VzV7i6PiZD1tAzczcFgOTejMkZ4MgGBhoGZ5GpaLExrS0FTcgw9IaTSItG3as13S8e6nwzvFx3fl2IAbkEeFd2_dRWEy0HNlFXNiyM_PIGVL25qnbB8OOkzRFMKgvNhir1-nzZYU3ihJZ8T57hQXiYHt5tc0lQpJ8qptiPivUlQcgQnsfg%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American, I am a Purple Heart Veteran.

_The short story ..._
_I lost two legs as a soldier fighting the Taliban in Afghanistan._

_The long story ..._
For me, my Purple Heart is a reminder that every sacrifice I made was worth it. I will always put service above self, and I have a daily reminder of my commitment--every time I look down to see my legs missing.

My father inspired me to follow in his footsteps, and follow my heart, to join the Army in service of the country I love.

I had the honor of serving under the elite Joint Special Operations Command (JSOC) as a bomb disposal expert. Army life, for me, was always dangerous and very often deadly. After years of service, my final mission resulted in sustaining life-altering injuries when a Taliban bomb exploded under me.

I say life-altering injuries, not because I simply lost my legs, but because I know now how much I would sacrifice to protect the country I love -- _everything._

**If I could, I would make that same sacrifice over and over again to save the lives of my fellow soldiers.** Thankfully, I live on, and the fight to put America First continues.

**Today, I am imploring you to support our America First movement and support conservative veterans running for Congress.**

| [**SUPPORT VETERANS RUNNING FOR CONGRESS**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=d00f5e8b0a3e48c995f3c34d76d8b859&_e=oxIMvwHbbrgAV1iY5fd_0VlFC2rPzUhMgTYuZd-i_SRQhF7vK972h-fx_dOlvhSYiLybL11rUdl-a8XcTRQpkdlDNpQNqirGJ_hrGl4a0JT5t1A0T5yTgzB_gKBqdR_2e5uleMDM7HooSZRfU2S4L8b2qXaepV_IiGw02wmLC-xLiSTlCtbqhl1Y423PQEq1FUnZjxblH0TqAksfROe2pbgUkUyjF8dR7oz7VzV7i6PiZD1tAzczcFgOTejMkZ4MH07CZxMzqBHiHuSHfhRWIVexcn4Wtu9XvqpFwo60sZMJbCSbx1TMXEn2cK6DjkbkbJozgv9a0l20cvyxXXUWamVAFTNw8UyAfkPFesbGdWHjZF0QScH7yyV6ZNihb1VDVRkz1Bldh4ZzlsRKUtyTng%3D%3D)
---

I know the importance of teamwork firsthand. I know that we can't win this fight without your support. **[Please, will you have our six and make a donation of any amount to help more conservative veterans fight for America First in Congress?](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=d00f5e8b0a3e48c995f3c34d76d8b859&_e=oxIMvwHbbrgAV1iY5fd_0VlFC2rPzUhMgTYuZd-i_SRQhF7vK972h-fx_dOlvhSYiLybL11rUdl-a8XcTRQpkdlDNpQNqirGJ_hrGl4a0JT5t1A0T5yTgzB_gKBqdR_2e5uleMDM7HooSZRfU2S4L8b2qXaepV_IiGw02wmLC-xLiSTlCtbqhl1Y423PQEq1FUnZjxblH0TqAksfROe2pbgUkUyjF8dR7oz7VzV7i6PiZD1tAzczcFgOTejMkZ4Ma21aIGAV7s6STCn2VGLpRN9VwFX1407AQ7fkDd57bOaqiA4Pob7MsX0l9-8aHeEGh6qFgH3_YGcGo3vfImWfAOU7mIb-gB48OY-V7ncWpoWbhpPgM4l6jALaztqF4YjFZC4_UsTSRhfCuIYI-TRuRw%3D%3D)**
