Friend,

According to a leaked memo from the Democrats....

We're in for a tough fight come next year's election. In 2020, I won by only a handful of votes, and the Dems think they can repeat history. They're trying to make my district the most contentious election in the country.

What's even worse, Christina Bohannan, my radical opponent from 2022, is coming back for another round, and she's got her liberal donors in tow as she prepares for this election.

I'm letting you know what the state of the race is looking like. We're only a few weeks from 2024, and we're getting ready for the fight of our lives.

If you have anything to spare or feel like helping out, I'd really appreciate it if you could rush a contribution of ANYTHING to help my campaign by clicking **[HERE](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=6a8c459e58c3446d8809d92e8ca8fdfa&_e=wIAt7LqqBKVi6b-3tHDec8VMM4nw6vRbemg9HSd94PjO_RVjLCWCoG5P9buBqEbyGQgfGnBR68DUupfgThf7nkwYjAsjjJSdINGYvcgNAdEdIx7OyrJXNN9fal2Nu6BUC_tZzVf-LHW1P8bqGWWfX7K8VmjgS54VucLd9eNh3po2L6VzRt8cbchnvC6tK45HQolnH8oUGYjr0d5IhTCHyzzrkbRyvirMzI4-QVWo3bxmTYuYfU_e7CM5Bcsgsf2ga3PZsRIXChbU7rWIu_sz80ueMcMTONHqSQQ-oZripI_4HvQDAeNzY_lLZXLIN-st)** or the button below.

We need to be ready for anything they could throw our way. That’s why I need Team Vasquez to come together stronger than ever. We must hit this goal. **Falling short now is simply _not an option_.**

clean_body: = | You know me. As your Secretary of State, I'm committed to defending democracy, countering false claims, and securing the integrity of our elections. The 2024 election will demand maximum effort. I won’t back down from leading with the truth, even when extremists come after me like they have this year. Our democracy is just too important. My only public fundraising deadline is on December 31st and I’m reaching out because I can’t win this fight on my own. With 2024 in just a few short days, I need to ensure that I have the resources to fight back against disinformation. That’s why I need your help right now. Fellow American on the Roll of Honor | _I can’t find your name anywhere, Fellow American._

**This must be wrong.**

I have been reviewing the names for our official NRSC Roll of Honor, and your name is NOWHERE to be found. _How could you abandon us at such a critical time?_

[**You can re-commit to the fight by making one generous contribution of $10 or more today before December 31st.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=657202204cc64bca864dd1d6fbac7755&_e=rJcY-75FmRVCuncRvrIQ-UIfQcg4LY7R-jamtzoBxZJqb74hX7fPPl3rBO6rzED6DgS7ouhBZZq2pBL6ZZ2aSmbKDEFL7ooU3hG3ZSpJc__Cg91TycMiiHXFUFj1PFXeF-RP5orXomooqd8Dzr_zXnr_snHQKH2J4x5O8T-4pWVBcBphdkm6Tc4jVQ_0AzoonCDeSGe13yaZI3V_NjixmeSs5fZP5x7lyzURq5mcYd7G9R8PLFz9QgKTZVtVWAomyL1LwSF5I1OeED_QPSzdb_Oxd8YfdmX13LFxUOWuvzA99sVNTW-iYYPNfIlKCylEVC4eU0CC_xwbUcV285fM12gI2G4wXkPWy4hEvfeS7uBu_O7NHqNRIIxF0g4RyaIv1mlSI6lfABiYl829QIK-Cdtpjm4eHtGn9cEbNtIkh1ljn9-xnL2eAPCLYUWtcttq) Your generous donation will earn you a spot on the Roll of Honor in the Ronald Reagan Republican Center lobby.

What is the Roll of Honor? It is for the most loyal patriots who contribute $10 or more to the NRSC and distinguish themselves among our supporters. We need supporters like you, who we can count on when times get tough, and we need your support the most.

So, we’ve secured one of the TVs in the Ronald Reagan Republican Center lobby to have a 24/7 roll of names to honor our best supporters. The only way to be featured on our Roll of Honor is to offer a timely contribution before the New Year!

Can we count on your support when we need it most? We need supporters like you, who we can count on when times get tough, and we need your support the most. So, we’ve secured one of the TVs in the Ronald Reagan Republican Center lobby to have a 24/7 roll of names to honor our best supporters. The only way to be featured on our Roll of Honor is to offer a timely contribution before the New Year! Can we count on your support when we need it most? Your place on the Roll of Honor is reserved for you, and WAITING for your contribution to activate it. Senate Republicans are counting on your support at this critical moment. We are preparing our campaign to take back the Senate, and in many places, we are already on the ground campaigning to win. Britney from 04662 has already chipped in $27 John from 14738 has chipped in $32 Bruce from 17563 has chipped in $18 Robert from 48637 has chipped in $25 Complete your contribution today to add your name to the Roll of Honor in the Ronald Reagan Republican Center. Thank you, Caroline Deputy Digital Director, NRSC If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: let me introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
the values of hard work, determination, and persistence |
---
Peter – I'm running for reelection in Nevada, and right now, I need your help. But first, let me share a little bit about myself.

I'm the proud granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. Growing up, my family always taught me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence.

It's these values that have guided me on every step of my journey – from becoming the first in my family to graduate from college to defying the odds and unseating a Republican Senate incumbent in 2018.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75858200/445931133/-1806317499?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_231226_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlMWQ5YjQ4LTQ1YTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fwwWrvbxBzO8pCE_5RbEqjWUyubfSn6bkIRNNFiYidc=)
My path to Congress has been anything but traditional, and I wouldn't trade it for the world. I'm all in to keep delivering real progress to working families in Nevada and across the country – but there's a problem:

**With experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ saying that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, the GOP is doing everything it can to defeat me. I need to raise $100,000 before the end of the year to fight back and win, but time is running out before the official FEC deadline – and unfortunately, I'm falling short.**

[That's why I'm personally asking, Peter: Will you split a donation of $X or more between my campaign and Defeat Republicans to help me close this gap, keep Nevada blue, and defend Democrats' crucial Senate majority?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75858201/445931134/-1806317499?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_231226_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlMWQ5YjQ4LTQ1YTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fwwWrvbxBzO8pCE_5RbEqjWUyubfSn6bkIRNNFiYidc=)[ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75858202/445931135/-1806317499?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_231226_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlMWQ5YjQ4LTQ1YTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fwwWrvbxBzO8pCE_5RbEqjWUyubfSn6bkIRNNFiYidc=)

body:
It doesn’t make sense

| [](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=88338134eb654e609d116a15d089fcf3&_e=0SgTQ7rfEn3fdUhKhXB0ygSqUr3oCZrZp3YcGrFdRaREDEDz1jRU3AEXV0Edl7O1dYkkV9uo5ACtjXp8sHcNCjGe1mXiTzoNnHRJMmY0_Tcd1O2hGj53x6-_cLFNxeygSV7jCQXcZRMm6B6ro5ajs_1LqSVKfL9MycJz6CSLp4-LvebZLEi__b5Cm66NX893H8qhnHmxIKhR655_FwaxKjMZC6iP8NPa9Ux_ez_T_8kxF_d-HsziqOnwgHDKLDdThvU9wo9f8CypQ3UclDrNGUK73F98ZfHNnooEUrl-4ZxiRzxZxObAdPz1mlaitst6)

Hey,

I have a very simple question for you: Do you think America is on the right track? Is this the country you have dreamed of? Do you look back on 2023 and count it as a **good** year?

I certainly do **NOT!** This year has been marked by **skyrocketing prices, increased instances of violent crime, and civil unrest, just to name a few.**

We have to change course. **Sherrod votes with him OVER 98 PERCENT OF THE TIME!** If you are unhappy with how 2023 has gone down, why would you support a man just like him?

We can create change in 2024, but only if we don’t make the **SAME** mistake. We are suffering because of Biden, so there is no need to **AMPLIFY** that suffering. If you want **real** change, that starts with finishing 2023 strong. Sherrod Brown will put us in a **deeper** hole that Biden has dug. A hole that America is grappling to get **OUT** of.

We know you are better than this! Do what is right for a better 2024, and [**GET AMERICAN BACK ON TRACK.**](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=88338134eb654e609d116a15d089fcf3&_e=0SgTQ7rfEn3fdUhKhXB0ygSqUr3oCZrZp3YcGrFdRaREDEDz1jRU3AEXV0Edl7O1dYkkV9uo5ACtjXp8sHcNCjGe1mXiTzoNnHRJMmY0_Tcd1O2hGj53x6-_cLFNxeygoMCuQNwq4Xd3AhXKaKS0kvswG0opR9-M1MJmPXKq16HnRG3zW92l3NNQ2qktDkziWlmgM9b565d1hl_vIS8YmN3lJVGr2cZLrUeD5UkG97XoV6OM5kusnR68yzKmXWidpqyY-5Zb4I_kz4XiZSk4BBZHQHs_07Gi7Q85QS7K5YNpEHWQbUFUqIHt2r1v46_7)

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: I’m running for Senate to defeat Rick Scott
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter, I’m running to be Florida’s next U.S. Senator — and I hope you’ll give me a moment to share why.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231226-3?refcode=em20231226-3&refcode2=1496_552475_zja7DV&akid=1496%2E552475%2Ezja7DV)
_My husband and three children._
I was born in Ecuador, and when I was 14, my mother brought my sisters and me to America in search of a better life.
We made a new home in a small, one room apartment in America. My mother worked double shifts as a home health care provider and at night, she took classes to learn English. When I was 15, I started picking up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help us make ends meet.
My mother’s hard work, incredible sacrifices, and relentlessly fierce hope made it possible for me to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress. **She taught me that a better education, a better home, and a better future is always possible if we never give up. This is the promise of America.**
**_And that’s why I’m running for Senate. Because Florida deserves better, and we’ve got to fight for it._**
Right now, our state is being pushed backward by far-right extremists like my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott. He’s targeting the most vulnerable amongst us, dividing our communities, and threatening the American dream. It’s no wonder why a mere 40% of Floridians view him favorably.
With experts saying Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024, I know that we can defeat him and restore the promise of America -- but not without all hands on deck.
**[So please, will you join the fight for a better future by splitting a donation of $5 between Bob Casey and my campaign? If we win in Florida, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend our Senate majority.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231226-3?refcode=em20231226-3&refcode2=1496_552475_zja7DV&akid=1496%2E552475%2Ezja7DV)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231226-3?refcode=em20231226-3&refcode2=1496_552475_zja7DV&akid=1496%2E552475%2Ezja7DV)**
Thank you for joining me in this fight. I’m so grateful to have you by my side.
Debbie

name: Staff Sgt. Aquilino Gonell
subject: They attacked us with the American flag.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The same flag I swore an oath to when I joined the Army.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec23.csjDeB&refcode=em231226-1-t1&t=1&akid=1605%2E734936%2EHtW9X2)
---
Peter -
I will never forget January 6th. I was more afraid at the Capitol that day than I was in my entire deployment to Iraq.
On January 6th, I was assaulted by more than 40 rioters and mob members who were part of concerted efforts to overtake the Capitol. I was sprayed with bear mace, punched, kicked, beaten with stolen police batons and weapons. They even attacked us with the American flag.
I still bear the scars of this day and am saddened every time I think about my career being cut short because of this day.
I honestly thought I was going to die.
But I fought back. I fought for our democracy.
I'm still fighting for it.
And while I was fighting the mob, Ruben Gallego was on the House floor. He helped barricade the doors. He taught his colleagues how to use a gas mask. He was ready to fight for our democracy again, same as when he joined the Marines, same as when he fought in Iraq.
He's still fighting for it, too.
He's fighting to beat the people who led those insurrectionists, who cheer them on, who defend them — people like Mark Lamb, like Kari Lake.
Ruben is the kind of leader we need in the Senate, not them. I’m proud to support him. And that's why I'm writing to you today.
To win, he is going to need your help.
[**Can he count on you? Make today the day that you give your first donation to Ruben’s Arizona Senate campaign.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec23.csjDeB&refcode=em231226-1-t1&t=2&akid=1605%2E734936%2EHtW9X2)

I still bear the scars of this day and am saddened every time I think about my career being cut short because of this day. I honestly thought I was going to die. But I fought back. I fought for our democracy. I'm still fighting for it. And while I was fighting the mob, Ruben Gallego was on the House floor. He helped barricade the doors. He taught his colleagues how to use a gas mask. He was ready to fight for our democracy again, same as when he joined the Marines, same as when he fought in Iraq. He's still fighting for it, too. He's fighting to beat the people who led those insurrectionists, who cheer them on, who defend them — people like Mark Lamb, like Kari Lake. Ruben is the kind of leader we need in the Senate, not them. I’m proud to support him. And that's why I'm writing to you today. To win, he is going to need your help. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** I really appreciate it. I know Ruben does, too. -Aquilino Gonell Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
